name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Kroger to STOP selling food grown with bee-killing pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1807841?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop grocery giant Kroger from selling food grown with BEE-KILLING pesticides!**[**Act now to protect bees!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1807842?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Pollinator populations are on a downward spiral, Friend. Over the last two and a half decades, the beloved Western Bumblebee population has **dropped 93%** , while toxic pesticides like neonics have made U.S. agriculture nearly **48x more toxic to bees!** Despite these staggering figures, grocery companies like Kroger continue to sell food grown with toxic, bee-killing pesticides. That’s why we need your help, Friend. Kroger responds to public pressure, and we are just **_DAYS AWAY_** from Kroger’s shareholder meeting when your voice will have the most impact. **[Please, Friend, take just 30 seconds to tell Kroger to STOP selling food grown with toxic pesticides and help SAVE pollinators!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1807843?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1807844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Many bee and pollinator species are **hurtling toward EXTINCTION!** Our ecosystems and food system rely on pollinators to help plants and crops grow. Without them, even Kroger’s shelves might start to look bare. In fact, pollinators are responsible for every**1 of 3 bites of food we eat! **
The pesticides used on Kroger’s food don’t just hurt bees though, Friend. There are risks to you and me as well! Neonics have been linked to **birth defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and other serious health issues.** How do you feel knowing these chemicals are applied to the food you eat?
The problems with these pesticides are clear. They damage our health, the health of pollinators, and the health of our entire planet. We MUST get Kroger to stop selling food grown with these pesticides and NOW is the time to act. **We need 4,782 more signatures to hit our goal before Kroger’s upcoming shareholder meeting! [Send your message to Kroger and help fight toxic pesticides by 11:59 pm TONIGHT! ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1807845?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1807844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth **
|

| | Hi Peter, Target is the latest company to fall victim to the “Go Woke, Go Broke” movement. In anticipation of “pride” month, Target released an entire line of merchandise that **pushed the Left’s radical gender ideology onto children**.

But the boycott of Target and its stock market decline are not isolated incidents. Disney, Bud Light, Gillette, and other companies have alienated customers with their willingness to embrace the Left’s cultural war on America. **But why?** The answer always goes back to ESG or Environmental, Social, and Governance agenda. All of June, the “social” part of the ESG agenda will be on full display by so much of corporate America. Peter, throughout this month, we will likely see companies going even more woke to display their allegiance to **the Left’s social agenda—an agenda that has increasingly become about radicalizing America’s youth, turning them against their parents and cultural decency, teaching them that they are victims, and in many cases, convincing children to take harmful hormones and surgically remove healthy body parts.** As leaders in the fight against ESG, you and I can use this month to double our efforts against the “woke” ESG agenda. **_Why are you receiving this credit?_**

Our friends at _Tactical USA_ had some extras of these Dash Cams in their warehouse...

And they agreed to let us cover the cost and give them to our subscribers as Free gifts today.

[Just confirm your info here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3689/6374453/00fbe37fc4f11f474c4161870646d58eec216cbd/c6021cb7753c8d1eea90979bf9b4f486598bd630) and it's yours for just the cost of stamps.

They also shoot in **full 1080p HD** , and have a crystal clear **night-vision** mode as well.

The ** _only problem_** is... if they run out of inventory...

Your credit to get one Free may expire.

Last I checked, there were 382 left.

But this email just went out to over 159,000 other subscribers.

So you might not have much time left to grab one.

[Use your credit to get your FREE Dash Cam here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3689/6374453/00fbe37fc4f11f474c4161870646d58eec216cbd/c6021cb7753c8d1eea90979bf9b4f486598bd630), while they're still available.

**Thank You.**

There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative:

If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play.

It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - **which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate.**

**If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat.** I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team.

subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | Support LG! 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=a4a1ec623d&e=84ee529f47)
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=56461936ea&e=84ee529f47)
Dear Patriot,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=f12b4e9f8b&e=84ee529f47)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=221c82bd18&e=84ee529f47)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ccb1b86f72&e=84ee529f47)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Patriot, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=96ea3d764b&e=84ee529f47)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=3767a497f0&e=84ee529f47)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Patriot, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=555d758a02&e=84ee529f47)**.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Red, White, and Blue
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsOhIJPDTN

Pro-Life Statement

Are you worried about what kids are learning in school
today? I know I am.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osOhIJPDTN

Hello,
Are you
worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I
am.

That's
why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little
Patriots Program.

The
Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that
teaches the REAL history of America.

We
provide this curriculum free of charge for parents, grandparents,
guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are
also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a
tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that
helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have
big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your
help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's
why I am emailing you today.

I have
written a brand-new children's book, Red, White, and Blue: Our
Flag Matters to Me and You, to teach kids why we stand for our
American flag and the freedoms it represents.

I wanted
to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the
proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our
Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and
cartoons that show the history of America.

This is
the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children
the best possible resources.

Your gift
of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll
also receive a copy of Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to
Me and You with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder
and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuul6i5kpd95mgjl5dcu67tfuhgf93ua9enavooo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqj53e77jf8n3b0udujoilf3dbc7lq8e0tqibp48_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z98e8n67dpvk6d9d06evijctpmv35r2ma18mdl20_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zofg3iidenekucrcoc13jvcd7dpq33s9k5kvg6do_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvjmcvvdr6q0p7mic8fd80qog6343olm1vci3vo0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z51t2jc7j3vqvs9nolirg8jd2hj2q0mho5799m4g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zroddliph2u0cuom5gkvm59koce808del11b1mao_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcs42pvemakqtq8dk2mnu2j8eg6dlvvj5r9f93q0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgkt9r5h60uvfnaa1qltsfs309ts33uvkncmb4h8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs66actt4k70du87ifdf8j905mi1dqngjflhqv0g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8hkbbdf7kv93pr2679r75tvfk9fm3p3iajqvtjg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9o89ep35c0d2mn0qdhd7ie752tqgso9hk8u879g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbvno5dql25mpmqaac602h5kqvfui153na3f6rl8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zccppd33214hqt735meopt95048qelcldr158f50_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpekrv0tjcd2c26ujr6cs61eathcjl5sq0l0e0ao_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu5qkc6biumruummta6sh4pg502bnu89lntglot0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgt92047cbn0rq7j3h79gehg5rlmif0vo14fiij8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ala3ddndv5snt9qtorjf15a7q7gj1hvmf3vh80_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm8p37cth2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

American Action News

name: Colin Allred
subject: Friend, this race is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.

I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395592/409951883/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395594/409951888/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395595/409951889/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)
**It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.[ That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and American Bridge today →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395596/409951890/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)**
We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.

**Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me.**

**[So please, will you split a donation of $15, $25 or whatever you can between my campaign and American Bridge to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395597/409951891/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Colin Allred and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395598/409951892/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395599/409951893/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395600/409951894/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395601/409951895/1711913910?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)
---
Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.

Colin Allred
| | | | |

Please, will you make a monthly recurring donation right now? | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64395602/409951896/-498614040?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=1&refcode=jtk2675-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NTE5NmU3LTZjMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hGHFltGwOs8iXNMWKR6SdqNQ9e2p4ABOcSI6vrjVV7E=)

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. = Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. = After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. = It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.= We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Colin Allred and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred | | | | | | | | | | | From taking down Trump in 2020 to expanding the Senate majority in 2022, American Bridge is working around the clock to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them by making sure Democrats around the country are elected up and down the ballot. A monthly donation is the most impactful way to power our critical work. Please, will you make a monthly recurring donation right now? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Senator JD Vance continues to work diligently for the People of Ohio.

This edition of _Hillbilly on the Hill_ shares a glimpse into Senator Vance's work in Washington and in Ohio, meeting with constituents and ensuring the voices of all Ohioans are heard by our decisionmakers.

Thanks always for your support. Vance (R-OH) took time out to tour the Greater Cleveland Food Bank Tuesday.

"Unfortunately, we've got a lot of food insecurity in this country right now because of high food prices, because we're still recovering, I think, from the economic consequences of the pandemic. We still have a lot of people who need food support. J.D. Vance praised what he called "an incredible specialty chemicals facility in the heart of southeast Ohio" and said he wants help from Washington, D.C., to keep it that way.

Vance, R-Ohio, made the stop Thursday afternoon as part of a tour of a variety of businesses and community organizations in the state, as well as Rickenbacker Air Force Base in Columbus.

He spoke with Solvay officials and workers about some of the challenges they face, including a shift away from raw materials coming from within the United States.

"We should not be getting so much of our stuff from East Asia, especially China," the freshman senator said, describing America's trade battle with that nation as a "cold war." "We've got to make more of our own stuff."

"This is economic warfare and theft of the American dream from American citizens, that is the big problem here and that's why we have to keep fighting it," he continued.

J.D. Vance spoke Monday evening at the Lincoln Day dinner, held at the Bill Frankart Barn in rural Clyde.

A near-capacity crowd of 530 listened to remarks by the Republican senator, followed by a question-and-answer session. Vance gave his views on current topics in Washington D.C. including the debt ceiling talks, corruption in the federal government, and the importance of getting the Republican party to defeat Democratic Sen. Sherrod Brown in the next election.

**' A VICTORY FOR THE SAFETY AND SECURITY OF EVERY AMERICAN WHO VISITS OUR NATION'S CAPITOL'** ([Cleveland.com](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=0876e05baa0b4e8b8837c3ace064e6d9&_e=7GoK5BvG_UW50ztOLcUOuOnsKeDJ7Obwy-1cTx2ut1eAIHklvLq7VCMBkzMlADBW3mS7vDrIo5TyXYyEhkKX_wIvHzGxcHHRmFdn_5SPDcuP0RrT8IJx0jSB6CN8NYE7SzdRAxZL_n7VCC2vJzTRRdRkWZSUwG_w02h5WpCviXpddwCHDJVLfBtMmpo4xvJW7uzk1oOTvVDB8VcNlt12C_ZUpWI6AHmdlg37LwS1F5OqOYDAjsMN71yfMrCDrFSiSSGcvH6Bs0tE9KqPnXwGoSnBlIez4MHZCTHK4ZIdJ-sirzbD7MIEcys89QcUJLYvfRiPJB0KmUiCSvjeDMfu2w%3D%3D)) -- The U.S. Senate on Tuesday approved a measure by Sen. J.D. Vance, a Cincinnati Republican that would nullify a District of Columbia police reform law that Vance says increases crime and makes "it harder for police officers to do their job."

After the vote, Vance released a statement that called it a "victory for the safety and security of every American who visits our nation's capital," and a strong message of support for its police officers.

"With this vote, Congress has sent President Biden a clear and bipartisan message: the American people have rejected the radical left and they want to see law and order in Washington," it continued.

Senator J.D. Vance (R-OH) calls Ohio 'ground zero' for opioids coming from Mexico. He says they're now the leading cause of death among young people, and why so many children go through life without their parents.

financially. And what Joe Biden has done is refuse to negotiate from the very beginning. He's basically playing Russian roulette with the country's finances and telling Republicans they need to do exactly what he wants them to do or he's going to drive the American economy off the cliff.

clean_body: | Senator JD Vance continues to work diligently for the People of Ohio. This edition of Hillbilly on the Hill shares a glimpse into Senator Vance's work in Washington and in Ohio, meeting with constituents and ensuring the voices of all Ohioans are heard by our decisionmakers. Thanks always for your support. ' IT'S A GREAT HONOR TO SERVE' () - JD Vance was sworn-in as Ohio's junior U.S. senator on Jan. 3. So far, he says he loves the job. "It's a great honor to serve. And I'm still at that phase where I pinch myself every single day walking these halls, where so many great people have done so many great things," Vance told Spectrum News in an interview last week. Watch Spectrum 's full story ' JD'S TERRFIC BILL HAS MY COMPLETE AND TOTAL ENDORSEMENT' () - Sen. J.D. Vance's (R-OH) bipartisan rail safety legislation -- introduced in the aftermath of the devastating train derailment and "controlled" chemical burn in East Palestine, Ohio -- picked up a significant endorsement on Monday from the former president. Former President Donald Trump, who visited East Palestine after the incident, praised the Railway Safety Act of 2023 on Monday via his Truth Social account while knocking President Joe Biden and Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg for their lack of urgency. Read Breitbart 's full article . ' THIS PLACE IS DOING IMPORTANT WORK' () -- As discussions over the U.S. debt ceiling continue in Washington, Senator J.D. Vance (R-OH) took time out to tour the Greater Cleveland Food Bank Tuesday. "Unfortunately, we've got a lot of food insecurity in this country right now because of high food prices, because we're still recovering, I think, from the economic consequences of the pandemic. We still have a lot of people who need food support. That includes our seniors, people who through no fault of their own are struggling to feed themselves, and that includes a lot of children in the greater Cleveland area. "So this place is doing important work. I think we've got to make sure it continues to be able to do that important work, and that's one of the reasons I was here, to understand the challenges and also the opportunities a little bit better," Vance said. Watch News 5 Cleveland 's full story . ' WE'VE GOT TO MAKE MORE OF OUR OWN STUFF' () -- After visiting Solvay Specialty Polymers on state Route 7 south of Marietta, U.S. Sen. J.D. Vance praised what he called "an incredible specialty chemicals facility in the heart of southeast Ohio" and said he wants help from Washington, D.C., to keep it that way. Vance, R-Ohio, made the stop Thursday afternoon as part of a tour of a variety of businesses and community organizations in the state, as well as Rickenbacker Air Force Base in Columbus. He spoke with Solvay officials and workers about some of the challenges they face, including a shift away from raw materials coming from within the United States. "We should not be getting so much of our stuff from East Asia, especially China," the freshman senator said, describing America's trade battle with that nation as a "cold war." "We've got to make more of our own stuff." Read Marietta News and Sentinel 's full article . ' THIS BORDER CRISIS IS ABOUT FENTANYL COMING INTO COMMUNITIES...KILLING CHIDLREN' () - Ohio's Republican Sen. J.D. Vance told Newsmax Monday that President Joe Biden's administration is trying to sweep the border crisis "under the rug" by downplaying the number of illegal migrants coming across the border after Title 42 ended last week. Watch Newsmax 's full story ' THIS IS ECONOMIC WARFARE AND THEFT OF THE AMERICAN DREAM FROM AMERICAN CITIZENS' () -- In an exclusive interview with SiriusXM Patriot's Breitbart News Saturday, Vance called on Republicans to discuss illegal immigration as a fixture of "the cheap labor lobby" which seeks to inflate the United States labor market to drive down wages and employ an underclass of cheaper foreign workers with little-to-no bargaining power. "Think of the effects that this has on working Americans' wages to have 10 million more people who shouldn't be here competing for jobs," Vance said. "Think about what this does for housing prices, when you have to house 10 million people that shouldn't be here, that drives up the costs of housing when interest rates are already through the roof." "This is economic warfare and theft of the American dream from American citizens, that is the big problem here and that's why we have to keep fighting it," he continued. Read Breitbart 's full article . () -- U.S. Sen. J.D. Vance spoke Monday evening at the Lincoln Day dinner, held at the Bill Frankart Barn in rural Clyde. A near-capacity crowd of 530 listened to remarks by the Republican senator, followed by a question-and-answer session. Vance gave his views on current topics in Washington D.C. including the debt ceiling talks, corruption in the federal government, and the importance of getting the Republican party to defeat Democratic Sen. Sherrod Brown in the next election. Read Fremont News Messenger 's full story ' A VICTORY FOR THE SAFETY AND SECURITY OF EVERY AMERICAN WHO VISITS OUR NATION'S CAPITOL' () -- The U.S. Senate on Tuesday approved a measure by Sen. J.D. Vance, a Cincinnati Republican that would nullify a District of Columbia police reform law that Vance says increases crime and makes "it harder for police officers to do their job." After the vote, Vance released a statement that called it a "victory for the safety and security of every American who visits our nation's capital," and a strong message of support for its police officers. "With this vote, Congress has sent President Biden a clear and bipartisan message: the American people have rejected the radical left and they want to see law and order in Washington," it continued. Read Cleveland.com 's full story . ' PARTISAN PUSHBACK AGAINST BORDER SECURITY IS UNACCEPTABLE' () -- There's been weeks of heightened attention on the border following the end of Title 42, and Republicans say drug and human trafficking is as bad as it's ever been. Senator J.D. Vance (R-OH) calls Ohio 'ground zero' for opioids coming from Mexico. He says they're now the leading cause of death among young people, and why so many children go through life without their parents. Watch WTRF 's full story ' JOE BIDEN HAS REFUSED TO NEGOTIATE FROM THE VERY BEGINNING' () -- House Republicans have done something very simple, but I think very profound: They've advanced a program that pays the country's debts while putting the country on a more sustainable path financially. And what Joe Biden has done is refuse to negotiate from the very beginning. He's basically playing Russian roulette with the country's finances and telling Republicans they need to do exactly what he wants them to do or he's going to drive the American economy off the cliff. Read Senator Vance's full statement . ' I'M PROUD TO STAND WITH EVERY OHIOAN WHO DEPENDS ON AM RADIO' () -- Lawmakers introduced the AM for Every Vehicle Act on Wednesday, a bi-partisan bill that would force manufacturers to keep AM radio in new cars. Watch WFMJ 's full story . Senator JD Vance continues to deliver for all of Ohio as a conservative outsider in the United States Senate. | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., 1391 W 5th Avenue, Suite 314, Columbus, OH 43212 Copyright (C) 2023 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

Peter, you may not know me, but I’ve dedicated my life to fight for conservatives like YOU.
From my time with the RNC to starting my own GOP firm that helps further conservatives’ vision for America.
In that time, I’ve talked to voters across the country, and I’ve noticed a disturbing trend: in the last decade, there’s been a narrative in our country that being American is something to be ashamed of, and that our great American Experiment is failing.
_**I can tell you for certain that I don’t believe that. It is a talking point Democrats love to tell and a massive LIE.**_
Working with conservative leaders throughout the country, I know that our country’s best days are ahead of us.
There is real talent, passion, and leadership across America that is just waiting to be tapped, and I’m on a mission to reach them. I helped start **Unleash America PAC** so that we could show America that conservative values and solutions are THRIVING.
Our mission so far has been a HUGE success, but we’re just getting started - and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today.
[**Will you help fuel our mission to UNLEASH American potential from the grips of the radical Left?**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=64563aa090274ff594c0780129dd0e2e&_e=t8dkf_IslutkalcwgIz1eNIJJHWoml2zAxNJHmy7hOQcbWa2gSxFqfc92JaDNitpEjW0VyqscW2hMiEvGiee00GMn5OAc8WeOEd0XVU6bv0DT5Y4t_MEBnjnV5C59I8pKTiTvq50EnbUE9ZZreEgt4DWDRdet8n1f8m1PBMg7JNNhRPRox4lz00VwNOB0MJmAZSm06IZY79BFNfBRHsobW-UTSd8ENSBm6OjrYTvZ9ZcgDI-px4Rnq5ZYvM55zcoIMJwic19qYiFfIj1y4rak9SBSCkyMXXGxWB5SAURQNxqqk5QkoGmgg1Bip24nSIAcLvvVQHCLxmZAfI0iqXwwb5NvjQUzYnjM6haS0CdQ2G4uVjPj6q1l3BcezDHy3kG)

There’s no sugarcoating this, Peter:

If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play.

It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - **which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate.**

**If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat.** I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _

Then this should be an easy win for Republicans here in 2024, right? **Not in the slightest,_Peter_. **

Democrats like Joe Manchin have continually outraised Republican candidates in the past years, allowing him to win elections and hold on to this Senate seat. In 2018, Manchin won his race by three points, despite Republicans adding two seats to their majority at the time.

**Joe Manchin is sitting atop a $9.7 MILLION war chest, which he will use to buy this Senate seat, and with it, the Democrats’ Majority in 2024.**

**We won’t stand a chance of winning back our Senate majority if we can’t fight back against all this Democrat cash.**

I’m urgently calling for grassroots Republicans to **[join my team and pitch into our West Virginia Battle Fund today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d5de77ec485d4b7ab5a1b232d6c15041&_e=ntzf85hAoLJoIb4N41sKG045P161EVnknhNiyb9kVjVsSLlplOOulTNEt1cceZ1IDuI9FQJhHmxaJnYL2m9_Ue7G5hlSLsnVnJv7AVtWmxiBZg4sVHHgY4Ods27bX-I3QVZY2q9iGbmYfkT2F_setMy0lYDLNWDfRR5nCstZm7z2LeePSypCP7TOS3YVXMTgIc8IsVr8iqdq3FnKtXWYPnylwhahzOAu_CphKr9G34OsChAsB4N62XRyJ-3zgX8IqyMk9x56AwGVEzERbsYIPKZ-qR0RH-wh4a-AJLihaEsc1F7T5-jaqpOLrrmzpd45FZh7yaB_xxfx_iIsKyfcYTLct3JY5aWpaPM1lb1Kw2OtS1HX5yk5G7H5JjoAMXgtnDmQvncZQZsvg7HwCowjicodYhUaLvrEuLFVzqdJFdc%3D)**.

Regardless of the amount, your contribution will directly fund our grassroots efforts, allowing us to reach more voters, amplify our message, and counter Manchin and his Democrat fundraising machine.

The implications of falling short here in West Virginia are grave—we risk locking Republicans out of the Senate majority for the rest of this decade and leaving America’s future in the hands of radical Democrats.

Remember, the stakes are high, and **[every contribution counts](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d5de77ec485d4b7ab5a1b232d6c15041&_e=ntzf85hAoLJoIb4N41sKG045P161EVnknhNiyb9kVjVsSLlplOOulTNEt1cceZ1IDuI9FQJhHmxaJnYL2m9_Ue7G5hlSLsnVnJv7AVtWmxiBZg4sVHHgY4Ods27bX-I3QVZY2q9iGbmYfkT2F_setMy0lYDLNWDfRR5nCstZm7z2LeePSypCP7TOS3YVXMTgIc8IsVr8iqdq3FnKtXWYPnylwhahzOAu_CphKr9G34OsChAsB4N62XRyJ-3zgX8IqyMk9x56AwGVEzERbsYIPGupOzTcrUgwO7wDQhpjBsGj6FcWyNyZugQez2VJqx44as6F2rSckRUv8Ou7J8Lz4xRUBAZoQRKyPrHw9MBLIHo3vwhUl2YHJjoA1hyPkZNgZgIIurdZcOKlpNlsss7_irFozlLdTDj0kFba6UQP5fc%3D)**.

Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
We warned about 484 — an accuracy rate of 99.8%

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it's not just about a few hundred banks. It's about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! [See what it is here](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3tdidi25k4q2nh26sipm3i01kqu88a8r9nv0038_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1jm2ob4cjh2bs). Good luck and God bless! |

name: Anna Kaplan via Blue Amp Action
subject: I’m going to defeat George Santos
body:
Retire George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa409f89-6d38-4a04-9f0d-4e67ad546573/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish. He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies — all of them. And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75f976b9-9925-4f2d-af68-b0e088f25906/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. [My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Blue Amp Action \-- to help me send George Santos into political retirement? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb13de064-e560-484e-8efb-9a8e55e8f063/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbaa44c2f-c8b3-4ad1-98d0-6d5770d75d31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td81f1dfd-3a36-4ee6-a9fc-6eb64376a4bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. [But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1d7acc7-52d0-49c7-911f-dfbade127bcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17ef0ce0-1265-43b0-8cfb-fffb4343cd98/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T022044a7-4565-43a4-a4dc-655affddc51b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00213860-2556-4898-adfe-9130fd7a1aad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: sunshine and rainbows
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=113%2E52803%2E3xsiM2)

| | I’ve always loved June, Peter. The weather is great, kids are out of school, we celebrate Pride, commemorate Juneteenth, and even recognize Dads on Father’s Day. Unfortunately, my team tells me June isn’t all sunshine and rainbows. **In fact, June is historically one of the most difficult months when it comes to online fundraising—and right now, our numbers back that up.** **[We can’t afford a “summer slump” right after launching our campaign, Peter. So please, will you rush a $25 donation right away to turn our fundraising numbers around and help us keep pace with our self-funded, slump-immune, multi-millionaire opponent?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1765?t=11&amount=25&akid=113%2E52803%2E3xsiM2)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1765?t=12&amount=25&akid=113%2E52803%2E3xsiM2)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1765?t=13&amount=35&akid=113%2E52803%2E3xsiM2)
---
If you didn’t know, this so-called “summer slump” is when grassroots campaigns like ours see a sudden and often prolonged drop in their fundraising numbers during the summer months.
And honestly, it makes a lot of sense, doesn’t it? Folks are logging off earlier, enjoying the outdoors, and spending more quality time with their friends and families.
**But here’s the (BIG) problem, Peter:** Summer hasn’t even officially started yet, and we’re already seeing a drop in our fundraising numbers here in Maryland.
**[I wasn’t expecting this—at least not so soon after launching our campaign. So, can you help us out by chipping in $25 to get us back on track and win Maryland’s Senate race?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1765?t=14&amount=25&akid=113%2E52803%2E3xsiM2)**

name: GA House Democrats
subject: It’s Pride Month. Here’s how we’re standing strong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC Georgia House Democratic Caucus
body:
Peter,

If you know and love someone who is LGBTQ+, it’s time to honor them this month - and every month - and continue fighting for equal rights and protections for all of us.

Pride Month has arrived, and we’re celebrating - because we see that the GOP’s radical attacks are a threat to our Democracy, and standing together to champion love for all Americans only makes us stronger.

DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots?refcode=060623-Pride-bttn1]

Look at the voices raised after Kemp signed SB 140 - a bill that bans gender-affirming medical care to Georgia’s youth - into law. Those voices included more than 500 Georgia medical providers, every major LGBTQ+ organization in the state, the ACLU, Democratic members of the Georgia House, and, most importantly, Georgia’s transgender community that will be directly impacted by this harmful legislation.

Georgia House Democrats proudly stand with our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors, and one way we can ensure they are supported is by electing Democratic Representatives who will champion their identities, freedoms, and opportunities.

Will you chip in to help us recruit the strongest Democratic candidates to be a voice for all Georgians, no matter who they love?

$10, $20 or $50 today helps us recruit strong Democrats to run for the House.
Donate Here: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots?refcode=060623-Pride-link1]

After all, love is love. Let’s take a Majority in the Georgia House to fight for it.

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots?refcode=060623-Pride-bttn2]

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Important
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Please give this message a moment of your time.
#

Peter-
This is one of the most important months of the entire campaign. It's our first, full FEC fundraising deadline month.
When it ends, we're legally required to share our fundraising numbers for all to see. And everyone will be watching: the press, our opponents, and potential endorsers.
We'll post them if they're good, and we'll post them if they are not... we have no choice. So we're looking for a big report.
If everyone who has yet to give to this Senate campaign gave today -- no matter the amount -- we would CRUSH our fundraising goals and win this race easily.
So what do you say, Peter? It would give our campaign extraordinary peace of mind to make huge progress toward our goals today. Please.
[**Can I count on you to make your first online donation to our campaign today? It will all add up if we all chip in and we'll win this race and keep Arizona's senate seats Blue.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230606-1&t=1&akid=685%2E734936%2Eb8_aGa)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We can make a difference this Pride Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Support Chicago’s Brave Space Alliance.
#
**Happy Pride Month, Peter.**
I am gearing up to march with the LGBTQ+ community at Chicago Pride in just a few weeks. While I am excited to show my support and join the celebration, I want to start this Pride Month off by directing your attention to an LGBTQ+ organization in Chicago that needs our support.
**[Will you kick off Pride Month with a donation to Brave Space Alliance, the first and only Black-led, Trans-led, LGBTQ+ resource center located on the South Side of Chicago?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64409277/409982881/-293052660?refcode=dd_em_230606_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM3ZDZmNy03NzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cbcx5Ux6LKwM0ivBRZmOHyHDRIq4f-Ec4lds2BNdatk=)**
I recently met with members of Brave Space Alliance to learn more about their important work.
BSA provides a lifeline for transgender, gender non-conforming, and queer people living in parts of Chicago where very few resources exist for the LGBTQ+ community. BSA’s doors are open to all, but they primarily connect vulnerable Black and Brown queer and trans communities with health and wellness supplies, housing support, a community food pantry, and other resources.
The LGBTQ+ community needs our vocal and steadfast support — during Pride Month and all year long. LGBTQ+ people continue to face violence and discrimination in Illinois and across the country. Meanwhile, the far-right is stoking a culture war that is putting LGBTQ+ people at risk.
**[Together, we can make a difference by supporting Brave Space Alliance, an organization transforming the lives of LGBTQ+ people in Chicago. Can you make a contribution now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64409280/409982883/-293052660?refcode=dd_em_230606_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM3ZDZmNy03NzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cbcx5Ux6LKwM0ivBRZmOHyHDRIq4f-Ec4lds2BNdatk=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**** ****
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64409281/409982887/-293052660?refcode=dd_em_230606_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM3ZDZmNy03NzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cbcx5Ux6LKwM0ivBRZmOHyHDRIq4f-Ec4lds2BNdatk=)********

name: Joe Biden
subject: What we have accomplished →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m writing today to remind you of all the things we’ve accomplished because we won in 2020. | | |
---
Peter, I’ll get right to it: **[I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign. You can click here to make a contribution right now.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zqTn1nB5X1rOxL7-i3KQqZ_wCAa2XScN-OPPqXwNKoi-UWWn2ZmG3x-kXUtrnhbeGaZ4_guOXBXn8s45Sq6Ps-6jGQV-gh_F46Yb98PIg8wGYWj30AJ1RY_kkG3j1mMBEkXVJTfYQhElmqmp-aBCPoZ9QE5HMlQVgrB8HTTXrXu-fqcague9xI2eO8ipNNO7o8jX8-lhzCIzWI4iG-QH2P18srJBGCk7t6gPaIIk_gOSEbHsfMYx3_ZJo9ppfiEE1Sad4_KoyihLRXkAo1b-9OVp1MVVSRDrIWdkhIiEAmVcqezvEqhRPXxVszCGJ4gBOupTZq9jA5FrzqshIwVIny-4nFii7TitvIMXSxS2YEqw/3wt/czOzImDNSxSVniUOgnd1hQ/h0/cNxFeYGran4-KxB9bZBlwbez-j457QnrpmooTNocyEw)** I know this message is long, but I hope you’ll take a moment to read it and be reminded of all the things we have been able to accomplish because of our victory in 2020. Then, I’ll explain why your support matters so much -- especially this early in a campaign. When Kamala and I were sworn in over two years ago, the economy was on its back. Schools and businesses were closed. People were hurting. And far too many were mourning the loss of a loved one to COVID. Kamala and I agreed that we couldn’t just rebuild the economy as it was before: we needed to build an economy from the bottom up and the middle out, not the top down. So we got right to work and passed the American Rescue Plan. **Today, our economy has recovered faster and stronger than any other developed country in the world, we’ve created more jobs in two years than any president in a four-year term, and the unemployment rate is near record lows.** And we didn’t stop there: we kept working to make progress on the issues that matter. We passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, kicking off a decade of rebuilding our country’s roads, bridges, highways, ports, internet, and railroads. We passed the most significant gun safety legislation in over three decades. We took on Big Pharma _and won_ , capping the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors -- now, the biggest insulin manufacturers are lowering the cost for everyone. We passed the Inflation Reduction Act, which is bringing down costs for working people and is the largest investment to combat climate change in U.S. history -- because I believe building a clean energy future starts in America. When I look back at all the things we’ve accomplished together, I feel proud -- _and I’m reminded that there’s so much more work for us to get done._ **If you’re with Kamala and me in this fight, can you pitch in a donation of $25 right now? Grassroots contributions from supporters like you are laying the strong foundation we’ll need to win in 2024.**
| If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: I’m writing today to remind you of all the things we’ve accomplished because we won in 2020. | | | Peter, I’ll get right to it: I know this message is long, but I hope you’ll take a moment to read it and be reminded of all the things we have been able to accomplish because of our victory in 2020. Then, I’ll explain why your support matters so much -- especially this early in a campaign. When Kamala and I were sworn in over two years ago, the economy was on its back. Schools and businesses were closed. People were hurting. And far too many were mourning the loss of a loved one to COVID. Kamala and I agreed that we couldn’t just rebuild the economy as it was before: we needed to build an economy from the bottom up and the middle out, not the top down. So we got right to work and passed the American Rescue Plan. Today, our economy has recovered faster and stronger than any other developed country in the world, we’ve created more jobs in two years than any president in a four-year term, and the unemployment rate is near record lows. And we didn’t stop there: we kept working to make progress on the issues that matter. We passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, kicking off a decade of rebuilding our country’s roads, bridges, highways, ports, internet, and railroads. We passed the most significant gun safety legislation in over three decades. We took on Big Pharma and won , capping the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors -- now, the biggest insulin manufacturers are lowering the cost for everyone. We passed the Inflation Reduction Act, which is bringing down costs for working people and is the largest investment to combat climate change in U.S. history -- because I believe building a clean energy future starts in America. When I look back at all the things we’ve accomplished together, I feel proud -- and I’m reminded that there’s so much more work for us to get done. If you’re with Kamala and me in this fight, can you pitch in a donation of $25 right now? Grassroots contributions from supporters like you are laying the strong foundation we’ll need to win in 2024. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I know I don’t need to remind you what’s at stake in this election: the MAGA Republicans in this race want to drag us backward. When they look at America, all they can see is carnage, darkness, and despair. They spread fear and lies for profit and power. When Kamala and I look at America, we see possibility. If the last two years show you anything, it’s that there’s not a single thing beyond our capacity if we do it together. I am proud to have you in my corner. Thank you, Joe Joe Biden

The Biden Administration is in trouble for 2024 and they’ve gone to their usual playbook – playing the race card:

**I’m here to tell you that couldn’t be farther from the truth.**
---
_As the great-great-grandson of a slave who became a United States Congressman in a white majority district, I am living proof that Biden’s claims are false._

That’s why I went onto _The Benny Show_ to discuss these disgusting attacks on conservatives from this administration and the lies Biden spouts as he tries to win re-election.

With a trail of failed policies and low approval ratings behind him, it’s no wonder he’s resorting to the Left’s go-to accusations while trying to gain votes and support.

clean_body: When all else fails they always pull out the race card... | Friend, The Biden Administration is in trouble for 2024 and they’ve gone to their usual playbook – playing the race card: (Source: The Washington Post) They are digging their heels in with “our country is systemically racist” and “you can’t do anything if you’re a person of color.” I’m here to tell you that couldn’t be farther from the truth. As the great-great-grandson of a slave who became a United States Congressman in a white majority district, I am living proof that Biden’s claims are false. That’s why I went onto The Benny Show to discuss these disgusting attacks on conservatives from this administration and the lies Biden spouts as he tries to win re-election. Biden is choosing to ignore the real threats to our country, such as our failing economy or his open-border policies that put our national security at risk. Instead, he is name-calling and accusing conservative Americans like you and me of being terrorists in his desperate attempt to regain the votes they’ve lost with their failed agenda. As an Apache helicopter pilot who was deployed to Iraq, I know what terrorists look like. And I can assure you that people that just care about our country, don’t want the FBI spying on them, and don’t want the government infringing on our constitutional rights are NOT terrorists. We will be the ones who stop the Left’s destruction of this country and Save America. This administration has been a failure since Biden’s first day in office. And now, 2.5 years later, polling shows how unsuccessful of a leader Biden has been. Only 33% of Americans say they approve of his handling of the economy, and only 31% approve of Biden’s performance on issues such as gun policy and immigration, not to mention his overall approval rating is a measly 40%. With a trail of failed policies and low approval ratings behind him, it’s no wonder he’s resorting to the Left’s go-to accusations while trying to gain votes and support. Joe Biden ALWAYS turns to race rather than accept responsibility for his failings. But we are speaking up and fighting back against his failed agenda and his lying accusations and attacks against the American people. We will take this country back and expose Biden and the Left for who they are, people who will destroy the very fabric of America. With my army of America First patriots alongside me, we won’t let that happen. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Happy Pride, Peter!

June marks the start of Pride Month, a celebration of the LGBTQIA+ community and the struggle toward equality.

In places like Texas, the LGBTQIA+ community has faced relentless attacks on their identity and freedom. This month we recommit ourselves to fighting back against discrimination of all kinds.

**[Today we’re launching our 2023 Pride Month sticker!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64411777/409992008/2056128709?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWUxMWNkOS03YzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ueLG2LEWcAZ0k4eRLFz6CqhJjYraSE4ukOZP0p6PuVA=&emci=79be9cd2-7c04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cee11cd9-7c04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379) **Every purchase helps Team Casar fight for the dignity and human rights of all people.

Texas has been ground zero for a new wave of anti-LGBTQIA+ policies. According to Equality Texas, more than 140 bills were filed this year alone that could harm LGBTQIA+ Texans.

That’s why it’s so important that we continue to push for things like the Equal Rights Amendment and the Equality Act to end discrimination and codify LGBTQIA+ rights into law.

**[Check out our store to celebrate Pride Month in style](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64411784/409992039/1403401676?source=em-20230224&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWUxMWNkOS03YzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ueLG2LEWcAZ0k4eRLFz6CqhJjYraSE4ukOZP0p6PuVA=&emci=79be9cd2-7c04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cee11cd9-7c04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)** —and help us fight for LGBTQIA+ equality in Texas and across the nation!

Happy Pride,
-Team Casar

name: VoteVets
subject: Around here, we honor World War II Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
DeSantis couldn’t be bothered
#
Derek,
In Iowa yesterday, Ron DeSantis couldn’t be bothered to spend some time with a World War II Veteran. We thought that was interesting. Here’s why:
Three separate people — an attendee, a member of DeSantis’ staff, even the governor of Iowa — told DeSantis that the Veteran was there. All DeSantis could do was scrawl a signature on some scrap paper and give a nod and a wave in their direction.
There are precious few World War II Veterans left. Their generation fought to defeat authoritarians and fascists around the world, while defending our democratic values and freedom at home. Each of them is a treasure.
And when you really think about it, of course DeSantis couldn’t be bothered to spend a few minutes of his day honoring that Veteran.
He doesn’t believe in anything that generation fought for. And that’s why we have to do everything we can to beat him.
So, Derek, we have to know: **[Can you chip in $3 to help us make sure DeSantis never gets a chance to bring his brand of authoritarianism to the White House? We plan to spend millions of dollars over the next year and a half to beat them.
