clean_body: DeSantis couldn’t be bothered Derek, In Iowa yesterday, Ron DeSantis couldn’t be bothered to spend some time with a World War II Veteran. We thought that was interesting. Here’s why: Three separate people — an attendee, a member of DeSantis’ staff, even the governor of Iowa — told DeSantis that the Veteran was there. All DeSantis could do was scrawl a signature on some scrap paper and give a nod and a wave in their direction. There are precious few World War II Veterans left. Their generation fought to defeat authoritarians and fascists around the world, while defending our democratic values and freedom at home. Each of them is a treasure. And when you really think about it, of course DeSantis couldn’t be bothered to spend a few minutes of his day honoring that Veteran. He doesn’t believe in anything that generation fought for. And that’s why we have to do everything we can to beat him. So, Derek, we have to know: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** The only way to stop authoritarians like DeSantis is by fighting back. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._F23fVAtOFw)
---
Fellow Conservative, I’m disappointed. I’m frustrated. And I’m worried about this country. Late last week the United States Senate passed the debt limit deal that will allow the government to increase the debt limit and to continue their beyond reckless, excessive spending, which is a grave threat to every single citizen of our Nation. Reckless spending got us into this inflationary mess, and this debt limit deal does almost nothing to curtail Washington’s harmful spending habits. Republicans simply didn’t get enough in return for this debt limit deal. With this deal, the Federal Government will be allowed to continue their profligate spending by adding trillions to the national debt on top of their already inflated budget. _Even the funding for Biden’s 87,000 new IRS agents is nearly untouched!_ I’m fighting back and working to bring a conservative majority to the United States Senate. If you want a conservative majority in the Senate too, please support my campaign with a donation right now. **[Let’s show our party that the conservative movement is what wins- not weakness >>](http://trk.tedcruz.-PJ2atv1Uvvp7-g0aAmQ)** Thank you for your STRONG and MEANINGFUL support of my campaign. For Liberty,

name: Kaiden Tischner
subject: TRENT STAGGS FOR US SENATE-Volunteering
body:
Peter,

Thank you for your interest in supporting Mayor Staggs' Senate run! Trent appreciates the enthusiasm and support he has received from so many people, and he looks forward to meeting you as soon as possible. Please let me know what level of involvement you're willing to give to the campaign -- post a sign in your lawn, host a town hall, attend our events, donate, and so on. And if you haven't already, please follow Trent on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/mayortrentstaggs), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/mayor_trentstaggs/), and [Twitter](https://twitter.com/MayorStaggs).

Thanks,

Kaiden Tischner
Volunteer & Event Coordinator

<https://trentstaggs.com/>

name: Election Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: Mike Pence
body:
This race is moving even faster than we could have expected
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1072%2E120351%2EDUpndS)
**Peter, Mike Pence just joined the 2024 presidential race.**
That makes him the **eighth candidate** to join the crowded Republican primary — and yet another bad actor that our reporters will have to keep tabs on and hold accountable.
[**This race is moving even faster than we could have expected, so for our reporters to keep up we need to expand our resources —**** _quickly_****. We’ve set a goal to raise $4,000 today, but we need your support to get us there. Will you chip in $5 now?** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230606?refcode=em20230606&refcode2=1072_120351_DUpndS&akid=1072%2E120351%2EDUpndS)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230606?refcode=em20230606&refcode2=1072_120351_DUpndS&akid=1072%2E120351%2EDUpndS)**
With local newsrooms located across 8 different battleground states, **the path to the presidency quite literally runs through our backyard.**
Right now, our on-the-ground local news teams have their work cut out for them. You can bet that between Trump, DeSantis, and Pence, there will be plenty of misinformation spread throughout the course of this election.
To ensure our reporters have the resources they need to debunk whatever bad information these candidates spew and deliver trustworthy, accessible news to voters ahead of this consequential election, **we’re counting on your help.**
[**Will you chip in whatever you can to help us reach our $4,000 goal and power our work to hold these presidential candidates accountable?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230606?refcode=em20230606&refcode2=1072_120351_DUpndS&akid=1072%2E120351%2EDUpndS)
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1072_120351_DUpndS&akid=1072%2E120351%2EDUpndS)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1072%2E120351%2EDUpndS)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Join us in June
body:
Peter, One of the most frequently asked questions we receive is: how can I become more involved in bringing common sense solu
|
---
| Peter, One of the most frequently asked questions we receive is: how can I become more involved in bringing common sense solutions to New Jersey and beyond? There are many good answers to this question, but our favorite one is simple: **_join us at one of our events._** **We have two important events on the horizon, happening on Tuesday, June 20th and Wednesday, June 28th.** Our first upcoming event is a Women's Luncheon happening on Tuesday, June 20th, 2023, at 12:30 PM at the Spring Brook Country Club in Morristown, New Jersey.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE AND SAVE YOUR SPOT NOW](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/ad98d79214a01a0f8dda395d0db16eb1/eJyNkFsLglAMgP_LnsVrEfomYiLewAofQ_RAh-x4OM3IxP_eutBTQbCHsX37xjYBMlELjFvw4Io323ZAA8UaLjkTGPQC6-bZtZcLy7E06Lg4RqofJHjT1-EP8Chb5srVAEfJCNmWfpDEebRP4zwhUtaKdvzlcU3nowkzP05hnn962YljeCH1GTxUA3sc1HI6CneqI_6AKD3DqKpKr4oszNdFGRRZVuSbkEKnnCS1lEy07wckbHyp5jvqh2Fn)
---
|
---
This gathering is far more than a Luncheon—it's a rallying point for those who recognize the pressing challenges our nation faces. The erosion of parental rights, the dilemma of our open borders, and the turmoil of our economy are just a few of the many problems we're facing that need immediate action. We are honored to have a distinguished panel of guest speakers, including Bill Spadea, Senator Holly Schepisi, Hon. Jacci Vigilante, and Hon. Lisa Richford.

a-Issue-Other-Pos&utm_agency=PG Hoosier Republican,

In this latest edition
of our session recap, we’re continuing to cut through the noise,
highlighting some of what was accomplished in the 2023 legislative
session.

Today, we’re sharing with you everything you need to know
about how Governor Eric Holcomb and statehouse Republicans took steps
to support healthier Hoosiers and a stronger Indiana.
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/healthlegislativerec
ap?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=INGOP_PG-e-health-and-wellbeing-l
egislative-recap-o01-20230531-a-Issue-Other-Pos_20230606&utm_medium=Emai
l&utm_content=PG-e-health-and-wellbeing-legislative-recap-o01-20230531-a
-Issue-Other-Pos&utm_agency=PG HELP US CONTINUE TO DELIVER RESULTS Life
expectancy in Indiana has declined in recent years, especially among
those that are vital to our future.

To reverse that trend, we passed
legislation this session to:

✅ Support counties that choose to opt
in to providing enhanced core public health services like lead
screening for children, preventing tobacco use, and maternal health
services through their local health departments.

✅ Expand and
bolster the 988 Crisis and Suicide Lifeline services and mobile crisis
stabilization teams.

✅ Assist the state in implementing the
Governor’s Challenge to prevent suicide among veterans, service
members, and their families.

✅ Address the mental health needs of
juveniles and other individuals in the justice system.

A healthy
Indiana is key to our state’s continued success.

And thanks to the
work of Governor Holcomb and our Republican-led legislature, we’re
well-positioned to ensure that success continues.

— Indiana GOP

name: Mark Warner
subject: It’s past time for ethics reform at SCOTUS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Can you help me change the course of the Supreme Court?

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64413470/409997914/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QzNmEyNi04MTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDmmTUnM0272xmQxUfqsvVd-YECzBrF_RNSxM7gB9vE=&emci=c366e133-b103-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1cd36a26-8104-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, **First** : We saw the troubling headline about Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas and how he accepted luxurious gifts and vacations from billionaire GOP donor Harlan Crow – who has personal interests before the Court. **Then** : More news concerning the two broke. It was revealed that Thomas sold his properties in Georgia to Crow and didn’t disclose the sale, even though it was required by law for him to do so. **Now** : I’m saying enough is enough. It’s high time Congress passed my judicial ethics legislation – The _Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal and Transparency (SCERT) Act_ to make sure our Supreme Court Justices are finally held to ethical guardrails. **_[Can you chip in $5 right now and stand with me in the fight for ethics reform?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64413471/409997915/-1883332928?refcode=mw_em_230606_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QzNmEyNi04MTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDmmTUnM0272xmQxUfqsvVd-YECzBrF_RNSxM7gB9vE=)_** Right now, there’s nothing stopping our Justices from accepting gifts and vacations from people who have business before the Court. _There’s not even a process to submit an ethics complaint._ My bill would change that. The _SCERT Act_ would finally implement accountability at the Supreme Court so we know what special interests – like Crow – are clearly lobbying before the Court. We would be able to hold our Justices responsible for troubling ethics violations like these that just seem to keep coming. I’m fighting to change the course of the Supreme Court, but I need your help. **_[So please, Derek, can you contribute anything you can afford so I can continue my work in the Senate to get us out of this ethical crisis and restore public trust in SCOTUS?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64413472/409997916/-1883332928?refcode=mw_em_230606_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QzNmEyNi04MTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDmmTUnM0272xmQxUfqsvVd-YECzBrF_RNSxM7gB9vE=)_** Thank you, Mark Warner ******[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64413473/409997917/-1883332928?refcode=mw_em_230606_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QzNmEyNi04MTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dDmmTUnM0272xmQxUfqsvVd-YECzBrF_RNSxM7gB9vE=)******

body:
He’s dead wrong.
#
Peter,
**Josh Hawley thinks corporations are people — but he’s dead wrong.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33676?refcode=em20230606-3226&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3226%2E614464%2EdMOa-H)

Citizens United is the GOP Super PAC that sued the FEC and forced them to give corporations even more power to buy off our politicians and influence our elections.
So when Josh Hawley celebrated their endorsement, he showed us exactly who he really is — just another corrupt politician willing to let massive corporations spend unlimited amounts of money to gut our communities and undermine our democracy.
**Lucas Kunce is building a movement to defeat Josh Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs so that when he’s in the U.S. Senate, you’ll always know he’s fighting for real working people** — not the giant corporations and corrupt elites that have spent decades tearing up our country. And that’s why we’re reaching out to you today, Peter.
Every day and every dollar between now and Election Day is an opportunity for us to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and continue exposing Josh Hawley for the fraud he is. But the only way we’ll be able to do that, AND fight back against the vicious attacks that are already coming from Hawley + the GOP insiders propping up his campaign, is with a flood of grassroots support from real people just like you. name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8%

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it's not just about a few hundred banks. It's about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! [See what it is here](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99105d0e46204fcd83c48f39cc990c68&_e=bdMmFVrRvhioa1JLvDsAOpbsJcTLqFkNlrQQ1RIYipt3SRbJ8nnen_sNORpZcN_HQ6Sh8fSL2VoBhtQaB-gxkRyR5M1_V331XjMOoasXNvNlR9YenxgCQ1dHTQzMy2A6BG6K5Gn4LmDXiukplX84x4z5bQBZS9I4fIW5NYrtAlXeUzpYbRJrmhseJ1HUEBmDV2wF9mWGrZqDmW7bwDDwINcVWOFYLiJ5f0gcNmWfYBZVGD_tpwz_4PC7hH7lWOYskBLDoFFQeN2BT98ljCFjDQ%3D%3D). Good luck and God bless! |

Birthdays are a HUGE deal in the Trump family.

body:
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=47f03f8c07c544b1a843ddd3d102c3bb&_t=aLj-yMfr6YwVaooKsQAXmBRulAHm-738IeiUtjSkseSsZ5cz_6UikNNdM1-_EU-zvGR7_sBTgX_RGDBu5reer0q4L8jMhCBwngf6vCH2D7w%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=47f03f8c07c544b1a843ddd3d102c3bb&_t=aLj-yMfr6YwVaooKsQAXmBRulAHm-738IeiUtjSkseSsZ5cz_6UikNNdM1-_EU-zvGR7_sBTgX_RGDBu5reer0q4L8jMhCBwngf6vCH2D7w%3D)

I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group. | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47f03f8c07c544b1a843ddd3d102c3bb&_e=C_LcW4BBtc7LeNFn_6hr8oRF5S2xFqZDwctD4E7F7RKE_rBgZuGbfw0bNFhp_vnaHpWuDiqVQz24BOXD8C3vW6_1jL2YhFfPzx8ptIxmi_YQMTP4SWVgVRnoA0fyt5UryT9ySufDc_aj6ziHZ5c3KgtcPpRg_1SvfTwmjgpqipKs5gfJ7toa3_4dKZGo_EMOZlPL5_NG9BW3HvwzlqSsZT-ePirltF4th7uuJvpMc6KCxHpVlKlhWSQiWtMIMsKbkarW86dN_IXfBOPsU_Q2L5oXE2V7ohpvHWj0TmKLxgN0vvtzb2i2Dpl5XMXkNei6)
---
| | **I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.** The group calls itself the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” And their motto is “go forth and sin some more.” **The “sisters” are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit and rainbow-colored “nun” clothing with one purpose: ** _To mock Christians. _ Then they perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as possible.
* A “condom savior mass”
* An annual “Jesus in drag” competition
* Pole dancing on a cross
* And much more.

_They even tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled the Eucharist._ **And the Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with their “Community Hero Award” during so-called “Pride month.”**
---
[FIGHT BACK](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47f03f8c07c544b1a843ddd3d102c3bb&_e=C_LcW4BBtc7LeNFn_6hr8oRF5S2xFqZDwctD4E7F7RKE_rBgZuGbfw0bNFhp_vnaHpWuDiqVQz24BOXD8C3vW6_1jL2YhFfPzx8ptIxmi_YQMTP4SWVgVRnoA0fyt5UryT9ySufDc_aj6ziHZ5c3KsRKChM8Rt_-FyKya-yzKYw3EBTmUPQUMDcftQIWXHIj9qcUgDHaF3N9XDwI_VUg2rMH0Jf0b2RFAfXa2CPvM5O2_kRjjHWbMikchfFnMAtlA498M3N84dU3WCCQV8FvDp7gmHxhX9Bx_bhyGy6-Y-sQ4lkkzL7R6mTp6WYbfu5J)
---
It’s vile. It’s disgusting. It’s a blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord. _And faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of hatred._ ** ****That’s why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear message:**** ****Any business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the consequences.**
---
[FLOOD THE AIRWAYS!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47f03f8c07c544b1a843ddd3d102c3bb&_e=C_LcW4BBtc7LeNFn_6hr8oRF5S2xFqZDwctD4E7F7RKE_rBgZuGbfw0bNFhp_vnaHpWuDiqVQz24BOXD8C3vW6_1jL2YhFfPzx8ptIxmi_YQMTP4SWVgVRnoA0fyt5UryT9ySufDc_aj6ziHZ5c3KuKkDAKBYPMNuR5de_5G1hLD63IhZRIGqFaIE0oCwZuCDjUAQDyAqI-KfDiFKHb4XMQ3fdzulMXJQEXsyulVf7L-nG7r-SP4vzJxhYi2_V2wENKh7arlYQh3o5VoYWVv3_knqeGoUrxZlZn9pCYmINcQbr1_38i2_01GwijC1Bso)
---
If you’ve been following the news closely, you may have read about CatholicVote’s campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this anti-Catholic group of fake “sisters” from their celebration. Thanks to our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls. _Within minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes._ The Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the “sisters.” A HUGE thank-you to everyone who made those calls! I’m incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action right away. **But unfortunately****Patriot,****the story doesn’t end there.** As soon as the Dodgers disinvited the “sisters,” the leftwing LGBT movement went crazy. Other gay and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers for daring to cross the LGBT agenda. **Then, the Dodgers**** _re-invited_****the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and decided to honor them with the baseball team’s “Community Hero Award.”** They also offered their “sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and families.” And they made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians – people like you and me. _The Christians who the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence” target with their hatred in the first place._ It’s shocking, but not surprising. Patriot, this is the state of American culture today. If anyone dares to call a “transgender” person by their biological name or pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations. **_But those same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians, hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior._**
---

name: Becca Balint
subject: Kicking off Pride with something personal:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
I knew I was gay at 11 years old.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64413971/409999879/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFjOTcxOS04MzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Evga4Q-R9crfz7zyIjJWZ3u6-wyd-TRGImGRAN40ODY=&emci=ad044e7d-5604-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=251c9719-8304-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Happy Pride Month, Peter! For as long as I can remember, there’s always been a special electricity in the air in June. While I’ve been out and proud for decades, I remember clearly what it was like to be a gay kid, fearful of being myself, without the support of my community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64413972/409999880/1802708735?refcode=E21632-20230602-PrideIntro-graphic-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFjOTcxOS04MzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Evga4Q-R9crfz7zyIjJWZ3u6-wyd-TRGImGRAN40ODY=) I’m amazed at how much things have changed over the course of my lifetime, but we all know that this Pride Month comes at an extremely challenging time for LGBTQ+ Americans. As we speak, there are nearly 500 pieces of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation moving through state legislatures across the country. These coordinated and cruel attacks have been particularly targeted at the freedom and dignity of transgender children, their ability to access gender-affirming care, participate in school sports, and be accepted into their communities. The experts are clear on what the impact of these bills will be: _Trans children have a higher risk of attempted suicide and other mental health challenges when they face bullying, rejection, or denial of health care. _ **Bills aimed at restricting the rights and dignity of trans children aren’t just bigoted and ill-informed – they’re dangerous, deranged, and extremely personal to me. ** I knew I was gay at 11 years old – and it was sometimes very lonely and scary. I know the feeling of having my very existence questioned, while laws and lawmakers were not on my side. I know anyone who has ever felt on _“the outside”_ can understand the feeling of not belonging and feeling vulnerable. You don’t have to be gay or trans to know that we need to stand up for our kids. **We can and we must – loudly and proudly – defend transgender youth who are being used as a rallying cry for hatred and bigotry by partisan extremists. LGBTQ+ children are counting on adults like you and me to stand up and fight for them. ** This Pride Month, I pledge to remember the struggles and bravery of our queer ancestors — trailblazers like Leslie Feinberg, Marsha P. Johnson, and Harvey Milk — and do everything in my power to honor their activism through continued action to protect the progress we’ve won in the fight for LGBTQ+ liberation, particularly for our transgender community. Happy Pride Month, Peter. Becca Balint **Becca Balint made history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ+ person to represent Vermont in Congress. A Member of the Equality Caucus, Becca has become a leading voice against anti-LGBTQ+ legislation in Washington and an outspoken advocate for transgender children.[This Pride Month, can you make a contribution to her campaign to make sure we have the resources needed to keep her fighting for us in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64413973/409999881/1802708735?refcode=E21632-20230602-PrideIntro-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFjOTcxOS04MzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Evga4Q-R9crfz7zyIjJWZ3u6-wyd-TRGImGRAN40ODY=)** | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64413974/409999882/1802708735?refcode=E21632-20230602-PrideIntro-SB-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFjOTcxOS04MzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Evga4Q-R9crfz7zyIjJWZ3u6-wyd-TRGImGRAN40ODY=)** |

* * *

clean_body: | = Team, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = But first, let me tell you why I’m reaching out. I’ve known Elissa for quite some time now. In 2018, we both ran for Congress in historically-Republican seats. When folks counted us out, Elissa and I kept the faith. We rolled up our sleeves, knocked on every door we could, and turned out voters. In the end, we beat our well-funded opponents and flipped our seats — and the House majority — blue. We’ve worked hand-in-hand to deliver for hardworking families ever since. Elissa is the true definition of a public servant. From working to reform our broken campaign finance system to strengthening our democracy, Elissa has been at the forefront of some of our toughest fights. Now, Elissa is running for U.S. Senate in Michigan and I couldn’t be more excited to be a Day One supporter! name: Nikki Haley
subject: A correction for CNN
body:
I spent an hour and a half talking directly with the American people and sharing the truth about our country and my plan to save it.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

_Did the CNN panel watch the same town hall as the rest of America? _

I spent an hour and a half talking directly with the American people and sharing the truth about our country and my plan to save it.

**As soon as the town hall ended, right on cue, CNN 's liberal panel ignored what I said in order to share their planned talking points attacking me. **

**[Will you make a contribution of $20.24, $47, or more right now to help me cut through the media's lies and get my message out to every American?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdli96jrhcuip4od40oo443rcagj3qpjejshhqko_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ge8or6c9h2bs "Will you make a contribution of $20.24, $47, or more right now to help me cut through the media’s lies and get my message out to every American? ")**

Before I even took the stage, Democratic mouthpiece, Bakari Sellers, was armed with liberal talking points. First, he accused me of not having any real policy stances...

_... I'm guessing he didn't read the policies I've put out on spending, reforming Washington, veterans care, securing the border, immigration, abortion, foreign aid, Ukraine, China, and education? _

Then, after the town hall was over, he called me a _white governor_!

Friend, I'm the proud daughter of Indian immigrants who came to America legally. I was the first minority and first female governor of South Carolina! It's clear: The liberal media isn't interested in having policy discussions. If you don't embrace their radical, identity-driven politics, then they dismiss everything you say.

We need to move beyond the stale policies AND politics of the past.

I'm running for president because we have a country to save. My parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. _**I want them to know that America again.**_

I'm doing this as a military spouse because I want my husband and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice meant something - that we do love this country. I'm doing this for my daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to own a home. I'm doing this for my son who's in college and writing papers he doesn't believe in just to get an A. That's not us. That's not America.

78% of Americans have said they don't think that their children will live as good of a life as them. We can't have that. I'm not going to have that.

We've got a country to save! That's why we need a new generation of leadership. We've got to go fix this country and go back to the values that made us great.

And when we do that - when we really focus back on faith, family, and country, and the idea that America is the best country in the world, that's when our best days are to come.

Since the liberal media won't share this message, I need your help to make sure this message gets out.

**[That's why I'm asking you for a generous donation of $20.24, $47, or more.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z910hi2kpioain86ki5m24jec8qrvj8k9td674qg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ge8or6c9h2bs "That’s why I’m asking you for a generous donation of $20.24, $47, or more.")** Your support will go directly to my effort to reach every American with my message so we can win the White House in 2024 and get our country back on track.

**[If you have more to give - say $50, $100, even $500 or more, I am humbly asking you to step up.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuqrsk9p76eh2qc2rbt1fgfold16nooefgf8k0i0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ge8or6c9h2bs "If you have more to give - say $50, $100, even $500 or more, I am humbly asking you to step up. ")**

**[The liberal media spreads lies. I need your help to spread the truth about my message with every American. So will you please step up today with a donation of any amount?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7u47ogfg66alf6c8jvrc6aikbljn8dnn320aju8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ge8or6c9h2bs "The liberal media spreads lies. I need your help to spread the truth about my message with every American. So will you please step up today with a donation of any amount? ")**

---
My very best,

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziulu81unedn7litpp5h8sgsscv2tp3grf68ibr0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ge8or6c9h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley

---

body:
Texas Governor Greg Abbott has let communities in Texas down

| **Breaking News from _The Guardian_ : Winnie-the-Pooh book teaches Texas kids to ‘run, hide, fight’ in a shooting** As states like Texas continue to see waves of mass shootings, Texas Governor Greg Abbott has let communities in Texas down:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64414988/410003507/2040588333?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230606-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBiNmRjMzctODQwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t2upuzKsOA-ZPe169Z340NnFc1QmSv3u4d_vLfk6LKw=)
**And now, Greg Abbott’s solution?** He is sending children home with books to teach them how to ‘run, hide, fight’ in a school shooting.

_We can’t believe this, Peter!_

**Instead of taking meaningful action following mass shootings, Gov. Abbott thinks a children’s book is going to save elementary students from an AR-15** _**– RIDICULOUS!**_

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znda7gf3alqshbnblb4ct42k2b4l0o91boct0418_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ge8or2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zao6ijvguk3o459jmomrlvoks3upftgdb7c80ru0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ge8or2cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za3bmv0c9184da0ptcs1pdp3drfok6fd6s523mno_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ge8or2cth2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---

clean_body: help me keep up this incredible momentum | | | We're making incredible strides in our race to defeat Ted Cruz, and now, friend, I am personally asking for your support to help us keep up this incredible momentum. = | | = Since we launched this campaign one month ago, the Cook Political Report and Roll Call both upgraded our chances of winning. FiveThirtyEight now says Texas could be Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue. And a brand new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided. This is a testament to the powerful grassroots movement we're building, friend, and I'm so thrilled that you're a part of it. But the more national attention this race gets, the more wealthy Republicans will be lining up to fill Ted Cruz's war chest.I'm counting on your immediate support to help me keep up our momentum from now until Election Day. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Colin Allred and Maggie Hassan: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Colin | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. clean_body: I explain why we have no choice but to beat Joe Biden and the Democrats in 2024... | Friend, I went on Fox News recently to explain why it is absolutely essential that Republicans take back the White House in 2024. Wisconsin will be the #1 target of National Democrats in 2024. That’s why I am working with conservatives from across the state to prepare now. My goal is to help turn Wisconsin RED. In 2024, the future of our country will be decided in Wisconsin – we need to be ready for the moment. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

body:
I am counting on you to help me get a winner in the White House
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=79837a2e98a64fbaafa75bdd82474522&_e=BYuMVa3h_VHxSyXL-4H6g8lOozOK2YiwxdDv3YcCmzJzC4ihCpZewvszx8XnQ4Ve2MZf9hitkbn96639WSYzPkrVMCAbHfelpvooQUXE9ctK7db5VwgCjWStwCsz1xaNk4v71itTJ6kimTdkMmOTNXUMRlPMGqSoC6FT253hpZOUJ5NeOPIQcvIqRnpmq5u6v_e9Oq_StqSsxIhnSA-8XDPj24N3OeZZQ7nwmtoBMmQAEZa_wElXrFqeqEnc5CBqqDNCNvHR3W93akufzU7rvNxFGiyGM1mYwy37pWEVXboPKZfxrn0eBsz-tw0xXzWbz2FKVpbmHEOtFp-4W6NwVhSlHwPcoAVL2_J5gwy6PrrrT_MMJOkVkdmTa_HabHvcepk1zSksSckH64NpKa_wJV4pXHFQwoHvcK0qAERgjs6Em1mbsz--MpFgvZ40DlVB)
---
Friend, ** I am so excited to endorse Ron DeSantis for President! **
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=79837a2e98a64fbaafa75bdd82474522&_e=BYuMVa3h_VHxSyXL-4H6g8lOozOK2YiwxdDv3YcCmzJzC4ihCpZewvszx8XnQ4Ve2MZf9hitkbn96639WSYzPkrVMCAbHfelpvooQUXE9ctK7db5VwgCjWStwCsz1xaNk4v71itTJ6kimTdkMmOTNXUMRlPMGqSoC6FT253hpZOUJ5NeOPIQcvIqRnpmq5u6v_e9Oq_StqSsxIhnSA-8XDPj24N3OeZZQ7nwmtoBMmQAEZa_wElXrFqeqEnc5CBqqDNCNvHR3W93akufzU7rvNxFGiyGM1mYwy37pWEVXboDWcMl5I7zuH2PFEviwVkWpdVcC7AT7rgEcCo8Ri250iSyQ-Neh0AUI3JLerQhtnuzXXggbvEwMBLxqfJ74Ffl5h_2EaYb4AITLW2bZ-UzVfFNAs6oHtJtJ_J-zKH1ojPf9NUg4jZwu_IBQb0DPVPw)
---
I first became active in politics because of the assault on women's sports and women's spaces. As a D1 swimmer for the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against biological males, and even share locker rooms with men, I felt like our elected leaders had abandoned us -- until Governor Ron DeSantis.
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=79837a2e98a64fbaafa75bdd82474522&_e=BYuMVa3h_VHxSyXL-4H6g8lOozOK2YiwxdDv3YcCmzJzC4ihCpZewvszx8XnQ4Ve2MZf9hitkbn96639WSYzPkrVMCAbHfelpvooQUXE9ctK7db5VwgCjWStwCsz1xaNk4v71itTJ6kimTdkMmOTNXUMRlPMGqSoC6FT253hpZOUJ5NeOPIQcvIqRnpmq5u6v_e9Oq_StqSsxIhnSA-8XDPj24N3OeZZQ7nwmtoBMmQAEZa_wElXrFqeqEnc5CBqqDNCNvHR3W93akufzU7rvNxFGiyGM1mYwy37pWEVXbrrF_RlX04gbiZBfWu4DeG5vfveEqgY6DnNUocCDNi0o4YnZ4KyLsPMdfjJDG3OuySjR65tYoyLuNAbCwfWcQDAKN_exl-_jzhW6OGo_ljVAFXx127RPPlrTeXlpTC7kW7LBtrGjAtr6GiBxh9XuznW)
---
Governor DeSantis shined a spotlight on the cruelty girls and women were being subjected to, and even went as far as to reinstate victories of women who had lost titles and sacrificed their athletic careers because of these men competing in our leagues... and for that, he was ripped apart in the media. But Governor DeSantis did NOT back down.

I want someone like that in the White House -- someone who will fight for us. Governor Ron DeSantis' record is simply second to none. That's just who the Governor is. He's taken on the political establishment, woke corporations, and legacy media -- and he's won.

There's only one candidate in this race who has truly walked the walk rather than just offered soundbites on these issues -- and that's Governor Ron DeSantis. It's an easy choice.

In a moment when everything in our culture feels like it's upside down, that's the kind of strength we need in the White House to put us back on the right track.

In America today, sanity is in short supply, and common sense has become an uncommon virtue -- but Governor Ron DeSantis has proven with his leadership that he can put an end to these woke Olympics, and I can't wait.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).

clean_body: I am counting on you to help me get a winner in the White House | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I am so excited to endorse Ron DeSantis for President! | I first became active in politics because of the assault on women's sports and women's spaces. As a D1 swimmer for the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against biological males, and even share locker rooms with men, I felt like our elected leaders had abandoned us -- until Governor Ron DeSantis. | Governor DeSantis shined a spotlight on the cruelty girls and women were being subjected to, and even went as far as to reinstate victories of women who had lost titles and sacrificed their athletic careers because of these men competing in our leagues... and for that, he was ripped apart in the media. But Governor DeSantis did NOT back down. I want someone like that in the White House -- someone who will fight for us. Governor Ron DeSantis' record is simply second to none. That's just who the Governor is. He's taken on the political establishment, woke corporations, and legacy media -- and he's won. There's only one candidate in this race who has truly walked the walk rather than just offered soundbites on these issues -- and that's Governor Ron DeSantis. It's an easy choice. In a moment when everything in our culture feels like it's upside down, that's the kind of strength we need in the White House to put us back on the right track. In America today, sanity is in short supply, and common sense has become an uncommon virtue -- but Governor Ron DeSantis has proven with his leadership that he can put an end to these woke Olympics, and I can't wait. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Governor DeSantis is changing our nation for the better. name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America to help reach my ambitious goal? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

name: Rebeca Puentes, EMILYs List
subject: I'll keep this short, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | This is a maternal health crisis. Period. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64415601/410005924/-1524463920?sourceid=1050154&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ2YjA1MS04NTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygPp1drzctR8DKB2Nb6TfD6HDKTtAUuHyc-SSOmI2g0=&emci=ef3e8b4b-8504-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=31d6b051-8504-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) I'll keep this short, Peter: we're facing a maternal health crisis in some of the most vulnerable parts of this country.

Understaffed labor and delivery units are shutting down all across the country — particularly in states with abortion restrictions. Doctors are leaving, or considering leaving, these states because they can no longer legally provide their patients with the care they need. And medical students are increasingly unwilling to apply to residency programs in anti-choice states.

The result? More than **2.2 million women** (and counting) are living in "maternity care deserts," or areas with no obstetric care. **Republican politicians are making it harder and more dangerous for people in this country to start families, all while claiming their anti-choice policies are meant to "protect" their constituents.**

This is just one of the many devastating impacts of abortion restriction in the wake of last year's _Dobbs_ decision. We need to elect more Democratic pro-choice women, starting at the state and local level, who will fight for our right to decide when, if, and how we have children. **Are you ready for the fight, Peter? Donate now to help support pro-choice champions running for office at every level of government, all across the country:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-June](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64415608/410005935/-1524463920?sourceid=1050154&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ2YjA1MS04NTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ygPp1drzctR8DKB2Nb6TfD6HDKTtAUuHyc-SSOmI2g0=&emci=ef3e8b4b-8504-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=31d6b051-8504-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you,

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Maybe I’m teaching fish to swim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
Maybe I didn’t read the room

| |
---
| | | **THE 1ST ANNUAL SPEAKER'S SURVEY
JUNE 2023**
---

Patriot,

I thought I’d see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker’s Survey, but it hasn’t happened.

This input is desperately needed to shape the party’s strategy for this MUST-WIN election. Joe Biden and the liberal media hate that we are so closely involved with our grassroots base. This survey is the type of thing that gives him nightmares.

You don’t have to write anything fancy, just tell me what matters to you.

So, I’m inviting you one LAST time today.

---
| **OFFICIAL INVITATION**

**Will you participate in my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey?

DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT
GOP PARTY ID: 01891

Please, I’m hoping we can rely on your expertise sooner rather than later.

-Speaker McCarthy

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we hoped we could count on you to step up and help us fund our last major GOTV push in these final days. Can you chip in with a $20 or more donation right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_6.6.2023_LA_all&amount=20]

Can you rush a donation to our GOTV fund today to ensure our program runs smoothly? Early voting is underway, so we have no time to spare! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_6.6.2023_LA_all&amount=20]
Thank you again for stepping up,
-Team Lashrecse

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: The scary prospects of Artificial Intelligence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64415906/410007014/623074613?code=jtk1337-su-nd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmNWM2YmYtODYwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jo8S0LJYfsWJ_V-ZPRHKr8CvPK6yU7teNm1dM24DP5E=&emci=5b6c38d0-8204-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=95f5c6bf-8604-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend,

The rapid rise of Artificial Intelligence (also known as AI) has put us on the verge of a new era.

As its own creators are stating publicly with real concern, if AI is not properly regulated, it poses great risks to our society. It is imperative that we demystify these new technologies and put safeguards in place to protect all of us from the very real potential for dangerous abuse.

That’s why I recently held a subcommittee hearing focused on this very topic and joined MSNBC’s Morning Joe to discuss the scary prospects posed by AI.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64415907/410007015/1015570759?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1337-su-nd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmNWM2YmYtODYwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jo8S0LJYfsWJ_V-ZPRHKr8CvPK6yU7teNm1dM24DP5E=&emci=5b6c38d0-8204-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=95f5c6bf-8604-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)
Technologies that would have been the stuff of science fiction in the past are now becoming reality. To help demonstrate that point, I did something that had never been done before in a United States Senate hearing: I had AI voice cloning software deliver part of my opening remarks.

And alarmingly, if you closed your eyes, you couldn’t have told that you were listening to a voice clone of me – a voice clone playing remarks that were actually written by an AI technology known as ChatGPT. It was eerie – even creepy. And it was a powerful demonstration of how easy it is for AI technologies both to pose as real people and to present information that may, or may not, be truthful.

Hundreds of experts in the field of Artificial Intelligence have issued a forceful warning that unchecked AI technologies could pose existential risks to humanity, writing in a new open letter: “Mitigating the risk of extinction from AI should be a global priority alongside other societal-scale risks such as pandemics and nuclear war.”

Our elections are at risk. Millions of jobs are at risk. The very notion of what’s true is at risk. Humanity’s safety is at risk. We need to know how these black boxes of AI work, and we need to discuss and define limitations on use.
That’s why I’m leading the charge to put safeguards in place on AI – and I hope you will join me in that effort. **If you’re with me, I’m asking you to speak out and demand accountability. I’m hoping for 500 responses to our new poll before midnight tonight:**
**Should we create rules and regulations on AI to protect jobs and prevent the spread of disinformation?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64415908/410007016/1015570759?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1337-su-nd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmNWM2YmYtODYwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jo8S0LJYfsWJ_V-ZPRHKr8CvPK6yU7teNm1dM24DP5E=&emci=5b6c38d0-8204-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=95f5c6bf-8604-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64415909/410007017/1015570759?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1337-su-nd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVmNWM2YmYtODYwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jo8S0LJYfsWJ_V-ZPRHKr8CvPK6yU7teNm1dM24DP5E=&emci=5b6c38d0-8204-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=95f5c6bf-8604-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9329426)
---
Thank you,

Dick
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/p3FPDNcG3USxiOP5q9s2qQ2?unsubscribedata=TZh0XzfEPUhZLPHtEAel665kNIbwkmVmKl3S8r39bdOFOg0bflzLKYn09JrqAJ%2F0HAZqo6csCAu8Y6dPiZgp4MBLo3AT6xLjUZ9tixowWcVMfhm%2Fh5GrJ9cfdtKURAA2%2BWY4qkCE2FB41NZ%2BdCWiJ%2BxyJOwB5GZfUfF%2BHVmq2Da5aVdDNFjQZAcOsYQj3U68i%2B%2FYCAlzkuLS0BP8ZfdQJeRet7%2FWGy5BgW2lqkbgaqvDUVeAq1dNdVB0aHa7ltvQg1yzKdHAcripJD6x9rKLjnYsRryxRjr165lf2rLnO0rQ3O6BSl0F5tH%2B1%2Blc8VSXfhgIBZ43aA8n7iRfj%2FmGUMS5tfOojssrezjsDo7zR7I%2FBlv2AKRV4GL2RMgPKLivVijazmGQP%2Fnowo34hwd7ZjdTapy0N%2BHrtLgk0D%2BALv6kPOSn09mW2AN56CUIrpt0) | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign Now: Stop the illegitimate Supreme Court from undermining our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Supreme Court accountability: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv3gBe2JwKLxkOni7UbBiU_kj1FYTA-dbQq3eJ1mKzIpRFD0yv_-CqkZ8tsPDhdvC7t5WFsb_gHUcfsTQeYH3zfWlzWPiutACP4_Glj6Ao6cd2DBvzsu71tohYETJADgGCQOSuzMuDsXzfJunBqki_PzVDmklFNW834NW-bp3f7Wx23vR0A3Oy8dzU1kxHv37U6Nm3SVtImbqKFXFoMCtEYFZv5RQdWqp_MwvUO78waeawi0_vfq1rqQejk08wctW0i0z-n0VjawxsAZjLJtXLPA/3wt/6x36oMeOTVeN6f7A43utWA/h0/MfcQ4f4tguCL4sfhb85yo8D8zm9F0hDvS2yZdj1V-A8)
---
Friend, The American people deserve a Supreme Court we can trust to be fair and uphold justice for all. **But the illegitimate, corrupt, far-right majority on the Supreme Court continues to target our rights and undermine our democracy.** This month, we expect court rulings on issues ranging from Indigenous rights and sovereignty to the very future of our democracy―both of which are under attack. **Remember, in 2016 and 2020 Mitch McConnell stole two Supreme Court seats** ―first blocking hearings on President Obama’s nominee Merrick Garland, claiming in an election year that voters should decide, then breaking his own made up rule four years later, confirming a Trump nominee just days before the 2020 presidential election. **But, there’s something we can do about it.** **Nowhere in our Constitution does it state the number of justices who should sit on the bench.** And, in fact, Congress has both shrunk and expanded the court multiple times over the years, going as high as 10 justices at one point. Right now, the Supreme Court is in the midst of disturbing ethics scandals involving Justices Thomas, Roberts, and Gorsuch. **The American people deserve a court that represents our values of justice and equity, not a court stolen by the right-wing, ripe with conflicts of interest.** [**Please sign on in support of expanding the Supreme Court and stop the illegitimate Supreme Court from undermining our democracy and our rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mZMPCgbTJ5L3ELiSWTukCSy-XFVIO-YsWhmSVpKAPO2CeMNP0GYAw4XG_6eNVvn4VcxTmoH2I1M_quLXQwUBilENR2fUjZgw4QaxINATSP1QAdr68LUbk_7Twy0j-Qu0NBzhKm2qDZ0hjygG5l4YC51S89X_rXo03LrTNbs5bZmZpuNEhc-AmN5UWk0UzrQwh6Gvqo5ya2ZFcPMw2fI_kAzLFamyY2G6VSQ2C7Kdx6FOD7vZvMfZx8osIrgz0t9SYAGl_FiabU4v7ra9VYE5iuIo7RD5Z1ym9oElBZ6p8jgjoXphiXiMK3LPqshMMCw6Cu4OHfbrC0zlCdWiS6bzIuXNt1YmRBD7i4L4uqp-3496ss4LIF2RQOPMbDYmEsm1YEA-YXl7NsqkLF3Ua90InsudOQPlMjdhxDNbJryOdPzQPAiGU_sbZiFNic71Nk1Ep3i-COjlp3rJfjqsKW7V30QsplDnLMPpntoeFUTRs_oWyi2q1Jfwb0oEOobb-iWISQ-vz5wjbBlcbPAM8RSiWGQ/3wt/6x36oMeOTVeN6f7A43utWA/h1/qM8Ezhu1CFKxOUjM9SxtpWnQ9sTb9XWrALL7MyZfRa0) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mZMPCgbTJ5L3ELiSWTukCSy-XFVIO-YsWhmSVpKAPO2CeMNP0GYAw4XG_6eNVvn4VcxTmoH2I1M_quLXQwUBilENR2fUjZgw4QaxINATSP1QAdr68LUbk_7Twy0j-Qu0NBzhKm2qDZ0hjygG5l4YC51S89X_rXo03LrTNbs5bZmZpuNEhc-AmN5UWk0UzrQwh6Gvqo5ya2ZFcPMw2fI_kAzLFamyY2G6VSQ2C7Kdx6FOD7vZvMfZx8osIrgz0t9SYknEicdanG99BIJctk6KvabzLY2AsDDXjP1BNf2gL313A6S7z95L_wKLD9pZpOwSNBnQoqwOQJLLvJ5oHzrc95GSjvk3fgMOl-IVXOfSrq271wmOjpuveGpJNxNOqIopYXGdbb9Zm2h6XHpEOS-hWOII4c04KOo9CkGWwLGKoETSjJ2dPYHXYtp8OVPyxRvlb-5i5nkfLvSf3-j94EOQkNLXo-Pikde6LaM0zJcYFDdO2H2AROHzujMhbG6SnhMxefaOOBH2H-l4ZEY0Sh921yw/3wt/6x36oMeOTVeN6f7A43utWA/h2/Lofyt_PXplD4pQt3dFMdd1CdJFjlxzGSE5fsIkKCYz0)

| Dear Peter,

I'm excited to invite you to my birthday party! I would be honored to celebrate with you. We will gather for a beautiful backyard party in San Mateo starting at 5pm on [Saturday, June 24th.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=15371fae93&e=292fde286a)

I'm excited to take a quick break back home this month and hope we can all gather in celebration on the 24th. Your presence and support would mean the world to me. [RSVP here!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=82000030d4&e=292fde286a)

Thank you for your continued support. Help me make this birthday a memorable one!

Sincerely,
Congressman Kevin Mullin

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: What I saw in Michigan…
body:
The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) recently visited schools in Michigan.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfqmm1gptjkk7kvoeds0fmicbjn4jg2npjtlgueo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)

Friend,

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) recently visited schools in Michigan. -- and do you know what we found?

A majority of kids are eager for REAL education in schools. They are hungry for the truth. They want solutions for the problems that impact their peers. But they don't have anyone to give them direction.

**That 's why FEE is teaching students how to create the change they want to see and empowering them to take action.**

Through FEE's Revolution of One initiative, we teach students that entrepreneurship and limited government can radically improve their lives and communities.

At Revolution of One workshops, students engage with entrepreneurs, artists, and influencers who bring a rich background of expertise to the classroom while demonstrating that voluntary economic opportunity and fewer barriers to entry are the keys to prosperity.

I want to reach more students with this exciting program. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of the week to support FEE's Revolution of One. [Will you empower the next generation by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or even 100 today? Click here >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbtm567897lm0oaneinu2ict3rh6hs9jutbgf2qg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)

Tunji Adebayo at FEE was invited to talk about economic empowerment for six schools in Michigan.

You'd be surprised how just one speaker can influence the next generation. Just look at how many students Tunji reached during his tour.

Davis Jr. High School - 465 students
Heritage Jr. High School - 429 students
Jeannette Jr. High School - 533 students
Eppler Jr. High School - 578 students
Malow Jr. High School - 1,050 students
Federal Reserve - 150 students

**Tunji connected deeply with 3,205 students about how free markets and individual liberty lift society out of poverty! That 's a massive impact in just one state.**

And here's what one of the teachers at Eppler Jr. High School had to say,
_" Thank you so very much for being with us at Eppler yesterday! We are so very grateful to you for sharing your message with our students! It was very well received. As I talked to our students through the day, they all said it was "fun," "great," and "cool." But **one young man summed it up by saying, "Mr. P., that man has me really thinking!" Isn't that what we truly want?!** We'd love to have you visit again next year!"_
[Just one donation](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfhv3ins0ievdje715pp6mi32ncp96dl3gm3oe30_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs) can change the lives of so many young Americans, as proven above.

[Your generous gift helps FEE inspire a love of liberty in the hearts and minds of students across the country. Please consider donating today >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zurm07ivfnidr3546c0gbungo4kpqn9keeaadn00_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)

Will you join me as we empower the next generation to embrace the ideas of liberty? **Click below to send your urgent support.**
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zinsukem02d56qlsk04dhpemr203t1bi970j5cug_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcki285pibqod5935t071jr47djuu7187h3b380o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjg16q3l4e7rb3ob7m8r9mt5efba2tod9h5rdgvg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi5uabg8kv9s17sduc59uoqajq5n18a1o6ljo32g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp5einbflukito5hgrlebrluvnep3hfav7eubh80_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi0aljvuaed6o96sbk98b9eba3jncmk9nrajl8rg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zobl1m88mlsg5ua3nu46upfq02tfd22beebui7lo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zabbcbikiqiq2np90to3f03o81rf79q2uq3lsfv0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1gecob2c1h2bs)
Thank you,

Lawrence Reed

subject: The American Dream is still alive.

body:
If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_t=6JVUQbfXW-Yq9obR9LNen4CZMmcvfCUvtDJZeKSEgUmjZr8y9OKOGnr6DrO_PRAuaXl0c8_k7zf-QhcWOnV4y6VA39YjAYbw2n_CGY1zqBk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_t=6JVUQbfXW-Yq9obR9LNen4CZMmcvfCUvtDJZeKSEgUmjZr8y9OKOGnr6DrO_PRAuaXl0c8_k7zf-QhcWOnV4y6VA39YjAYbw2n_CGY1zqBk%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96DdlUWxrsfOSfONH1wXSXYqWpo41EKcbTxJoq5ivZ3WSJm3kzlRqkPGyj1FfxwwyypDvIYN8kmMD8znAxAh-Uu8dD67SFjE00DcnRUOahj1ilUcS0W1YRNS4nALolk88jRkIoMRoBhRA4sZo9-f53Yw%3D%3D)
Is the America you see today, Fellow American, the America you envisioned?

Is this the end of faith, patriotism, hard work, and ideals that this great nation was founded on?

_Not if I have anything to say about it._ I am on a mission to save the country that allowed me to achieve the American Dream. I was born and raised in Cincinnati, Ohio, to immigrant parents who came to this country the right way, legally, and with little money. Through hard work, I graduated from Harvard and then earned my JD from Yale Law. I went on to build multi-billion dollar businesses, which created jobs and developed lifesaving medicines. **[Now, I am running for President of the United States.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96Ot2Q82Sgmo0fnKD5fY8VIBkh_oEnMJQhk6UgaL1kM0lAQLMb2WkZE9LXi_rTHs_jnMX1llnJ-abBjx1D-06j9b-fVcS4RRxq9v7HFOtkXHRvq_LRLL9k2YZ-bz_XRwOaDESTfiYe4GsqzPANeWTZQw%3D%3D)**

The American Dream is still alive. We can still save it. Neighbor to neighbor, ally to ally, and patriot to patriot. **We need to act now.**

**And that's why I am running for President of the United States.**

The past three years under Joe Biden and the liberal left have been a disaster. The left has driven their agenda based on divisive politics, aggressive degradation of our culture, and lack of responsibility for future generations. In response we must:

| [** RESTORE BELIEF IN MERIT **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96WZjS3SGKLf_WMEIXHgRISIegi_HqjWUBA-DlyvLUDdlTOkW4B9DFeAFrWshO51PzrmhjfZOvGkdMtmLs527FkIZiffXbqQrI4m03tS9zQeq2L3FLMvt0-IIeJEauu9K9lKayIaJ4HChyedYcMPHVNg%3D%3D)
---

[** RESTORE BELIEF IN ACCOUNTABILITY **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96ApMP-17JbHvnXVuyWpIlxd0qDIbFr3hBWTgvB5kJXohCvBHu28iGn8c_7GHpnS995Xnd9trNjVin1snIiUFLzqymGyV8cBNWM28Vkn1ISRO4gced0uEbpWyJiTjBbI7Iay7cSTuvnrTX2cxGAYJ0YA%3D%3D)
---

[** RESTORE FREE SPEECH **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR964i6LhiabPSbDD3FhO8Zl6HvRwBPHWFMtg1Z8hzWndY-5ipjKX9R54JS5TxQ2URkB09CzGNSFUGUEyRpif5n6uEqWOIPoGzD4Rt7qk9y7Ap0oYY53y09GxDvjXAiWSudFlP-5RH3bH98z1dQqFqcJcw%3D%3D)
---

[** RESTORE AMERICAN EXCEPTIONALISM **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96WChz9gIMJMwUdzx6rC62RmKw91IMMY1BeZ8pKpLGQWRF3dpbE7jFk1bL4VEBE9Ojw1opb8KtXsYE4DU3x3IfDwNgSQZmpWnV1RpGO2TevAhggw2ZoNmxz3d3va6-GpJP9NDXzThNcFIK4Z4Nav50iQ%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American, if these ideals resonate with you, you're an American patriot. We're ready to fight for the future of America - because if we don't, we may truly lose our identity. If we can unite through the radicalism of the ideals that bound us together 250 years ago, the Dream for this country isn't over.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I continue my presidential campaign.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96vo7LwmohOHYhCRsoRVaz4BYZyR0e2jDR0OYq9EmDkbx7mAcXsYZamgaEGIWfbq-GBRv1--L2_Asbd4lvl-OkfdMQqwRRu2G9aDjZVDE1n5TJ0UxpT8xWoJ0CG8GIly2gWrnwNe803D0nZn4SHCJZwQ%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, it's time to stand up to the ruling party in America. Obsessing over race and group identity will divide us. We are Americans and the ideals that founded this country 250 years ago, still exist today. Your voice deserves to be heard. My presidential campaign is designed to elevate you, not the federal bureaucracies that would otherwise silence you. **[Join me in fighting for and taking back the American Dream.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96l3x1Ognn0-_V060FmCLyvk8AjKl7u1yzsnqFywwwH1ny56btZNMmiBwv9GQKlp8FnYC8pLkS4UxU5MjkjayrZ-0_PxTwOLjme2pvU1v2-oijwUWfWrR_XTuEbT2TmC-h96NCAth6_3ZvHPmQwy4poA%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96vdS6pZFxfZ0eM67H6q3SH97gHQK7r-LDtxzqdgKiCW3SyoQfDaeuqDhB_6bx0qkyupfqOfXNv-Yu6kVHGhDsWlno7RGrhiGMfH2RCK_x6SMRRXuo8SqGgMF880jqk_YtSK1dc4TcAby0p_vywfsBnw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b37b9e66a1d04320b7cb4e956f441568&_e=XDmOPU1ojMLNBIji6PW8Z008QIwTx_qcigXaC0J6V9pyW2Ek0u2n4E67S7MKQVt5ouyMc5UVXYTOdWd1UN2YAeb2gzE4LlDy93qReRTtZStn9-2yi4RNEtX8n1bO6bm5nLGpp5mI2-pkNf6BDM6iO7xhq-HrjV-46vG4s6kD9Ntf1ECh9BJCTukZJ-qeUyfUjqO-mO4MpixS_5jOYSN0jow4jcJ8mzawlCx3L9fAGf_RR1cbQjOZFBNSzhtUuR96FSq1sNxo-7Z8ls0kyyrMQLMqaIsFJkxuTf7cKO0awHJo5BGu6YpplDQ8HctDEUqi9Npg7Zqu2Yr8Ix8u12tDOi1J5q7kTwj-YKL-56X6rlDd9bqh_FO-9hsiJiSYJ_8vtX2HhffzizGgdcUaM0-eAQ%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Is this the end of faith, patriotism, hard work, and ideals that this great nation was founded on? Not if I have anything to say about it. I am on a mission to save the country that allowed me to achieve the American Dream. I was born and raised in Cincinnati, Ohio, to immigrant parents who came to this country the right way, legally, and with little money. Through hard work, I graduated from Harvard and then earned my JD from Yale Law. I went on to build multi-billion dollar businesses, which created jobs and developed lifesaving medicines. The American Dream is still alive. We can still save it. Neighbor to neighbor, ally to ally, and patriot to patriot. We need to act now. And that's why I am running for President of the United States. The past three years under Joe Biden and the liberal left have been a disaster. The left has driven their agenda based on divisive politics, aggressive degradation of our culture, and lack of responsibility for future generations. We are Americans and the ideals that founded this country 250 years ago, still exist today. Your voice deserves to be heard. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA June 6: Say thanks and stop Biden’s targeting
body:
| | |
---
Last week, Kevin McCarthy and Joe Biden came up with a sham deal to borrow trillions of dollars in new debt to keep the U.S. Government afloat – and a lot of Republicans went along with it.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._0eY7Jxdw)
---
## **Thank Conservatives Who Opposed the Debt Ceiling Disaster**
---
While we are extremely disappointed that the debt ceiling bill passed, we are grateful to every patriot who contacted their legislators and took a stand. **We are exceptionally grateful to the 28 House Republicans who voted no on a procedural vote that occurred just before the vote on the bill _and_ voted no on the bill itself.** This was important, because once the rule passed, there was virtually no way to stop the bill. These 28 courageous Republicans stood against tremendous pressure from Republican leadership to vote yes in both instances. For the 42 Republicans in the House voted yes on the rule and then voted no on the bill, we are thankful they voted no on the bill, and want them to know that. However, we also want them to know that we are aware and disappointed that they did not vote no on the rule, as once the rule passed, the bill was virtually assured passage. In the Senate, 31 Republicans courageously bucked their leadership and voted against the debt deal. Please use the links below to send targeted messages to these three groups of elected officials, with just a few clicks.
* **[Send an email](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to the 28 House Republicans who voted no on the bill _and_ voted no on the rule.**
* **[Send an email](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNTctNWRhYmY5ZjI4NTMyNGE3OThlNzgxMzA1NTY5ZDU5NmYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRoZXBhdHJpb3RjZW50ZXIub3JnL2RlYnQtY2VpbGluZy8_bWlkPTQ2NDM1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/mFLUlvYiFDFUGJAM5gT73g) to the 43 House Republicans who voted no on the bill, but voted yes on the rule.**
* **[Send an email](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to the 31 Senate Republicans who voted no on the bill.**

The links above also include the names of Representatives and Senators on each page.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._BinXP4WZw)
---
This week we expect Joe Biden to seize the momentum and increase his attacks on conservatives. We’ve already seen how Biden’s Department of Homeland Security is calling conservative groups like Tea Party Patriots “domestic terrorists”. We are calling for the impeachment of DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. [**You can add your voice here**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.).
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._wqIGzyTNOqETWBmhHUhw)
---
| | |
---
| |
