name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: I lost a seat in Congress by just 6,588 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=b673650c3ffc4d89984c0272877ad596&_t=q7IQ7C7A8EDw3wyraNywqStoXMKqtEZpnL1uDtKCz8RMJMUCtPEjK2sWUnT8MG6wLAbNvFpxT7Gax6LtT_6uVGgNCK2WhwmX8l2eQe4mxVU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=b673650c3ffc4d89984c0272877ad596&_t=q7IQ7C7A8EDw3wyraNywqStoXMKqtEZpnL1uDtKCz8RMJMUCtPEjK2sWUnT8MG6wLAbNvFpxT7Gax6LtT_6uVGgNCK2WhwmX8l2eQe4mxVU%3D)

| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b673650c3ffc4d89984c0272877ad596&_e=NsFhgxJxiCiAPPKlVXBIClchgLzlNd6HhJu5Rzil1pIlMs1buk1xf2-_28x4O-W-L6EVUityVcGz5Xurteuc-vXLWZUdYJDiivWjYgzoGvHM_LLKle1-7vKikFymS-91ZdX-nW6fRTYb6tJIUcnmwrVMYBLLK_qVbL3RPE2VRO2jK913S8TftQHu1W1dtolDjv51HLq6LuPsCra6A5BmvT-6VFsvtGxjUlMYMaBEr1_pL8bjTHkAg7di4VdYVpBPrHed_84xHK2Zl0-r17Gv37JEn6LfU_AIiewTFM3Tl9RqSoOyYCdbbQdkKUPiUQY-3MU9WF4izWBjC5FNgkJXIv1WdL4RNgj4Kskg1pXQ0QW0AipoxxKKckOQmE-irOqy7IkRBcqLAA2eWAncco9rAD2z7fclacA-fseUHj5YyDc%3D)

Fellow Patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican**.

I’m helping to change that narrative. **I’m not a “coconut”** - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. **My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District.** Until I flipped this seat in 2022, a Republican had literally never held this seat in Congress.

The first time I ran for this seat back in 2020, **we fell short by a mere 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter – I never give up. I ran again in 2022 and defeated a progressive socialist, **flipping this seat for the first time in 120 years.** Now, the socialist is back for a rematch and this time around I'm charged with keeping this seat Republican. It would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in a couple dollars right now to help keep this Hispanic Republican from TEXAS in the the U.S. House!

[ ** Support a Hispanic Republican
Donate Today ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b673650c3ffc4d89984c0272877ad596&_e=NsFhgxJxiCiAPPKlVXBIClchgLzlNd6HhJu5Rzil1pIlMs1buk1xf2-_28x4O-W-L6EVUityVcGz5Xurteuc-vXLWZUdYJDiivWjYgzoGvHM_LLKle1-7vKikFymS-91ZdX-nW6fRTYb6tJIUcnmwrVMYBLLK_qVbL3RPE2VRO2jK913S8TftQHu1W1dtolDjv51HLq6LuPsCra6A5BmvT-6VFsvtGxjUlMYMaBEr1_pL8bjTHkAg7di4VdYVpBPrHed_84xHK2Zl0-r17Gv31hZh9OX-sVsWpk4z8TIN3EXYz8IItDiilr1cNkkAxQOj60gteW2vL2nHgJy8VPKGJ4CVUS0vy_koVIKMZL3dowynR-KyM80-wIx3ikcK5nDxI9Vmq-vssF07kqhgElowLqORkqKv4gGtqXAL4f6ku4%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, Speaker Kevin McCarthy, the National Republican Congressional Committee and Texas Right to Life, among others.

As you may have heard, R**epublicans only have a four-seat majority, and to put it plainly, without holding onto this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retake the majority.**

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more!

**We need more brown Republican women of color**.

**[Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b673650c3ffc4d89984c0272877ad596&_e=NsFhgxJxiCiAPPKlVXBIClchgLzlNd6HhJu5Rzil1pIlMs1buk1xf2-_28x4O-W-L6EVUityVcGz5Xurteuc-vXLWZUdYJDiivWjYgzoGvHM_LLKle1-7vKikFymS-91ZdX-nW6fRTYb6tJIUcnmwrVMYBLLK_qVbL3RPE2VRO2jK913S8TftQHu1W1dtolDjv51HLq6LuPsCra6A5BmvT-6VFsvtGxjUlMYMaBEr1_pL8bjTHkAg7di4VdYVpBPrHed_84xHK2Zl0-r17Gv32zEw5iy1r_FxXX6xlOgvVM7O97TGakOU3Uz4PyF7ngGzwGyUIOy54I14rNk75RsE_wWguAot7XHvrJcllu6JaWbuwbgGvW5cnrKXhBcNwNoVDWUd9VI0T7M0_L32yc6ksU6BDPln7tfMkz0Ia9x_Dc%3D)**

**Culturally, Hispanics are conservative** : most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. **For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party**. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ours for the taking – _**if we can keep our eye on the prize and our message to voters clear and concise**_. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, **[invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b673650c3ffc4d89984c0272877ad596&_e=NsFhgxJxiCiAPPKlVXBIClchgLzlNd6HhJu5Rzil1pIlMs1buk1xf2-_28x4O-W-L6EVUityVcGz5Xurteuc-vXLWZUdYJDiivWjYgzoGvHM_LLKle1-7vKikFymS-91ZdX-nW6fRTYb6tJIUcnmwrVMYBLLK_qVbL3RPE2VRO2jK913S8TftQHu1W1dtolDjv51HLq6LuPsCra6A5BmvT-6VFsvtGxjUlMYMaBEr1_pL8bjTHkAg7di4VdYVpBPrHed_84xHK2Zl0-r17Gv38Qg4bnVnwqujQ1_WupKsXJlgDD4KfGjASBfRRzMrul48I226HKs-8xMAnK_yWDHTKE2l0_B2Wz0jrvdMwP4JAMx_T-1dxI-Xqs1Grrb7E3iXCeKjW41CEMr8Y1z2sRf4fhg1QdyjYDMTxqJhM55Gg8%3D)**.

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “ _**If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now**_.”

Help me prove him right.

**Thank you for your time.**

[ ** Support a Hispanic Republican
Donate Today ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b673650c3ffc4d89984c0272877ad596&_e=NsFhgxJxiCiAPPKlVXBIClchgLzlNd6HhJu5Rzil1pIlMs1buk1xf2-_28x4O-W-L6EVUityVcGz5Xurteuc-vXLWZUdYJDiivWjYgzoGvHM_LLKle1-7vKikFymS-91ZdX-nW6fRTYb6tJIUcnmwrVMYBLLK_qVbL3RPE2VRO2jK913S8TftQHu1W1dtolDjv51HLq6LuPsCra6A5BmvT-6VFsvtGxjUlMYMaBEr1_pL8bjTHkAg7di4VdYVpBPrHed_84xHK2Zl0-r17Gv3zuotcUhduuOx_xi14s3UMfh_MBS1ezCwAHvkgIccE16gfNZmLfiTtByH1nBDEspRWNOnzGvVE2OzXwCrqNe8vkWFgJvNRl9E7jtx1FWFblgXgIZF3Oobk9fYHJ-I3DrN4n4oK6PY1EL1fMhyPXSJec%3D)

Monica De La Cruz

**GET TO KNOW MONICA:** | **Monica De La Cruz successfully flipped Texas'15th Congressional District RED in 2022, becoming the first Republican to represent the district in Congress!**

Monica grew up in the Rio Grande Valley in the border town of Brownsville, TX. Monica and her brother were raised by a single Mom, Norma Alicia. She had a simple life that was built around faith, hard work and family. Her mother raised her with a strong love of country as her grandfather served in the Navy in WWII and her brother served honorably twenty years in the Air Force.

Monica put herself through college while working and graduated from the University of Texas at San Antonio with a BBA in Marketing. After graduation, Monica wanted to further her Spanish language studies and attended La Universidad Nacional Autonoma de Mexico in Mexico City.

Monica owns three successful small businesses and are examples of the American Dream. She believes in giving back to her community and has strong ties through her work with various community service organizations. Monica resides in Edinburg, TX with her two children.

clean_body: I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | | Fellow Patriot, Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District. Until I flipped this seat in 2022, a Republican had literally never held this seat in Congress. The first time I ran for this seat back in 2020, we fell short by a mere 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter – I never give up. I ran again in 2022 and defeated a progressive socialist, flipping this seat for the first time in 120 years. Now, the socialist is back for a rematch and this time around I'm charged with keeping this seat Republican. It would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in a couple dollars right now to help keep this Hispanic Republican from TEXAS in the the U.S. House! I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, Speaker Kevin McCarthy, the National Republican Congressional Committee and Texas Right to Life, among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only have a four-seat majority, and to put it plainly, without holding onto this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retake the majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Hispanics are conservative : most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ours for the taking – if we can keep our eye on the prize and our message to voters clear and concise. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, . Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “ If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. name: Art
subject: Support All On The Line’s efforts to protect voting rights everywhere democracy is on line.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Recent events in Ohio have exposed alarming anti-democratic tactics that extreme legislators employ to undermine the voices and rights of Ohioans like never before.
Ohio legislators have put Issue 1 on the ballot that, if passed, would allow only 40 percent of Ohioans to dictate policy for the remaining 60 percent. This anti-democratic maneuver silences the will of voters, subverts majority rule, and is a direct threat to our democracy.
* * *
**_"It’s a way for Statehouse Republicans, who used gerrymandering to give themselves super majorities, to block voters from using the ballot to reverse some of the preposterous laws they have passed."_

[**All On The Line is taking action to safeguard our democracy and ensure that the will of the people prevails over political interests. Here’s how:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64417410/410013276/1287927179?refcode=20230606_AOTL_F_JuneOH_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlNzI2M2EzLThiMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dOzd4md-hlO5mykKhVgjV8i86CRjrFHbTRz7E1bsYsU=)
* **Mobilization:** Knowledge is power, and one of the most significant challenges we face is the need for more awareness among Ohioans and others regarding these anti-democratic tactics. We are committed to spreading awareness and having the resources to mobilize our volunteers.
* **Engaging our Grassroots Communities:** The strength of our democracy lies in the active participation of engaged citizens. Our organizing efforts are doubling down to educate people about the dangers of gerrymandering and these extreme anti-democratic tactics and facilitate meaningful discussions on ways to protect our democratic processes.
* **Championing Voting Accessibility:** Voting is the cornerstone of democracy. Our democracy reform work is in overdrive supporting voting rights initiatives and advocating for fair access to the ballot box.

By mobilizing, engaging communities, and championing voting accessibility, we can ensure that not only the voices of all Ohioans are heard and respected but voices across the nation.
[**But we can only do this necessary work with your help. clean_body: | Recent events in Ohio have exposed alarming anti-democratic tactics that extreme legislators employ to undermine the voices and rights of Ohioans like never before. Ohio legislators have put Issue 1 on the ballot that, if passed, would allow only 40 percent of Ohioans to dictate policy for the remaining 60 percent. This anti-democratic maneuver silences the will of voters, subverts majority rule, and is a direct threat to our democracy. "It’s a way for Statehouse Republicans, who used gerrymandering to give themselves super majorities, to block voters from using the ballot to reverse some of the preposterous laws they have passed." name: Hon. Mike Callihan
subject: I’m endorsing Debby Burnett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-db-email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-db-email?refcode2=logo]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/A4B2kqgcs0ONa4RHxbKjqQ2?contactdata=fwaHy2UGMWn3uO5cCOniU7Cn9kYMoZBq5KskIN8ckAZZjvkiS9/AQ5gui5YNkeLr6vlr2vK79rt9M7gIhdn7JUBwTusdh0NkUpY13sJTa5A=&refcode2=img_MCandDB [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A4B2kqgcs0ONa4RHxbKjqQ2?contactdata=fwaHy2UGMWn3uO5cCOniU7Cn9kYMoZBq5KskIN8ckAZZjvkiS9/AQ5gui5YNkeLr6vlr2vK79rt9M7gIhdn7JUBwTusdh0NkUpY13sJTa5A=&refcode2=img_MCandDB]I’m endorsing Debby Burnett for CO-03 because she’s the best choice to defeat Lauren Boebert. Will you join me and say you’re on Team Debby right away? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A4B2kqgcs0ONa4RHxbKjqQ2?contactdata=fwaHy2UGMWn3uO5cCOniU7Cn9kYMoZBq5KskIN8ckAZZjvkiS9/AQ5gui5YNkeLr6vlr2vK79rt9M7gIhdn7JUBwTusdh0NkUpY13sJTa5A=&refcode2=link_CTAtop]
ADD YOUR NAME » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A4B2kqgcs0ONa4RHxbKjqQ2?contactdata=fwaHy2UGMWn3uO5cCOniU7Cn9kYMoZBq5KskIN8ckAZZjvkiS9/AQ5gui5YNkeLr6vlr2vK79rt9M7gIhdn7JUBwTusdh0NkUpY13sJTa5A=&refcode2=btn_top]
Folks,
As a longtime resident of Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District, there’s not a doubt in my mind that we need a new congresswoman.
Lauren Boebert has failed the people of western and southern Colorado time and time again. Her right-wing extremism and racism just aren’t in line with our values. She’s more interested in her next Fox News appearance and in appeasing the extremist special interests and dark-money donors backing her than she is in working on all the complex issues that face the people who call our district home.
After grandstanding for the cameras, Boebert didn’t even show up to vote on the debt ceiling agreement she spent weeks blustering about! When it was time to put in the work and do her job, she failed us once again. She is a failed representative. Period.
I’ve watched others try to defeat Boebert. They’ve failed. Sure, Democrats came close last time, but as my father used to say, “Close only counts in horseshoes and hand grenades.” No, we have to do better than get close: We must win this time, and we will win with Debby Burnett as our candidate. She’s tough yet compassionate. She works hard. And, yes, she will show up to vote!
Debby Burnett is the best choice to defeat Boebert. She has worked with farmers and ranchers across our district for over twenty years as a veterinarian. Debby is a mom, a small-business owner, and a rural Coloradan who is utterly determined to give western and southern Colorado the representation we deserve in Congress.
I’m proud to endorse Debby Burnett, but she needs your support too. Are you with us?
Please, join me and say you’re on Team Debby. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A4B2kqgcs0ONa4RHxbKjqQ2?contactdata=fwaHy2UGMWn3uO5cCOniU7Cn9kYMoZBq5KskIN8ckAZZjvkiS9/AQ5gui5YNkeLr6vlr2vK79rt9M7gIhdn7JUBwTusdh0NkUpY13sJTa5A=&refcode2=link_CTAmiddle]
ADD YOUR NAME » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A4B2kqgcs0ONa4RHxbKjqQ2?contactdata=fwaHy2UGMWn3uO5cCOniU7Cn9kYMoZBq5KskIN8ckAZZjvkiS9/AQ5gui5YNkeLr6vlr2vK79rt9M7gIhdn7JUBwTusdh0NkUpY13sJTa5A=&refcode2=btn_body]
With your help, we will defeat Boebert this time.
- Mike Callihan
Former Lieutenant Governor of Colorado
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of western and southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-db-email?refcode2=btn_biobox]

Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
Debby Burnett, PO Box 1761, Gunnison, CO 81230

name: Sam Eppler
subject: I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I’m Sam Eppler, and I’m writing to share some big news: **I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 24th Congressional District.**

As the youngest high school principal in Dallas, I am ready to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. Texans deserve a leader in Washington committed to providing quality education for every student and investing in our future.

[**I’ll explain more about why I’m running below, but can I count on you to split a contribution between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to become a Founding Donor?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47006?t=6&akid=8179%2E878179%2EoHwYVY) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47006?t=7&akid=8179%2E878179%2EoHwYVY)
---
**I’m running for Congress because no one in Congress is talking about the issues people in my community care about.**

As a product of the public school system and a current high school principal, I’m committed to education above all else. Right now, we’re facing a crisis in our schools – our teachers are underpaid, our schools are underfunded, and our students and teachers are fearing for their lives in the wake of gun violence.

I believe that every single student across the country should have the same opportunities and the best education possible, regardless of their zip code. We must ensure that we’re investing in our future to prepare for 21st-century jobs in our rapidly changing and growing economy.

My Republican opponent, Beth Van Duyne, is more focused on protecting and re-electing her former boss, President Trump, than taking care of Texans.

[**As a vital member of our community and someone who would be the youngest member of the Texas delegation in Congress, I understand the real issues families are facing in TX-24, and I will always put our district first. So will you split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to become a Founding Donor?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47006?t=8&akid=8179%2E878179%2EoHwYVY)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sam Eppler and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47007?t=9&akid=8179%2E878179%2EoHwYVY)
---

clean_body: | I’m Sam Eppler, and I’m writing to share some big news: I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 24th Congressional District. As the youngest high school principal in Dallas, I am ready to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress. Texans deserve a leader in Washington committed to providing quality education for every student and investing in our future. | I’m running for Congress because no one in Congress is talking about the issues people in my community care about. As a product of the public school system and a current high school principal, I’m committed to education above all else. Right now, we’re facing a crisis in our schools – our teachers are underpaid, our schools are underfunded, and our students and teachers are fearing for their lives in the wake of gun violence. I believe that every single student across the country should have the same opportunities and the best education possible, regardless of their zip code. We must ensure that we’re investing in our future to prepare for 21st-century jobs in our rapidly changing and growing economy. My Republican opponent, Beth Van Duyne, is more focused on protecting and re-electing her former boss, President Trump, than taking care of Texans. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Winnie the Pooh
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
When we were kids, we were taught “stop, drop and roll.” Today’s kids get “run, hide, fight.”

Friends -
Texas... where elected officials are relying on Winnie the Pooh to teach their kids about active shooters because they don't have the courage to keep our kids safe.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2466?t=1&akid=1410%2E4767699%2EpU50X3)
Texas... where Greg Abbott signed a law to send DNA kits to parents of school children so their bodies can be identified after a shooting.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2404?t=2&akid=1410%2E4767699%2EpU50X3)
Guns are the leading cause of death for kids in America. Kids!
We're not talking about accidents, or cancer or something unpreventable. We know the steps to take to save our kids lives. But leaders like Greg Abbott lack the courage to act.
Until then... It's Winnie the Pooh for Texas families.
Gavin Newsom
* * *

i️ Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

It's Winnie the Pooh for Texas families. Gavin Newsom i️ Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸 All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy. If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | **

body:
| | |

Hello,

**[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64418500/410016723/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2674-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5ZDNmZDA1LThkMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8WBvOs84kM0Xqk-9TDW0bWTBe55vMLhakA8Bd1CckgY=) ****But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024.**

Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on election night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes.

The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country.

We did it all with zero support from national Democrats while also being outspent by Boebert’s campaign and her allies.

How? By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and _listening_ to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible.
This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district.

**We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert:**

**[If you’re able to, can I count on you to make a donation right now – no amount is too small – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help us hit our goal and finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress? I’m grateful for every dollar you can afford to chip in.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64418501/410016724/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2674-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5ZDNmZDA1LThkMDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8WBvOs84kM0Xqk-9TDW0bWTBe55vMLhakA8Bd1CckgY=)**

body:

As the founder of a top polling firm and political advisor, I prepped lots of urgent memos. I drafted them for clients, candidates, and yes... even a president or two.

**So believe me when I say the memo I'm sending you now is especially important.** I can't explain everything in this email, but I'm including a _**[link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62782917:JIMulyIYN:m:1:3299561967:E6CAF64018EEE481658B24B720F12819:r "link")**_ to your full briefing materials:

Get your eyes on this ASAP!

Thanks for all you do.
- Kellyanne Conway

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=500ac3259f5641059b95b03d175cbf6f&_e=_2VCLlefqK4LU1JAJrqnzPN28BI7RpH08An_AD2ERenrjbC9PSRq9U8rmcAfrFFR7h6yCn1hDmnOdDZYUHpjaVAPuLzkb5O1DvIWsIl0IKIbrJApUjihwiyXZCprPSP055Wx9keAiXe_S0Ageu3HHK88twumWA315Sj6jBb6MM2_dK0r6FE0rLvF0PIVD7d9AFb9_UKn-NrxHZunSmW53xY9Bi_ALbRC5uej_P4CW874GWYjJ6RTJBW355zI-12sRSO3JLXIycrFAORbM65-EDNRbeTsnooru6rmXyybChk%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=500ac3259f5641059b95b03d175cbf6f&_e=_2VCLlefqK4LU1JAJrqnzPN28BI7RpH08An_AD2ERenrjbC9PSRq9U8rmcAfrFFR7h6yCn1hDmnOdDZYUHpjaVAPuLzkb5O1DvIWsIl0IKIbrJApUjihwiyXZCprPSP055Wx9keAiXe_S0Ageu3HHDq3BFM1i-0ybyHLlKpP72PTA-Kl-yMzB0JmAZDvQv1XOYJEihrJMtUzz9h6y94qKyT-eu0rK4BPqB9QaYD-5O9ddvs0SBw4Hb8aTazbpDj_AHx3XVIcU0AfBTKt4rdavV143xWjZ9woBhguCQzSd98%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=500ac3259f5641059b95b03d175cbf6f&_e=_2VCLlefqK4LU1JAJrqnzPN28BI7RpH08An_AD2ERenrjbC9PSRq9U8rmcAfrFFR7h6yCn1hDmnOdDZYUHpjaVAPuLzkb5O1DvIWsIl0IKIbrJApUjihwiyXZCprPSP055Wx9keAiXe_S0Ageu3HHJcIAbOzmTAQ892iaFSpC_xxfXPhZ0XQ0WunBZp7rbZYRhwwjDhtH-yBrPOudGu4GV8hp1P4q0jfqbrkQEXGUvJOkgyK4uslfP31aF2Z3uEDRqfVzUoiXnAPrRyIPjr87MOTnKetdodD9OIGCOe-i4M%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=500ac3259f5641059b95b03d175cbf6f&_e=_2VCLlefqK4LU1JAJrqnzPN28BI7RpH08An_AD2ERenrjbC9PSRq9U8rmcAfrFFR7h6yCn1hDmnOdDZYUHpjaVAPuLzkb5O1DvIWsIl0IKIbrJApUjihwiyXZCprPSP055Wx9keAiXe_S0Ageu3HHHEcfN2csDPXE2oulMW4gjB2Wuon_pS9gGJToprQFK_kaK2YwmItBRYsxs68mIInHdfs-x9Wu1wEcTA0h_tF5-xXQee_Yv9aS-C3o81UjBjKw4V_Jo_oGzjmlPzmEg1GxLl2nLPekAzIvSqTy5Vd3JY%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=500ac3259f5641059b95b03d175cbf6f&_e=_2VCLlefqK4LU1JAJrqnzPN28BI7RpH08An_AD2ERenrjbC9PSRq9U8rmcAfrFFR7h6yCn1hDmnOdDZYUHpjaVAPuLzkb5O1DvIWsIl0IKIbrJApUjihwiyXZCprPSP055Wx9keAiXe_S0Ageu3HHLr6nn1qCTRrGrBEyaLp-nnliN90_1tnYu7g-aTp86Jw8mKV7O3MBj4xCJOPhmHFawyGpgdkEeIeQ5_V7GX38a90w8CLtviZs77w8Sa8j8oV3DKv-ZoeAhCl0Fub5y_NCwXkM2itOpdzQRqmw0fznLU%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=500ac3259f5641059b95b03d175cbf6f&_e=_2VCLlefqK4LU1JAJrqnzPN28BI7RpH08An_AD2ERenrjbC9PSRq9U8rmcAfrFFR7h6yCn1hDmnOdDZYUHpjaVAPuLzkb5O1DvIWsIl0IKIbrJApUjihwiyXZCprPSP055Wx9keAiXe_S0Ageu3HHJ8BRc8NPULPzePCoyCNqWSYBPeSrXrK-HkDlKiqJvJLeRhsbnkotUxhSOujxrnGrFNouzxP4Ex9g_fT1I_4tuq0rUsOVLwTgx-4E0KGUYYZf9neOTLF7ebPjI4RaQdIJN7vKxcezWXGaCzDOLfF15Q%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=500ac3259f5641059b95b03d175cbf6f&_e=_2VCLlefqK4LU1JAJrqnzPN28BI7RpH08An_AD2ERenrjbC9PSRq9U8rmcAfrFFR7h6yCn1hDmnOdDZYUHpjaVAPuLzkb5O1DvIWsIl0IKIbrJApUjihwiyXZCprPSP055Wx9keAiXe_S0Ageu3HHFQrJejsBO50yP6VK2D03fIOpvnIDe8wHNbPXJOGwyFDLJR8C4eH9t1Po-bGO_hexTltBepG5QkSVKuKZda6bzU1sY7XnGttuPbatuDmvvJMOCi9zDberakg94vt9gdfngqtX5rwPVRDXMzIbleDHsg%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=500ac3259f5641059b95b03d175cbf6f&_e=_2VCLlefqK4LU1JAJrqnzPN28BI7RpH08An_AD2ERenrjbC9PSRq9U8rmcAfrFFR7h6yCn1hDmnOdDZYUHpjaVAPuLzkb5O1DvIWsIl0IKIbrJApUjihwiyXZCprPSP055Wx9keAiXe_S0Ageu3HHAtrIcl-QhqoD8JZf59bJs8sqPNltytc8P4S1Bjkgd8ln0xkikFvHAJQRH82atqX9Jl-VL-_7To7fNsb3qvUM6WVxxReHnaiT3jsnbv2_D4fm2K3rotXv8M4QR31PLgDUjWYsRxneWkmLUviOJ7zhbM%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Gabe Amo, Democrat for RI-01
subject: Why I'm running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
|

| | Peter,

Hi, my name is Gabe Amo and I’m running for Congress in the September 2023 special election to represent Rhode Island’s 1st Congressional District. **I am honored to have received the endorsement of Democrats Serve.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNVCycVYR3VQRObeYQa2fiJE70arDjNal6A-AcUTrIwd_ajk5CbaHJMmVh8SUI8pQ3S7jYaxY6s61DZ_hKqU9LbK7gV3GqxbqE0aXl63nc03jP7ajzY75oR53qrH-VzrCisHIvIIsJo5Gz361Q-CbMV_DYoot41K2KH_DXOt2m_wkv1MhxYTRk8pGrSGDHxWohvvbBvN3X870qJ5c-0dJYYbiy5IQS0zF2jGODTNhBYcp1zqTqaVVe4UF5287etHfq3xMpXX-2NR8MTQ0AFcRTPhXoIjgnCo1B49-VCJxb_A/3wt/CdCHFf-TQTKbD21xnATk_w/h0/nQfE9ns7rsoCm1Fn-FlVqpCzjUnqrNraaUEGi__kv_4) I have had the honor of serving at the highest levels of government under two Presidents, President Obama and President Biden, and in the Rhode Island State House for former Governor of Rhode Island, Gina Raimondo.

In times of crisis, from mass shootings to extreme weather, I was often the first call from the White House to a mayor or local elected official to let them know the White House was with them to help heal their community. I also helped communities unlock the resources in President Biden’s historic legislative agenda and make lasting change by investing in infrastructure, workforce development, housing, broadband, and climate resilience.

As we have seen in recent weeks, Republican extremists have shown that they are willing to put politics before the good of the American people, sacrifice the health of our economy, and threaten the safety net that protects our seniors.

This is a crucial election – we need a strong, experienced leader to fight Republican attacks on our democracy, reproductive freedom, gun safety, and Social Security and Medicare. We must fight back at the ballot box.

I am the only candidate who is prepared to serve on day one. We need a congressperson who knows how to tackle big challenges – from Washington to Rhode Island – and who will effectively advocate for the Ocean State against the extremists in Congress.

Learn more about me by [clicking the video](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNVCycVYR3VQRObeYQa2fiJE70arDjNal6A-AcUTrIwd_ajk5CbaHJMmVh8SUI8pQ3S7jYaxY6s61DZ_hKqU9L598epIgszxWsIsTYSKdz3JpyHpxgm8bU9B3k4n6KyBDok8ibuxA8756lDPrB_vxEYhSsBg-9u7TfI2CfNnobR-w4NK9IqTrOnp7NA1XuwGAHvlhSGFp_orM30ewtRX6p40XWsNimoOQe_pasUcxV5S_vJuWUpaqwcy9PKT8qtII--DjfRjiVmy1md9m25osL8BQ_pUfK1Y4mD3nZnVwHIg/3wt/CdCHFf-TQTKbD21xnATk_w/h1/BGWZUgETHC2o9GoUyHtSJxCRrckwx6pvhKXURPA5PkQ) below: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNVCycVYR3VQRObeYQa2fiJE70arDjNal6A-AcUTrIwd_ajk5CbaHJMmVh8SUI8pQ3S7jYaxY6s61DZ_hKqU9LoIpUZKl8fh2dxu2ZkVuZpKb5_3UeeS-8Rm86Yo9NLDrWdA5yFtIMbWpslo-7zSXq1W2pUGanpImUPnFUdr7CUfobq2FWKS9BPo6g7bfZy11vRFtV8QGm9wXx4CzF94vlCgXatiCrg1ghQ_pLHsI-tMFoOUD4EJDZNIN7IoOFgd3j246osAQ-pS3U6V3lJKp8veZGG2iNulSD8Z1iZ_7UWA/3wt/CdCHFf-TQTKbD21xnATk_w/h2/rAVKafQhO2RDlYc9XK33nHzBHWUaL30YH2gp4j-f4sc) Help us win this fight by [chipping in today](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNVCycVYR3VQRObeYQa2fiJE70arDjNal6A-AcUTrIwd_ajk5CbaHJMmVh8SUI8pQ3S7jYaxY6s61DZ_hKqU9LkjSEKvs2I_HysfosLA6YHrcHfcZ0MeQSxLlODq9gsWzBpq6r2c2QJfSQQovTme7Kqz5VueFRniqjcBQWB2BRP2kQgEsKCcUZ9KV1rZIM84HrsX5rGKykJOPL2y7xr9Xc4R_BcsiVuRbQIRfwSm7LR4mwmd5GchLT7fozubkqc3YxRe5fNo9gaMIRdo0QCM--BTEcgEWp_X10L8QSasZz-A/3wt/CdCHFf-TQTKbD21xnATk_w/h3/-kz9CH_4ClU-7aWz2aG7FwvW-QJ-X0pfo5k61FLtS1w).

Gabe Amo

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: They are taking us seriously.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
>From key endorsements and policy statements to the restoration of RFK’s censored Instagram account.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, As Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s campaign gains momentum, elements of the mainstream media are moving beyond the initial ignore-and-dismiss to really take his candidacy seriously. This demonstrates now broad the readiness for real change has become in American society. Here is an opinion piece in The Hill: [Why I believe RFK JR will be the 2024 Democratic nominee](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv3Sk9ITV4xyJ2IK-lA6A7yWAiZQuyMWQqNSwyfaUfml-SBtqTqMUzV4yf7jPq-UOvZlNfqgR1keTk_o4RtAzZhTT_Y6D6bdnk5IW5Ow7HBNsxHwrE_fd3Mm59coPSskG3g&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=2). It is significant because the writer, Douglass MacKinnon, has done his research and really gets the essence of RFK’s message and the core of his appeal. Let’s not leave out smaller, regional newspapers. Here is an [excellent synopsis](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=AsR_z4Ya39h-kIzczbN9CTjpCaGTwH8z_Lo8GjNV7TR9MUfyNUkc2IRYRgWLC4bZ8RfefDwHHpfGKGOC6fKdomTnFj8TT5h70UTa7w9mPyGB6BeRGJUvS_em_nI-u66TX1TTVvo-Ex7ZCCcUAJwSciM6dciumPHQjADEvZHfBqe44cYdlww1UjOr1wA98Bb49SPe-fhN-3NoIUKF-M1iXdPdQJzyo1k-QhbpkWB5pQ4&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=3) and commentary from the Desert Review on RFK Jr.’s interview on one of America’s top political shows, the All-in Podcast. The [podcast itself](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRa2SN3tGyPnejtKt5oQz1EL&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=4) is worth listening to in its entirety. As one commentator said: “Even when I disagree with him, he makes coherent, intelligent arguments which is sorely lacking from both sides right now. I think the vast majority of Americans are tired of the lack of substance from both sides and of their complicity in the destruction of the working class. His message about the war and our economic situation here at home really is resonating with me. This guy is the real deal." | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=5 "DONATE TODAY") [DONATE TODAY](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=5)
---
Back to the mainstream: The Wall Street Journal’s Gerry Baker interviewed Robert F. Kennedy. Jr. for the Free Expressions podcast. [Another Kennedy for President?](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=OwehQGnYjrzpIc0rxaR28Spssio5d5QQFvcFVzsr_QPbW43DPy7T95A-YURsm7AxJW7fHxg7gohW7-IjP7pNf129b0Fs7MrfGR-xEoniaa_4tiA3kUjJzXLzawGxdfvJ2Qn_qr7xWozVn-DP458JjFCjqu2YPOrS4j_4hxg7Hxo&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=6)
In another breakthrough development, [Instagram Announced it reinstated](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAvxLaLMPBBqQCVkW_C8ZX6uT6hWqoq35dIK-WoYjM_xfq5z3prVidi_aSzdjxvXssVD8Y4IHU7T9orB3RB8nFGreMoCo8GOhVssjmnqiYDKhlkVx4cjORM-hoFMo_v7yB4w&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=7) RFK, Jr.'s [personal account](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=8) that was banned in 2021 in the midst of his explosive rise in popularity during Covid restrictions. All 770,000 followers as well as his verified status returned on Sunday, as he prepared to speak [with Elon Musk](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqrwzYUWbBquH77Y2XTUn9K4XioqpTq4Zbx6RnTOmE8C&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=9) on the topic of social media censorship in Monday's Twitter Spaces.
You’ll notice that the above link claims that Mr. Kennedy was banned for “spreading disinformation” about Covid. But that mantra is also ringing hollow as more and more mainstream outlets repudiate pandemic policy. See for example Newsweek’s recent piece, [America’s Covid Response Was Based on Lies](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=7EL176YFyxKF3ox3wD2rUUrzezYM1EgZLE0uCpOP1pCqKxnv_CAr6dAuEnNwZv-DpCcCytWOfhzr-9nSCFcfavD1cOckCl41YTe2Sby8be8&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=10).
Finally, to give you an idea of the breadth of RFK, Jr’s appeal, we’ll end with [an article](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=kZ--hKxH8oXUM59qczNfwURKttGLjLe_Qj4t5YppK1GecmDKh2ZV99ZwHnsYWXwrBnnVinVOjCWD4FSHvx5WUmhGGSTs8vz-cOIrtin_mHHBmkFcXZqV7MO-Lmi8zHrpqSg-cya6sNoVNe22atAOow&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=11) from a neither-Right-nor-Left Christian website, America Magazine. It asks us not to underestimate the appeal of Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. We promise: we won’t!
To help keep this positive momentum going, please [donate](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=12) to the campaign. Thank you!
Sincerely,
Team Kennedy
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=13)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june_6_newsletter_group1&n=14)

clean_body: From key endorsements and policy statements to the restoration of RFK’s censored Instagram account. | Dear Peter, As Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s campaign gains momentum, elements of the mainstream media are moving beyond the initial ignore-and-dismiss to really take his candidacy seriously. This demonstrates now broad the readiness for real change has become in American society. Here is an opinion piece in The Hill: . It is significant because the writer, Douglass MacKinnon, has done his research and really gets the essence of RFK’s message and the core of his appeal. Let’s not leave out smaller, regional newspapers. Here is an and commentary from the Desert Review on RFK Jr.’s interview on one of America’s top political shows, the All-in Podcast. The is worth listening to in its entirety. As one commentator said: “Even when I disagree with him, he makes coherent, intelligent arguments which is sorely lacking from both sides right now. I think the vast majority of Americans are tired of the lack of substance from both sides and of their complicity in the destruction of the working class. His message about the war and our economic situation here at home really is resonating with me. This guy is the real deal." | "DONATE TODAY" Back to the mainstream: The Wall Street Journal’s Gerry Baker interviewed Robert F. Kennedy. Jr. for the Free Expressions podcast. In another breakthrough development, RFK, Jr.'s that was banned in 2021 in the midst of his explosive rise in popularity during Covid restrictions. All 770,000 followers as well as his verified status returned on Sunday, as he prepared to speak on the topic of social media censorship in Monday's Twitter Spaces. You’ll notice that the above link claims that Mr. Kennedy was banned for “spreading disinformation” about Covid. But that mantra is also ringing hollow as more and more mainstream outlets repudiate pandemic policy. See for example Newsweek’s recent piece, . Finally, to give you an idea of the breadth of RFK, Jr’s appeal, we’ll end with from a neither-Right-nor-Left Christian website, America Magazine. It asks us not to underestimate the appeal of Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. We promise: we won’t! To help keep this positive momentum going, please to the campaign. Thank you! Sincerely, Team Kennedy * PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f3e33f0e7944be3987c089bb6e4947b&_e=G54o0qmEWkfqdEO1c1W04VxZtNA6NKkCmDttwmZyoyha3WeKYcT_nrAJXVNmhcbGq1Y4dc8cipeUx7_dKU7eTknS-_7iDudVnO_hW6_lja_eVDqOd958kswetYFxeG-lv33rxsALQBraldOYMJJHFRvevQXqAyfRdJyThUz59Y4pjhx-I004UUYnoe6iHqi_k5GSSLtNTsXrJGCjwhYoTSYdPRawwBN6W0UI-_j6q7BJ4EgjGJyo2ls-KQ58a6mwnR2RZ7QjUR3wxpxxtrG7EBRz7x9EQ3zXOP2wuZTb-zs%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f3e33f0e7944be3987c089bb6e4947b&_e=G54o0qmEWkfqdEO1c1W04VxZtNA6NKkCmDttwmZyoyha3WeKYcT_nrAJXVNmhcbGq1Y4dc8cipeUx7_dKU7eTknS-_7iDudVnO_hW6_lja_eVDqOd958kswetYFxeG-lv33rxsALQBraldOYMJJHFZBPtsP6lZ4-Nv2SZ7c568gvBRqwhdELsrXzEDgOD7vy0YGtuxGDHJ8OPbXXJk2WbQokd07YqWr-WzPfOBuHx91cgz5NCPlEhpKL7276MrvRckwIz4sPaEMiM8wdBhavBLT7hHbWuUvbnrGZKVp8Igg%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f3e33f0e7944be3987c089bb6e4947b&_e=G54o0qmEWkfqdEO1c1W04VxZtNA6NKkCmDttwmZyoyha3WeKYcT_nrAJXVNmhcbGq1Y4dc8cipeUx7_dKU7eTknS-_7iDudVnO_hW6_lja_eVDqOd958kswetYFxeG-lv33rxsALQBraldOYMJJHFfKGNV89Vm0fKzhPwqRMfnt7_3m44jgnd1tozdbxlq9EaCC5v5f208ZSEsBTfTO_u19BRkSYD1HFyrq_-wAVfjyS6MtvMP0dqdeCc98HFIFL0eOBBtQDs9A-Hw-lmKpLLlvWSn5auY6wWhcUFUTYHb8%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f3e33f0e7944be3987c089bb6e4947b&_e=G54o0qmEWkfqdEO1c1W04VxZtNA6NKkCmDttwmZyoyha3WeKYcT_nrAJXVNmhcbGq1Y4dc8cipeUx7_dKU7eTknS-_7iDudVnO_hW6_lja_eVDqOd958kswetYFxeG-lv33rxsALQBraldOYMJJHFcA5DHKva-8cB9jriqTUk0HBujl_CvnUAH-TGhWtIVp3gVxlWjgAdZBXhU_2wEEnk-IYCVAFi95n7ik1mQk-e2AoHRWECsqNQHMq7lL3N4abA_lPfzG7WIjFFdqgTRR5R2cUxDCpt4mKOEpActhmpvM%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f3e33f0e7944be3987c089bb6e4947b&_e=G54o0qmEWkfqdEO1c1W04VxZtNA6NKkCmDttwmZyoyha3WeKYcT_nrAJXVNmhcbGq1Y4dc8cipeUx7_dKU7eTknS-_7iDudVnO_hW6_lja_eVDqOd958kswetYFxeG-lv33rxsALQBraldOYMJJHFTootJiB-F33-1E3KhSJoGA0p5sF17ddPJiyp4m3JZDOa8FyhqRHiOGciJi4R0Xxcz_zw8ExIzpKe4Szs72WUZejAsoGFy7CPX8L27ByovhnlvJXX_f96Mfe0t43ifh9WhPFIlEXqu0N7WdhxkMkdcc%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f3e33f0e7944be3987c089bb6e4947b&_e=G54o0qmEWkfqdEO1c1W04VxZtNA6NKkCmDttwmZyoyha3WeKYcT_nrAJXVNmhcbGq1Y4dc8cipeUx7_dKU7eTknS-_7iDudVnO_hW6_lja_eVDqOd958kswetYFxeG-lv33rxsALQBraldOYMJJHFSu0X6DUu4iQfGzYymahA-p0qWHxVka8ChT6PK4VN7Hs54zDl6QYvCSo0HUjYFNtQUk8NqtESwAL5UkD44eY5oxGfR14pEHNYNKWFnPHl-FGC-yZrbTDNGyC3rYkkLio1LbFY8xRCfHOQOWHMEmO6zI%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f3e33f0e7944be3987c089bb6e4947b&_e=G54o0qmEWkfqdEO1c1W04VxZtNA6NKkCmDttwmZyoyha3WeKYcT_nrAJXVNmhcbGq1Y4dc8cipeUx7_dKU7eTknS-_7iDudVnO_hW6_lja_eVDqOd958kswetYFxeG-lv33rxsALQBraldOYMJJHFTQDcbrPDgrATELXyJsV8sxERG1lPGMk3UiGm0Sm4VK8m1HlaLIDOdt1IuwbDFdTXcJxiUWIPonYsLqaI6RcvyAqvsgBNNU5bO-feqOLItYMmdhfrrwhDUPvbiiyTv49gEtwynaPI1D5FBZMNtNAxUc%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4f3e33f0e7944be3987c089bb6e4947b&_e=G54o0qmEWkfqdEO1c1W04VxZtNA6NKkCmDttwmZyoyha3WeKYcT_nrAJXVNmhcbGq1Y4dc8cipeUx7_dKU7eTknS-_7iDudVnO_hW6_lja_eVDqOd958kswetYFxeG-lv33rxsALQBraldOYMJJHFSyTuRRN0uOkiblcBJ4tyCphHHjbEpMgs4hS52tghhUIjyyzHEndj8ZqqelX8kC_m_-zCIPp6Dob0T9OVdNmgHUgiBaW-93yiaZI0vXWsR-ReemQMXvweNAXswex9vhd-bhOs3xmv_6BoaToYZYI4xA%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Fellow conservative – It's Senator JD Vance, and we need to talk about Ohio and the Senate.

It makes no sense that a red state like Ohio would have a failed leftist insider like Sherrod Brown as a Senator.

Ohio needs outsiders – folks like me and my friend, **Bernie Moreno** – to help take back the Senate majority and undo the damage of the Biden Administration.

**That’s why I’m proud to endorse Bernie Moreno to win Ohio’s other Senate seat in 2024.**

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.
