name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm a cautionary tale
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend,My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztcsuus9a6somv041hajhobhrvem73bdsghn7ft8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)
---
| | I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.”
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zro58bvecqh93sjim9q1intusq4ilb569nspnr5o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)
---
** _Before transitioning_**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt1urqlbea7mv6a54h2kt9nv8t5i4lpc2s7godc0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don’t know each other, I’m writing you today hoping you’ll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrnb3t685kd1l8nvrfmbpla5sb51ejakqvn6vik8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.**The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?”** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can’t prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8a53ce5s0b4a8c8ul3vj3hohesspvqnne36j6dg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” [**And YOU can help me.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ft6lk28lucbl0nvljuqjirnfqqlo227tjfk8p0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.**There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in.** And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.
---
| | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znfjjfib66blsii3qjuj7ephjf2hlsp17frr1leo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)
---
| | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O’Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have.[**That’s why I hope you’ll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z53u1nl6k7ultbjujejvhr8t9kccgmu0uunikoco_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. [**But if everyone I’m writing to can contribute just $25, or if you’re able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zka17sh6dlik9rmtj9bn64odg7g2o98ng3n2f5mo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:**_“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.”_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it’s $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo2q4fafhp22vps27lvi2g8f1i451lvpcp2c1qqo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you,Chloe Cole
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdnlvtlc70f98bb4lcjl5t42vr4if8pigjq83940_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)
---
| P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. **[Please help me with your tax-deductible gift of $25 or more.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z55n3ot9pjmtjr0mf64m4lp6937igk30t7fiivp8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs) **Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr9cmo7v16t11225u3v9nlk81o88bp4lmplmpaao_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4000gr0hppqafsdo0pncnr5f9ujkt03q1t6hik0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z002idrel1al1cpcqv87sshr545gd6i5rkmhfkn8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)
---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zmit2jq4048jcd5i1ka3105bduthpro3r3tv6kqo)
---
|
---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh2ncd3apia52v8cqaimcgrh9h8ijhid1r7jd2n0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34chjmap75c8gq48bi4bh28or0sdg61pr0c9i649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvb8m6tqv0v5iibmq7uambnmft8o1i3pqp3d90v8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zesadrojnddhafo049uuot3i451tob2bgnni1n7o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geeo32chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b87a62e06a584dffa9aebee897f7b7ea&_e=eLIwFXZ92BaUSotE00iZOocyQxygRBstco2cyQpV7LexAp2QD9PGNN06XJGLrt7SbLb3noJLBCN6oFI7asHlSNC6PBrwi5HNr9t0lNtICCzR_ntBt10_Cdh59yJQ1hf1JCUDSyptWmKwy6kS0oDHQrSsCpb_U-PG6G5qwAib7YgywqmgpSOfJxtx7Z177rYXhclxVwxBKmQMXTx59uTr9fUCxpT5GmYTjhwRmhxEtqZq8H6nrDZEsyh9LCIeTeLfrqt4zMtq_Iy4nWXo1BKeCsbeHrqhjmnWf9I76eEpMqs%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b87a62e06a584dffa9aebee897f7b7ea&_e=eLIwFXZ92BaUSotE00iZOocyQxygRBstco2cyQpV7LexAp2QD9PGNN06XJGLrt7SbLb3noJLBCN6oFI7asHlSNC6PBrwi5HNr9t0lNtICCzR_ntBt10_Cdh59yJQ1hf1JCUDSyptWmKwy6kS0oDHQsqtw1Pd7nEE72sPKCESNudcUBjv2Ag6ubeWep1y48H4SL3EUB10J57fx4vM0itnL163J9DnrLzXA2P19e8FpZnI-ND9-wp10nhta5rhu08G_e1BKxMGF2JOhVV9vz1emKkLEosZsDXElzONf-pxExg%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: Let’s talk trash, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230606_em_pet_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230606_em_pet_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
I love talking trash, especially when Nashville garbage is back in the news again.
Did you know that 83% of the trash that we generate in Davidson county ends up in a landfill? Only 17% of our waste is recycled or composted.
We all want to move Music City forward, but solving our waste problem takes planning, private sector knowledge, and getting the proper government infrastructure in place.
I want to make Nashville’s trash problems a distant memory as mayor, but I can’t do it alone. Can you sign my petition to help make cleaner streets and better recycling programs a reality for our city? >> [https://gmgxyleq.paperform.co]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://gmgxyleq.paperform.co]
https://gmgxyleq.paperform.co [https://gmgxyleq.paperform.co]
I understand the ins and outs of this stinky problem, Peter.
I’ve served on the Solid Waste Board and know that all of our landfills are at capacity. That’s why I’ve been talking to Eastman about starting an initiative to upcycle our plastics.
Nashvillians deserve the best, and we can’t get there without recycling and reuse programs.
Peter, can I count on you to help me clean up Nashville by adding your name to my mayoral campaign’s “Let’s talk trash” petition today? [https://gmgxyleq.paperform.co]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://gmgxyleq.paperform.co]
It’s an honor to have your support.
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://gmgxyleq.paperform.co [https://gmgxyleq.paperform.co]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr8fauhgj8u6m143f2usl56ktjpkbie56i0enfho_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geep72chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp7bn6htfhha9rmj2mm21c8srpkoatkd2eoaf3mo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geep72chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh0udecsk2qdeu51c75ic6sto62tkhq9bv5nuie8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1geep72chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Now more than ever we must stand with LGBTQ+ Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64420657/410022872/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWU5YzkyYy05MjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfaKrXka48muaOXvSvpR_O9xuVGHXxcdUdZgXGbiyRA=&emci=e857d3da-d403-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=59e9c92c-9204-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | It's June, which means it's officially Pride Month. This month, as we celebrate how far this movement has come, it's important to remember how far we still have to go. **LGBTQ+ Americans deserve equity, safety, and respect.** Full stop. In 1995, as Congress – Republicans and Democrats alike – supported and passed the homophobic Defense of Marriage Act, **I was proud to be one of the first members of the United States Senate to support marriage equality.** And my position today remains what it was then: the freedom to be your authentic self is a human right and shouldn't be diminished or marginalized in any way. **We have come a long way since 1995, but the LGBTQ+ community continues to face discrimination, which is mounting in many parts of our country.** This year there have already been nearly 500 bills introduced in legislatures across the country – including Oregon – that aim to roll back the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. **Republicans are desperate to turn the clock back.** The far-right has launched an all-out attack on the LGBTQ+ community. It's divisive, and it's wrong. **Now more than ever, we need to stand up for what is right and speak out against the GOP's hateful rhetoric.** This month, and every month, I'm committed to fighting for the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. **Together we can create a world where**** _everyone_****is free to be themselves.** _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | It's June, which means it's officially Pride Month. This month, as we celebrate how far this movement has come, it's important to remember how far we still have to go. LGBTQ+ Americans deserve equity, safety, and respect. Full stop. In 1995, as Congress – Republicans and Democrats alike – supported and passed the homophobic Defense of Marriage Act, I was proud to be one of the first members of the United States Senate to support marriage equality. And my position today remains what it was then: the freedom to be your authentic self is a human right and shouldn't be diminished or marginalized in any way. We have come a long way since 1995, but the LGBTQ+ community continues to face discrimination, which is mounting in many parts of our country. This year there have already been nearly 500 bills introduced in legislatures across the country – including Oregon – that aim to roll back the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. Republicans are desperate to turn the clock back. The far-right has launched an all-out attack on the LGBTQ+ community. It's divisive, and it's wrong. Now more than ever, we need to stand up for what is right and speak out against the GOP's hateful rhetoric. This month, and every month, I'm committed to fighting for the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. Together we can create a world where everyoneis free to be themselves. subject: Sign: Demand Ron DeSantis be charged if he broke kidnapping laws
body:

| | |
# [Bring Criminal Charges against Ron DeSantis if He Broke Kidnapping Laws](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te997d239-7f00-42f6-a581-d5af6f7e2eff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has been busing and flying immigrants out of Florida and dumping them in blue states -- and he may have just gotten himself in a [heap of trouble.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53cf5165-b1df-4d21-97ed-717a408b9ea8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It appears that Florida officials used a private plane to dump a group of immigrants in Sacramento. And it appears that they may have lied big time about where the immigrants were going, and what help they would get when they got there. And in California, taking people somewhere by fraud counts as kidnapping -- a criminal offense. California Governor Gavin Newsom [made this point](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2cefb850-81c1-4bce-9fb4-895b941faea2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), the California Attorney General is investigating, and if DeSantis was behind this, he should be arrested for kidnapping. [**Add your name and demand that Criminal Charges be brought against Ron DeSantis if He Broke Kidnapping Laws >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec24fccf-2745-4f54-b94b-c3bd74b4c36e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: I fell short by 6,588 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=19cf14842fc9414390c9656e64f0cd85&_t=w7EG-yGhDV6QDAvDIzg2FA6jksX34oSsMoamieDn6k6bgefdO87WPoMeu9ergWIYN2i3COmoIcJxnva89kd-MKTOD_hkDw3-r7EnCgmeu-A%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=19cf14842fc9414390c9656e64f0cd85&_t=w7EG-yGhDV6QDAvDIzg2FA6jksX34oSsMoamieDn6k6bgefdO87WPoMeu9ergWIYN2i3COmoIcJxnva89kd-MKTOD_hkDw3-r7EnCgmeu-A%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19cf14842fc9414390c9656e64f0cd85&_e=ihQR9KOouSCixcBgWPcvbac6eh0894RiuorlU3idX6SNHh0X5S6NNQng5wB3u75W70o49Z6Zz7td05SLLmJtwKBWPK3sf2PI-IBRTaYTp2Wi_2oi-jhgUyUzbgVaoMAOVv9FugDHDlUNOYBwJHBkzY4vZBH9H3kewimSnvOQUYjq3nkorYnHDXM0TOKvaIQ7pFCb-jYK9zP79EMrZ9wtR7s0wMQPTZ-bkge5txeMOonWR8FuNIp_dls-dM3TqlZeggr4fbLW0z4PFUwAxqfZ62ed0kb-Ncr7TDqZkLQtXQnvycUJPV2kuwPHYIV6BdzbnFduY7qCufMTBLGPqS1PK3ISjrtTEEVbibPJm5Md8cj1mbxOBQ53ExDwJVotua4-i2NbsUHa8bWvXwhXEKxgYK_ACMEzecvx48mCFec25eg%3D)

Fellow Patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican**.

I’m helping to change that narrative. **I’m not a “coconut”** - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. **My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District.** Until I flipped this seat in 2022, a Republican had literally never held this seat in Congress.

The first time I ran for this seat back in 2020, **we fell short by a mere 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter – I never give up. I ran again in 2022 and defeated a progressive socialist, **flipping this seat for the first time in 120 years.** Now, the socialist is back for a rematch and this time around I'm charged with keeping this seat Republican. It would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in a couple dollars right now to help keep this Hispanic Republican from TEXAS in the the U.S. House!

[ ** Support a Hispanic Republican
Donate Today ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19cf14842fc9414390c9656e64f0cd85&_e=ihQR9KOouSCixcBgWPcvbac6eh0894RiuorlU3idX6SNHh0X5S6NNQng5wB3u75W70o49Z6Zz7td05SLLmJtwKBWPK3sf2PI-IBRTaYTp2Wi_2oi-jhgUyUzbgVaoMAOVv9FugDHDlUNOYBwJHBkzY4vZBH9H3kewimSnvOQUYjq3nkorYnHDXM0TOKvaIQ7pFCb-jYK9zP79EMrZ9wtR7s0wMQPTZ-bkge5txeMOonWR8FuNIp_dls-dM3TqlZeggr4fbLW0z4PFUwAxqfZ69XYWPY22L8Zx3TPVKtxCfA0bvAqttkvEzcgL5UiKFmmJ3PAaTz94olBpHkongRxTaB0P0GxSNTlgsA7SusRtA11EGVF3mLAAZIF85bgs7mxnMaVmRZnyZ-t6Izk8yTakb283xg7d04w4Ec_prgW2qo%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, Speaker Kevin McCarthy, the National Republican Congressional Committee and Texas Right to Life, among others.

As you may have heard, R**epublicans only have a four-seat majority, and to put it plainly, without holding onto this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retake the majority.**

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more!

**We need more brown Republican women of color**.

**[Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19cf14842fc9414390c9656e64f0cd85&_e=ihQR9KOouSCixcBgWPcvbac6eh0894RiuorlU3idX6SNHh0X5S6NNQng5wB3u75W70o49Z6Zz7td05SLLmJtwKBWPK3sf2PI-IBRTaYTp2Wi_2oi-jhgUyUzbgVaoMAOVv9FugDHDlUNOYBwJHBkzY4vZBH9H3kewimSnvOQUYjq3nkorYnHDXM0TOKvaIQ7pFCb-jYK9zP79EMrZ9wtR7s0wMQPTZ-bkge5txeMOonWR8FuNIp_dls-dM3TqlZeggr4fbLW0z4PFUwAxqfZ6yw64yrWs0kFqSrsfKbSYa48p7WhhUJnVDUhgcFSbT24NKAdvZ-TiSj5GDSrvh1JATiH9PzItgsYS5dwBmtxWByfPabUcwPtJSmAxqH8jBmFqEfkMNP7ikRa6AmHei0F3uoDbGPc7TwzS3y8gIAWYdo%3D)**

**Culturally, Hispanics are conservative** : most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. **For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party**. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ours for the taking – _**if we can keep our eye on the prize and our message to voters clear and concise**_. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, **[invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19cf14842fc9414390c9656e64f0cd85&_e=ihQR9KOouSCixcBgWPcvbac6eh0894RiuorlU3idX6SNHh0X5S6NNQng5wB3u75W70o49Z6Zz7td05SLLmJtwKBWPK3sf2PI-IBRTaYTp2Wi_2oi-jhgUyUzbgVaoMAOVv9FugDHDlUNOYBwJHBkzY4vZBH9H3kewimSnvOQUYjq3nkorYnHDXM0TOKvaIQ7pFCb-jYK9zP79EMrZ9wtR7s0wMQPTZ-bkge5txeMOonWR8FuNIp_dls-dM3TqlZeggr4fbLW0z4PFUwAxqfZ62_20Q8QFBouE5F5DiaOmXBeLv_wt6IkcBt6HtGjfATejIidMbPOcI9ObDang18UKPVrnPwkFwAUanyrKRXYyaLSmK3T4JC9iiWHNK52khIKEUz_Ifp34WXi6H0Kh-etZ8ptqwhtxdo238CsxsIxGgw%3D)**.

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “ _**If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now**_.”

Help me prove him right.

**Thank you for your time.**

**GET TO KNOW MONICA:** | **Monica De La Cruz successfully flipped Texas'15th Congressional District RED in 2022, becoming the first Republican to represent the district in Congress!**

Monica grew up in the Rio Grande Valley in the border town of Brownsville, TX. Monica and her brother were raised by a single Mom, Norma Alicia. She had a simple life that was built around faith, hard work and family. Her mother raised her with a strong love of country as her grandfather served in the Navy in WWII and her brother served honorably twenty years in the Air Force.

Monica put herself through college while working and graduated from the University of Texas at San Antonio with a BBA in Marketing. After graduation, Monica wanted to further her Spanish language studies and attended La Universidad Nacional Autonoma de Mexico in Mexico City.

Monica owns three successful small businesses and are examples of the American Dream. She believes in giving back to her community and has strong ties through her work with various community service organizations. Monica resides in Edinburg, TX with her two children.

[ ** STAND WITH MONICA ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=19cf14842fc9414390c9656e64f0cd85&_e=ihQR9KOouSCixcBgWPcvbac6eh0894RiuorlU3idX6SNHh0X5S6NNQng5wB3u75W70o49Z6Zz7td05SLLmJtwKBWPK3sf2PI-IBRTaYTp2Wi_2oi-jhgUyUzbgVaoMAOVv9FugDHDlUNOYBwJHBkzY4vZBH9H3kewimSnvOQUYjq3nkorYnHDXM0TOKvaIQ7pFCb-jYK9zP79EMrZ9wtR7s0wMQPTZ-bkge5txeMOonWR8FuNIp_dls-dM3TqlZeggr4fbLW0z4PFUwAxqfZ68PFF7LpeBSl07UR8rM2yrKmukm5P_MBDgj_QBTenyvICaXPFWS-hejWl5eWLfyEl729YrcWLkvbP8F09QOeYpWStVL36_rGup5WVGQIoMRaLMpuzdxXJPG4Hsh0L8e3e30JK6dJKGHuZFvJxhZ-AKA%3D)

clean_body: I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | | Fellow Patriot, Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District. Until I flipped this seat in 2022, a Republican had literally never held this seat in Congress. The first time I ran for this seat back in 2020, we fell short by a mere 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter – I never give up. I ran again in 2022 and defeated a progressive socialist, flipping this seat for the first time in 120 years. Now, the socialist is back for a rematch and this time around I'm charged with keeping this seat Republican. It would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in a couple dollars right now to help keep this Hispanic Republican from TEXAS in the the U.S. House! I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, Speaker Kevin McCarthy, the National Republican Congressional Committee and Texas Right to Life, among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only have a four-seat majority, and to put it plainly, without holding onto this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retake the majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Hispanics are conservative : most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ours for the taking – if we can keep our eye on the prize and our message to voters clear and concise. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, . Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “ If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz Member of Congress, TX-15 Follow Monica On Social Media GET TO KNOW MONICA: | Monica De La Cruz successfully flipped Texas'15th Congressional District RED in 2022, becoming the first Republican to represent the district in Congress! Monica owns three successful small businesses and are examples of the American Dream. Friend — happy Pride Month!
Every June, we have a chance to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community here at home and across the country. Colorado is better because of the diversity in it.
As we celebrate, let’s also recommit to the fight for equality.
In the last couple of years, we’ve seen an onslaught of legislation going after LGBTQ+ rights. These attacks — based in bigotry and fear — are unacceptable.
Michael has been working hard to pass the Equality Act, which would prevent discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity.
Legislation like this is more important than ever — and every bit of public support behind it matters.
Will you add your name to call on Congress to protect LGBTQ rights nationwide? Join us as we fight for love, acceptance, and equality this Pride Month >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_060523_lgbtqrights]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_060523_lgbtqrights]
Thank you, friend!
— Team Bennet

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Maybe I’m teaching fish to swim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
Maybe I didn’t read the room

| |
---
| | | **THE 1ST ANNUAL SPEAKER'S SURVEY
JUNE 2023**
---

Patriot,

I thought I’d see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker’s Survey, but it hasn’t happened.

This input is desperately needed to shape the party’s strategy for this MUST-WIN election. Joe Biden and the liberal media hate that we are so closely involved with our grassroots base. This survey is the type of thing that gives him nightmares.

You don’t have to write anything fancy, just tell me what matters to you.

So, I’m inviting you one LAST time today.

---
| **OFFICIAL INVITATION**

**Will you participate in my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey?

DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT
GOP PARTY ID: 01891
EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25745%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z3kgFW4ws5ccDJnJ%2bCrbFw&sysid=1 "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
---
| | | [**YES**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25746%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jGpqTLq5cmGDoxHx8Ri9mg&sysid=1)
---
| | [**NO**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25747%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QohI65tpGMqbf5%2f0VrJHEA&sysid=1)
---

Please, I’m hoping we can rely on your expertise sooner rather than later.

-Speaker McCarthy

| | Mike Pence is announcing that he’s running for president, but here’s the thing: **_he’s never going to win.**_

This week has been a never-ending slew of candidate announcements of one after another extreme Republican hopeful who will never even make it out of Super Tuesday, and Mike Pence is just the latest to not break 10% in Iowa.

Doug Bergum, Chris Christie, and Mike Pence – none of them will win the Republican nomination. _They’re all distractions._

**Every poll has shown the same thing:_Donald Trump is going to be the GOP nominee.**_

**We’re realists. We have to be. Donald Trump will almost certainly be the Republican nominee for president next year, and we have to work every single day like he will be the nominee.**

**_And frankly, we’re worried.**_ [**_With donations down and our grassroots team growing complacent, we aren’t sure that we’ll have what it takes to fight back against Donald Trump. He’s dangerous, and if we underestimate him – if we don’t take him seriously from the very beginning – we WILL lose. name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: They called me a self-hating Latino
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=36ba85f9f1dd4bed8d7e4e116df46055&_t=ek-e_ghPXJOrcT2zy32L30JZqbwjfMQmjPU6_aS0gdjl5wWxM486JY4nvT1svCiBDmN_LqKTlHL3WzJl-RwfJQNCDWzyhyZgMK8BXgj3ehE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=36ba85f9f1dd4bed8d7e4e116df46055&_t=ek-e_ghPXJOrcT2zy32L30JZqbwjfMQmjPU6_aS0gdjl5wWxM486JY4nvT1svCiBDmN_LqKTlHL3WzJl-RwfJQNCDWzyhyZgMK8BXgj3ehE%3D)

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=36ba85f9f1dd4bed8d7e4e116df46055&_e=zrvbD2V2R2NnByNYiH-G4Vp772N7T1FJH-3Nl-tGU_JwxkN37D3fmNqWsJdXh4E-3SysqAxbKilwV1RuCzCK-kVsSe0apJMOzgvxjly-uueN-mc5GWtdydvqqwIYuxOJ0XeWxm8f49UwBXWl_YIJzRHjSFxAs8LHR384FYd3YzdwkVR1gXGY94BIbCdDRdThjad5t-pxatT1ICqoO0s_RahOUoVUueWAufHnJkgxUkqPfUvU4vG-Fi-lONcUyHwOpxFHN1nbZ2zQiKW6dLNEAhK6YFEA3Fr8tAsgScyS18RmU8M8AEr38jrYCtGI5fs05TC3HaueC2nu2UgbrBvUhK7kYT9nbE9182eQ91xHwzrNeXLoL7-Gooo9OYeQ93W40S816Iso8GGzmOhO7qg8y-380y7LAkoVDizZYf6bmGw%3D)

Fellow Patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican**.

I’m helping to change that narrative. **I’m not a “coconut”** - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. **My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District.** Until I flipped this seat in 2022, a Republican had literally never held this seat in Congress.

The first time I ran for this seat back in 2020, **we fell short by a mere 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter – I never give up. I ran again in 2022 and defeated a progressive socialist, **flipping this seat for the first time in 120 years.** Now, the socialist is back for a rematch and this time around I'm charged with keeping this seat Republican. It would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in a couple dollars right now to help keep this Hispanic Republican from TEXAS in the the U.S. House!

[ ** Support a Hispanic Republican
Donate Today ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=36ba85f9f1dd4bed8d7e4e116df46055&_e=zrvbD2V2R2NnByNYiH-G4Vp772N7T1FJH-3Nl-tGU_JwxkN37D3fmNqWsJdXh4E-3SysqAxbKilwV1RuCzCK-kVsSe0apJMOzgvxjly-uueN-mc5GWtdydvqqwIYuxOJ0XeWxm8f49UwBXWl_YIJzRHjSFxAs8LHR384FYd3YzdwkVR1gXGY94BIbCdDRdThjad5t-pxatT1ICqoO0s_RahOUoVUueWAufHnJkgxUkqPfUvU4vG-Fi-lONcUyHwOpxFHN1nbZ2zQiKW6dLNEAqT1mb0_Xds3FDxtDK18HEv8M_2UAfShpD3kQuoJbfFtv3-qkXuxnqkmX7jDJ4TNgWIFm8X9z4mK8Ur3fX0snPVn5znt6Tz-jNjuK0Rf0wYsqTYregbHL8UfVoa8_l5R3XEYoguOt6amNyM0zkKznYE%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, Speaker Kevin McCarthy, the National Republican Congressional Committee and Texas Right to Life, among others.

As you may have heard, R**epublicans only have a four-seat majority, and to put it plainly, without holding onto this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retake the majority.**

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more!

**We need more brown Republican women of color**.

**[Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=36ba85f9f1dd4bed8d7e4e116df46055&_e=zrvbD2V2R2NnByNYiH-G4Vp772N7T1FJH-3Nl-tGU_JwxkN37D3fmNqWsJdXh4E-3SysqAxbKilwV1RuCzCK-kVsSe0apJMOzgvxjly-uueN-mc5GWtdydvqqwIYuxOJ0XeWxm8f49UwBXWl_YIJzRHjSFxAs8LHR384FYd3YzdwkVR1gXGY94BIbCdDRdThjad5t-pxatT1ICqoO0s_RahOUoVUueWAufHnJkgxUkqPfUvU4vG-Fi-lONcUyHwOpxFHN1nbZ2zQiKW6dLNEAiKhPb5ZNAr2cZWEbHK4tX8pKVpcnigjBlMNkWNgUEh1TiPkgzveJLNeIujNa1I4fnug1sWKx5V0osyE1lhZj2blt0QWjD509zpU3kz-K4kdm2twQmABA7kaxmfYxasP1t6jC_ahXPuYwhRkIVI_QHo%3D)**

**Culturally, Hispanics are conservative** : most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. **For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party**. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ours for the taking – _**if we can keep our eye on the prize and our message to voters clear and concise**_. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, **[invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=36ba85f9f1dd4bed8d7e4e116df46055&_e=zrvbD2V2R2NnByNYiH-G4Vp772N7T1FJH-3Nl-tGU_JwxkN37D3fmNqWsJdXh4E-3SysqAxbKilwV1RuCzCK-kVsSe0apJMOzgvxjly-uueN-mc5GWtdydvqqwIYuxOJ0XeWxm8f49UwBXWl_YIJzRHjSFxAs8LHR384FYd3YzdwkVR1gXGY94BIbCdDRdThjad5t-pxatT1ICqoO0s_RahOUoVUueWAufHnJkgxUkqPfUvU4vG-Fi-lONcUyHwOpxFHN1nbZ2zQiKW6dLNEAq0WVUx_3jlRjN1FuJuKwE6Eh3as_y_XHhyLZxFc30knd-6XGnTD4how1qQMy12JSl-JEQMkKPDX2RKOuDBX09nA6VoInqmZxw5G5kVkq_X3cGEk0iCgDK3vNQNPW5mpWMxSSjD0z7TmBDngSpOZqwE%3D)**.

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “ _**If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now**_.”

Help me prove him right.

**Thank you for your time.**

**GET TO KNOW MONICA:** | **Monica De La Cruz successfully flipped Texas'15th Congressional District RED in 2022, becoming the first Republican to represent the district in Congress!**

Monica grew up in the Rio Grande Valley in the border town of Brownsville, TX. Monica and her brother were raised by a single Mom, Norma Alicia. She had a simple life that was built around faith, hard work and family. Her mother raised her with a strong love of country as her grandfather served in the Navy in WWII and her brother served honorably twenty years in the Air Force.

Monica put herself through college while working and graduated from the University of Texas at San Antonio with a BBA in Marketing. After graduation, Monica wanted to further her Spanish language studies and attended La Universidad Nacional Autonoma de Mexico in Mexico City.

Monica owns three successful small businesses and are examples of the American Dream. She believes in giving back to her community and has strong ties through her work with various community service organizations. Monica resides in Edinburg, TX with her two children.

[ ** STAND WITH MONICA ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=36ba85f9f1dd4bed8d7e4e116df46055&_e=zrvbD2V2R2NnByNYiH-G4Vp772N7T1FJH-3Nl-tGU_JwxkN37D3fmNqWsJdXh4E-3SysqAxbKilwV1RuCzCK-kVsSe0apJMOzgvxjly-uueN-mc5GWtdydvqqwIYuxOJ0XeWxm8f49UwBXWl_YIJzRHjSFxAs8LHR384FYd3YzdwkVR1gXGY94BIbCdDRdThjad5t-pxatT1ICqoO0s_RahOUoVUueWAufHnJkgxUkqPfUvU4vG-Fi-lONcUyHwOpxFHN1nbZ2zQiKW6dLNEAiBCXuJF300NSgzzZw7XyKsZInGzZgFjbPPo2DEV61y4McAhFFCEdR-XRMW9OqEcrupCIawnS97sUuioyx21UTiOelQnC08c0687DxoOOI5r757r9pExPL34zdcGm9M70ePiXIyVw3E45o-uZLdG6II%3D)

clean_body: I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | | Fellow Patriot, Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District. Until I flipped this seat in 2022, a Republican had literally never held this seat in Congress. The first time I ran for this seat back in 2020, we fell short by a mere 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter – I never give up. I ran again in 2022 and defeated a progressive socialist, flipping this seat for the first time in 120 years. Now, the socialist is back for a rematch and this time around I'm charged with keeping this seat Republican. It would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in a couple dollars right now to help keep this Hispanic Republican from TEXAS in the the U.S. House! I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, Speaker Kevin McCarthy, the National Republican Congressional Committee and Texas Right to Life, among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only have a four-seat majority, and to put it plainly, without holding onto this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retake the majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Hispanics are conservative : most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ours for the taking – if we can keep our eye on the prize and our message to voters clear and concise. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, . Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “ If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. name: George Whitesides
subject: Taming California’s megafires.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64432396/410034360/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE5NjZjNC05YTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt5yL6gCUuLy-TiAqIgYgCKGa0QU_WMnXppvT2KFiGw=)
Peter,

The wildfire crisis is one of the most pressing environmental issues we face in California. This past week, the _Danny Fire_ broke out in the Antelope Valley and burned nearly 1,600 acres due to high winds.

Each year, megafires cause billions of dollars in damages to communities and businesses. They threaten aquifers and incinerate biodiversity — not to mention the huge impact they have on carbon emissions. Our leaders need to do more to address this issue, and throwing more money at the problem isn’t enough.

You may not know this, but at NASA where I served as Chief of Staff, we did much more than just space exploration. The agency is tasked with studying the climate and tracking wildfires. During my time there, I became uniquely familiar with the scope of the wildfire crisis we face.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64432397/410034361/1224595648?refcode=em-6.6.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE5NjZjNC05YTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt5yL6gCUuLy-TiAqIgYgCKGa0QU_WMnXppvT2KFiGw=) _From a TED talk I gave about using satellite technology to combat wildfires._
That’s a big reason why I co-founded multiple efforts to help our nation's wildfire crisis, including the first organization dedicated to solving our nation’s megafire crisis. I've worked with teams of fire professionals, policymakers and activists to find lasting solutions to end the megafire crisis. This includes improvements in early detection with better satellites and remote sensing. It also means getting smart about prescribed burns to clear brush and prevent larger, more dangerous fires.

**In Congress, I’ll advance meaningful policies to protect our district and state from megafires that put lives and livelihoods at risk.**

[**I need your help to get there. Please send in $3 or more to support my campaign for Congress in CA-27. Every dollar matters in a district as competitive as ours.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64432398/410034362/1224595648?refcode=em-6.6.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE5NjZjNC05YTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt5yL6gCUuLy-TiAqIgYgCKGa0QU_WMnXppvT2KFiGw=)

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: 500,000 veterans.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64432474/410034666/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTlkMTQ0NS05YjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV3IhrPc7fW8SVQsxeRXLdPQsecBEd67Gd2M-CVV03s=)
Peter.

Did you know there are over 500,000 veterans living in Illinois? A big portion of our state’s population has served this country courageously, and they deserve our utmost respect and appreciation. Our veterans also deserve to thrive in their daily lives – and the government has a role in making that happen.

That’s why for 75 years, Congress has funded special grants to expand accessible housing for disabled veterans. In fact, Rockford’s Laurent House, designed by Frank Lloyd Wright, was built with one of the first such grants. I was honored to be in Rockford last week to celebrate the 75th anniversary of this important program.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64432475/410034667/2025372899?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTlkMTQ0NS05YjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV3IhrPc7fW8SVQsxeRXLdPQsecBEd67Gd2M-CVV03s=&emci=8b9d1445-9b04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=959d1445-9b04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)
_Marking the 75th anniversary of the Specially Adapted Housing grant program in Rockford._
**Peter – Our veterans must be able to live comfortably, and it’s Congress’s job to make sure that we not only have the backs of the people who put everything on the line for us, but we give them access to the services and the care that they deserve.**

**[As I write this, I’m working on legislation in Congress to increase funding for veterans’ housing improvement projects. You can show your support for this proposal, and for our thousands of veteran neighbors, by signing the petition below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64432476/410034668/2025372899?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTlkMTQ0NS05YjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV3IhrPc7fW8SVQsxeRXLdPQsecBEd67Gd2M-CVV03s=&emci=8b9d1445-9b04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=959d1445-9b04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)**
| [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64432477/410034669/2025372899?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTlkMTQ0NS05YjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV3IhrPc7fW8SVQsxeRXLdPQsecBEd67Gd2M-CVV03s=&emci=8b9d1445-9b04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=959d1445-9b04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)

– Eric

body:

I wanted you to hear it first. **My name is Mia Mason, and I am running for Congress in Maryland's 6th District.** I'm a 20-year military veteran with five completed combat tours under my belt, and I am looking to be the first-ever trans woman elected to Congress. Let me tell you more about myself, but right now I'm asking if you will step up and become a founding donor of this historic campaign?
---
| | [ Become a Founding Donor! ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=18717.101.1.8fdf8fa4dc019e71c0fc772715cd7d05&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE3MzkwMjM4OC0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My01Nzc0ZDcxMGZhYzI3NGMwM2U0YjcwNDBkNGJkMDRmNDhhYzNkYTBmIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjE4NzE3In0=)
---
My story is like so many of those that made me decide to run for public office. So many people in so many communities feel left behind, unseen, and unheard. I'm committed to the visibility of the LGBTQIA community and to the advancement of rights for all of us. We deserve a voice in Congress that offers us the opportunity to be seen and heard exactly as we are. I know that we all have much more in common than the radical right would have us believe, and when we work together, we can ensure that our needs are met, and our representatives are doing the job they were sent to Washington to do. But it's not enough to say you will get the job done - it starts with action. After my military career, I have worked alongside essential healthcare workers during the pandemic to aid in vaccinating Marylanders. I also worked building warehouses in the spirit of President Biden's "Build Back Better" to see that there were jobs waiting for those ready to get back to work in my state. I've worked alongside advocacy groups to pursue equality and civil rights for all. I have also served on the Maryland Democratic Party LGBTQ+ Diversity Leadership Council as chair and pushed back against former President Trump's attempts to ban transgender servicemembers from being in our military. I say all of this so you know that I am ready to deliver for Maryland's sixth district and be a voice for all of us. Making history is never easy, but this fight is worth it. [**Please consider joining me and be a part of this historic campaign, chip in $24 or more today as a founding donor!**](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=18717.102.1.7eebb96df95a54735649cb8975d414d7&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE3MzkwMjM4OC0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My01Nzc0ZDcxMGZhYzI3NGMwM2U0YjcwNDBkNGJkMDRmNDhhYzNkYTBmIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjE4NzE3In0=) *If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: I wanted you to hear it first. My name is Mia Mason, and I am running for Congress in Maryland's 6th District. I'm a 20-year military veteran with f | | = | I wanted you to hear it first. My name is Mia Mason, and I am running for Congress in Maryland's 6th District. I'm a 20-year military veteran with five completed combat tours under my belt, and I am looking to be the first-ever trans woman elected to Congress. Let me tell you more about myself, but right now I'm asking if you will step up and become a founding donor of this historic campaign? | | = My story is like so many of those that made me decide to run for public office. So many people in so many communities feel left behind, unseen, and unheard. I'm committed to the visibility of the LGBTQIA community and to the advancement of rights for all of us. We deserve a voice in Congress that offers us the opportunity to be seen and heard exactly as we are. I know that we all have much more in common than the radical right would have us believe, and when we work together, we can ensure that our needs are met, and our representatives are doing the job they were sent to Washington to do. But it's not enough to say you will get the job done - it starts with action. After my military career, I have worked alongside essential healthcare workers during the pandemic to aid in vaccinating Marylanders. I also worked building warehouses in the spirit of President Biden's "Build Back Better" to see that there were jobs waiting for those ready to get back to work in my state. I've worked alongside advocacy groups to pursue equality and civil rights for all. I have also served on the Maryland Democratic Party LGBTQ+ Diversity Leadership Council as chair and pushed back against former President Trump's attempts to ban transgender servicemembers from being in our military. I say all of this so you know that I am ready to deliver for Maryland's sixth district and be a voice for all of us. Making history is never easy, but this fight is worth it. = *If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = We can see to it that we all have a voice and that we are represented. You are so appreciated. Thank you. ▪ Mia Mason | ▪ | Mia Mason ---|--- "Facebook" "Instagram" "Twitter" "YouTube" ©2023 Mia Mason for Congress | 1597 bowis dr, po box 124, Point of Rocks, MD, 21777 | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

| | Dear Peter, Just over a month ago, you elected me as the new Chair of the Massachusetts Democratic Party and I can’t thank you enough for this extraordinary opportunity. I truly believe that our party's success is crucial right now. And to keep us moving forward, I want to hear from you about how we can improve our communication with you. We **need** to know how we can better support you, so that we can continue to build a Massachusetts where everyone can succeed, no matter your background or zip code. Let's work together and make it happen! name: Tim Scott [Personal]
subject: Why I’m running for President What led me to this moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They’re promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they’re indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zce6qgp99ljfc6bbm67oa2gokagqk7s0gr50a6i0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend,

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. And I wouldn't ask for it to be any other way.

Charleston is home to me. It's where I grew up, it's where I learned to play football, and it's where I learned to be a man of faith and conservative values.

It's all of these things that I learned in Charleston that have led me to this exact moment: **I 'm officially running for President of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT ME HERE](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm7tfa7udnqtfigu87i9tqrsg93o81th0i63a4m0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "SUPPORT ME HERE")
---

Today, our country is being tested. Once again, our divisions run deep and the threat to our future is real. Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They're promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they're indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

And all too often when they get called out for their failures they weaponize race to divide us... to hold onto their power. When I fought back against their liberal agenda they called me a prop. A token. Because I disrupt their narrative. I threaten their control.

And that's how I know I'm doing something right. And that's why I will continue to fight because I believe America's best days are ahead of us.

**_[So, Friend, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I'm going to need every single person who believes we can get America BACK ON TRACK and I'm really counting on you to chip in to kick this off. I hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmtq3db70qanngttgnd2is0d7n0llin4am4gsmng_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "So, Friend, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I’m going to need every single person who believes we can get America BACK ON TRACK and I’m really counting on you to chip in to kick this off. I hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.")_**

---
| | | [YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqcjkfhvucv9jqla6aq2ohk5n6alum9msb7q37u8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!")
---

God bless you,
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn485pl2j15hahpk6n21tvqb66c37do7khilard0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsmh4cjm5ientv4csrq51bl7jmnv3usjon4tvmeg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn5qam7ril6c48fu7anus24hipm4lbso2s7q0dlo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu4i1cl5eos9rdc673cf77pjn3gd97jqo42sk768_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9t3pl593lmhfp9mo0kuirqqjvg5t26795gm4uu8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4oj1cdh2bs "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim
---

---
| | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
---

7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312
North Charleston, SC 29406

Deroy Murdock

name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25889%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3i1SbSrINRRB%2bo1T2%2f9ZHw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25880%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GYG6xZhSDz%2fxpBPg93E3Jw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25881%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cLLDZyl4ILFLUlp%2fzRJozw&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Chiefs Kicker Harrison Butker Photobombs Biden With 'Based' Pro-Life Tie and Pin
body:

name: Tim Scott [Personal]
subject: Why I’m running for President What led me to this moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They’re promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they’re indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbu4k7gkeosnkamhd35ibhtiv6gajcg5qk7f8ukg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend,

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. And I wouldn't ask for it to be any other way.

Charleston is home to me. It's where I grew up, it's where I learned to play football, and it's where I learned to be a man of faith and conservative values.

It's all of these things that I learned in Charleston that have led me to this exact moment: **I 'm officially running for President of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT ME HERE](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm18c14ti7ntupoimghm7q7b2h831r0jl02e3398_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "SUPPORT ME HERE")
---

Today, our country is being tested. Once again, our divisions run deep and the threat to our future is real. Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They're promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they're indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

And all too often when they get called out for their failures they weaponize race to divide us... to hold onto their power. When I fought back against their liberal agenda they called me a prop. A token. Because I disrupt their narrative. I threaten their control.

And that's how I know I'm doing something right. And that's why I will continue to fight because I believe America's best days are ahead of us.

**_[So, Friend, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I'm going to need every single person who believes we can get America BACK ON TRACK and I'm really counting on you to chip in to kick this off. I hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3lppr7jpo7s31ph1ph56065gahv4g5ftklb4n5g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "So, Friend, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I’m going to need every single person who believes we can get America BACK ON TRACK and I’m really counting on you to chip in to kick this off. I hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.")_**

---
| | | [YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zohhj45q875or95o9tplfdhssrurlaq3iu0sek5g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!")
---

God bless you,
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2tigsd07c9qmcqdhp81hjejtgps1i0596ls8rm0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zspm8qnnk2gut8kudtilet4q74cc3kqedlnvbv2g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zaufjbnkughlndupd9u0vco64edk731lvn2df33o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi40qvl841d1fh97ac25tb9b742lu6sjrr8jq5no_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk4rle7iru89tdom6hqv437lqctfs60es897fmhg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim
---

---
| | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
---

7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312
North Charleston, SC 29406

[Privacy Policy](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4dfd0d99aeu9cjc3vskct6odufnpk80hrbhpkto_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs)

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zug1kkulnusa2tgki4vl5c2deelbpqtsu1ofrvig_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34cthmaor24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc7hkueenib4d11ddlr4cqtc9s0unajdjut1g9mg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1ie4ob2cth2bs)_

Peter – It's Senator JD Vance, and we need to talk about Ohio and the Senate.

It makes no sense that a red state like Ohio would have a failed leftist insider like Sherrod Brown as a Senator.

Ohio needs outsiders – folks like me and my friend, **Bernie Moreno** – to help take back the Senate majority and undo the damage of the Biden Administration.

**That’s why I’m proud to endorse Bernie Moreno to win Ohio’s other Senate seat in 2024.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7829d6410eee40019eca9f8201547738&_e=PWfbtloycKA8YU3a8uiEm_bB-GeQZfrErou1FmmAclT2-oVtykt_7j-Zn6BMKBVs5uARnkxHobXa4otXwB8ZqQyyejUx3XhVe8seGD5splvadCs1Za7jsNxLwdSRGiMEUJfmzGByAednIeBlVwvXrZ9bwvc56by-hVRqS47fxwdUKGkwDV3sqRdrv0LO2llbmeT6PAsil-mCgmM6zsL7Tfy7wBZsdP3AaJh884Bd-__xDKCt5G_cNbgEB6ZiYSBGogxmATMx0prDrue1osQ67SjI9_osJ1fqOn6RkmG-VyyWPn9sz7IpgYeEnBdqAZOjcuLLXFjknj-LiTcYMErkzDEWQpLfmoX8ufIDFGNwl9MyGiGKt0BJ7zu6KezAhfEtNHYfVzKNsKWBjdPAIIEJzg%3D%3D)
Bernie immigrated to the U.S. from Colombia at the age of five. His family believed so strongly in the American dream that they picked up their lives and moved here to start again.

He’s a businessman who has created thousands of jobs in Ohio. He’s an outsider, not a career politician – which means he doesn’t count on millions of dollars in special interest money; he needs the support of grassroots conservatives like you, Peter.

[**Will you join me in supporting Bernie Moreno to flip Ohio’s other Senate seat and win back a GOP Senate majority by contributing to his campaign?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7829d6410eee40019eca9f8201547738&_e=PWfbtloycKA8YU3a8uiEm_bB-GeQZfrErou1FmmAclT2-oVtykt_7j-Zn6BMKBVs5uARnkxHobXa4otXwB8ZqQyyejUx3XhVe8seGD5splvadCs1Za7jsNxLwdSRGiMEUJfmzGByAednIeBlVwvXrZ9bwvc56by-hVRqS47fxwdUKGkwDV3sqRdrv0LO2llbmeT6PAsil-mCgmM6zsL7Tfy7wBZsdP3AaJh884Bd-__xDKCt5G_cNbgEB6ZiYSBGeBX3VhJneRbsfcv0rTAcfLndikJIoJft0avydM0abhSx-aPepldjdXGIbfxD_m0TS-KFN2ndAUbYG4RB5fKLfOgmb5p1JejvS2fT1qqCrmrmPPXz6Tqrb3-awcdmhuW9DBUyXId4a5ardoKp00g7tw%3D%3D)

[ ** JOIN SEN. VANCE ➞ SUPPORT BERNIE MORENO **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7829d6410eee40019eca9f8201547738&_e=PWfbtloycKA8YU3a8uiEm_bB-GeQZfrErou1FmmAclT2-oVtykt_7j-Zn6BMKBVs5uARnkxHobXa4otXwB8ZqQyyejUx3XhVe8seGD5splvadCs1Za7jsNxLwdSRGiMEUJfmzGByAednIeBlVwvXrZ9bwvc56by-hVRqS47fxwdUKGkwDV3sqRdrv0LO2llbmeT6PAsil-mCgmM6zsL7Tfy7wBZsdP3AaJh884Bd-__xDKCt5G_cNbgEB6ZiYSBGZYnWs_WX-bLdzPqOmtTEQWNT8qPtok6cglx1gxqk1IqKWaq-45tIOwkzd9qnWX6PBjdbuCuTpXTUIIlebIfXph5a27h42qX2Djy7qUzLO78IM8IIOQzanMjL02iUDILmQz95T13Y8OwllsNoWyBzMA%3D%3D)
Bernie has lived the American Dream and will do whatever it takes to keep it alive. He's fighting against toxic leftist ideology, the Chinese Communist Party, and Mexican drug cartels – whatever it takes to protect our nation.

He's ready to give back to the country that has allowed him so much happiness, freedom, and success.

I'm proud to put my support behind Bernie Moreno, and I'm hoping you will too. [**Will you please join me in helping Bernie flip this seat red by making an investment in his campaign today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7829d6410eee40019eca9f8201547738&_e=PWfbtloycKA8YU3a8uiEm_bB-GeQZfrErou1FmmAclT2-oVtykt_7j-Zn6BMKBVs5uARnkxHobXa4otXwB8ZqQyyejUx3XhVe8seGD5splvadCs1Za7jsNxLwdSRGiMEUJfmzGByAednIeBlVwvXrZ9bwvc56by-hVRqS47fxwdUKGkwDV3sqRdrv0LO2llbmeT6PAsil-mCgmM6zsL7Tfy7wBZsdP3AaJh884Bd-__xDKCt5G_cNbgEB6ZiYSBG097i5JpvjPsiq15v78a4Hf3C5CuAWdczxAgqgWN7lwgnJDKBP2cjgyGYZZZRn0XvzOWrB5mjyMjEP2sn5CRaYJ4JrICptyssMTilPZ3E7YQC9hwRHwqoEmWKpKE9QzPVfYzhDyIU2ob3eD0AkcuYIg%3D%3D)

If we give all of our support to the right candidate, we can beat Sherrod Brown and take back the Senate majority – **Bernie Moreno is that candidate**.

Every American needs Bernie in the Senate. Not only will he help take back the Republican Senate majority, but it he will help clean up the mess left behind by the Biden Administration and Democrat insiders. [**I hope I can rely on you to step up and support Bernie today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7829d6410eee40019eca9f8201547738&_e=PWfbtloycKA8YU3a8uiEm_bB-GeQZfrErou1FmmAclT2-oVtykt_7j-Zn6BMKBVs5uARnkxHobXa4otXwB8ZqQyyejUx3XhVe8seGD5splvadCs1Za7jsNxLwdSRGiMEUJfmzGByAednIeBlVwvXrZ9bwvc56by-hVRqS47fxwdUKGkwDV3sqRdrv0LO2llbmeT6PAsil-mCgmM6zsL7Tfy7wBZsdP3AaJh884Bd-__xDKCt5G_cNbgEB6ZiYSBGaA6neSSpjtauRQQ43ob7bsTPoljCezxFIBKy1aUdldslJTCf_w9YnEblKxYFctwIe2r3-TV4HHnNT8mGjWo88CPSIhko0cTCwexpCgqN0yRZYv1julmp_F2xWiLalXlWN983FnlAj90MA99N2wB1sw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

JD Vance
Senator, Ohio

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.
