clean_body: I'm proud to put my support behind Bernie Moreno, and I'm hoping you will too. | | Peter – It's Senator JD Vance, and we need to talk about Ohio and the Senate. It makes no sense that a red state like Ohio would have a failed leftist insider like Sherrod Brown as a Senator. Ohio needs outsiders – folks like me and my friend, Bernie Moreno – to help take back the Senate majority and undo the damage of the Biden Administration. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Bernie Moreno to win Ohio’s other Senate seat in 2024. Bernie immigrated to the U.S. from Colombia at the age of five. His family believed so strongly in the American dream that they picked up their lives and moved here to start again. He’s a businessman who has created thousands of jobs in Ohio. He’s an outsider, not a career politician – which means he doesn’t count on millions of dollars in special interest money; he needs the support of grassroots conservatives like you, Peter. Bernie has lived the American Dream and will do whatever it takes to keep it alive. He's fighting against toxic leftist ideology, the Chinese Communist Party, and Mexican drug cartels – whatever it takes to protect our nation. He's ready to give back to the country that has allowed him so much happiness, freedom, and success. I'm proud to put my support behind Bernie Moreno, and I'm hoping you will too. If we give all of our support to the right candidate, we can beat Sherrod Brown and take back the Senate majority – Bernie Moreno is that candidate. Every American needs Bernie in the Senate. Not only will he help take back the Republican Senate majority, but it he will help clean up the mess left behind by the Biden Administration and Democrat insiders. Thank you, JD Vance Senator, Ohio Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

| | | **If everyone reading this message makes a small donation today, we'll be on track to meeting our June goal. But we can estimate that 83% of people who receive this email won’t it, and even fewer will be able to chip in.** So if you are one of the few people who can make a contribution today, it will go a long, long way. Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp recently signed Board of Elections takeover bills into law in three counties, which would remove lawfully appointed Black members and Democrats from their ranks. These laws are specifically designed to deny voters a voice and overturn the results of democratically held elections. We’re using the donations we receive from this email to mitigate the impacts of these anti-democratic attacks by mobilizing activists to advocate against Republican takeovers, training our Democracy Watch volunteers to advocate for voting access in county Board of Election meetings, and more. clean_body: If you are one of the few people who can make a contribution today, it will go a long, long way. | | | | If everyone reading this message makes a small donation today, we'll be on track to meeting our June goal. But we can estimate that 83% of people who receive this email won’t it, and even fewer will be able to chip in. So if you are one of the few people who can make a contribution today, it will go a long, long way. Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp recently signed Board of Elections takeover bills into law in three counties, which would remove lawfully appointed Black members and Democrats from their ranks. These laws are specifically designed to deny voters a voice and overturn the results of democratically held elections. We’re using the donations we receive from this email to mitigate the impacts of these anti-democratic attacks by mobilizing activists to advocate against Republican takeovers, training our Democracy Watch volunteers to advocate for voting access in county Board of Election meetings, and more. = | = We’re grateful for your support, no matter how much or how often you’re able to donate. Thanks for being a part of this pro-voter movement. Let’s keep up the fight, The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: “Isn’t this what we truly want?!”
body:
The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) recently visited schools in Michigan.

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec467d7c774b4caca5f075c20362ff60&_e=3AUZRT9bKPp8X4TwhCVzV1wfkFv_oj5Cz3fB1kh9ae2BycEyOX9V9W2YtyEh6_9e_4xXrC_z-Rz1Az145b_A-aEs1Ov44QxoTdddfK-RmfFNR7CEM85LUlG6KiW2AQ701riNsOTjszSh4xliUyH6oHCY8c2jHZECK83C9pCB0fuqTRMRsJcUE9qMZv9KqJQkOhUtyZHqumSnjQkV3ZvqOBqEge_5QCBbUhyP2azzutxVTuzLKYF_NXTjsmL-gnflBUinAccIgU0UbANQb-8vkc3R0DtEQOBvWTVyCkW9o1CwmbjSdVQcPAF40zc2gau5)

Friend,

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) recently visited schools in Michigan. -- and do you know what we found?

A majority of kids are eager for REAL education in schools. They are hungry for the truth. They want solutions for the problems that impact their peers. But they don't have anyone to give them direction.

**That 's why FEE is teaching students how to create the change they want to see and empowering them to take action.**

Through FEE's Revolution of One initiative, we teach students that entrepreneurship and limited government can radically improve their lives and communities.

At Revolution of One workshops, students engage with entrepreneurs, artists, and influencers who bring a rich background of expertise to the classroom while demonstrating that voluntary economic opportunity and fewer barriers to entry are the keys to prosperity.

I want to reach more students with this exciting program. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of the week to support FEE's Revolution of One. [Will you empower the next generation by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or even 100 today? Click here >>>](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec467d7c774b4caca5f075c20362ff60&_e=3AUZRT9bKPp8X4TwhCVzV1wfkFv_oj5Cz3fB1kh9ae2BycEyOX9V9W2YtyEh6_9e_4xXrC_z-Rz1Az145b_A-aEs1Ov44QxoTdddfK-RmfFNR7CEM85LUlG6KiW2AQ701riNsOTjszSh4xliUyH6oHCY8c2jHZECK83C9pCB0fufZJYscvK7AH0et5ChiryPWeozCpAvrcN1qxacERHL48A_03jq15ZRfMTI-TZASd4EeSWts8nbqcteMps3TotMC3wX4dAL-97dObLztYoNX69vbZ8SYhCgYITGSetpPDPZ4qOrWplGtOkW_YfL1oRH)

Tunji Adebayo at FEE was invited to talk about economic empowerment for six schools in Michigan.

You'd be surprised how just one speaker can influence the next generation. Just look at how many students Tunji reached during his tour.

Davis Jr. High School - 465 students
Heritage Jr. High School - 429 students
Jeannette Jr. High School - 533 students
Eppler Jr. High School - 578 students
Malow Jr. High School - 1,050 students
Federal Reserve - 150 students

**Tunji connected deeply with 3,205 students about how free markets and individual liberty lift society out of poverty! That's a massive impact in just one state.**

And here's what one of the teachers at Eppler Jr. High School had to say,
_" Thank you so very much for being with us at Eppler yesterday! We are so very grateful to you for sharing your message with our students! It was very well received. As I talked to our students through the day, they all said it was "fun," "great," and "cool." But **one young man summed it up by saying, "Mr. P., that man has me really thinking!" Isn't that what we truly want?!** We'd love to have you visit again next year!"_
[Just one donation](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec467d7c774b4caca5f075c20362ff60&_e=3AUZRT9bKPp8X4TwhCVzV1wfkFv_oj5Cz3fB1kh9ae2BycEyOX9V9W2YtyEh6_9e_4xXrC_z-Rz1Az145b_A-aEs1Ov44QxoTdddfK-RmfFNR7CEM85LUlG6KiW2AQ701riNsOTjszSh4xliUyH6oHCY8c2jHZECK83C9pCB0fumdjbIzuQmGcg9oM7zA9EMeso8wDP4Xzrb8G88mZAkG7OiVfirFjx_P_iz3h12a9NI1ad9fShq6jEb8Cg1SGWd1bdsgPVaq7RyzWLh3szKrEK-oY1jsqcSC18Mew6Z2WGV4CHKGXIrrupgtSxCm3r0) can change the lives of so many young Americans, as proven above.

[Your generous gift helps FEE inspire a love of liberty in the hearts and minds of students across the country. Please consider donating today >>>](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec467d7c774b4caca5f075c20362ff60&_e=3AUZRT9bKPp8X4TwhCVzV1wfkFv_oj5Cz3fB1kh9ae2BycEyOX9V9W2YtyEh6_9e_4xXrC_z-Rz1Az145b_A-aEs1Ov44QxoTdddfK-RmfFNR7CEM85LUlG6KiW2AQ701riNsOTjszSh4xliUyH6oHCY8c2jHZECK83C9pCB0fve9_FsUp8E8yKrd4aXNYeQOCJ314i-p_YusQ3tTepiM1JPF8Msg6Ftbje1kX9I6pS_Vm3czz49xnOFNixhrlXpxMJikEUWmwJMLvWr5lDtqRdEqRKkvOF690Ug1HoJSrxWjlz5LQr0GitgmR8ocYYk)

Will you join me as we empower the next generation to embrace the ideas of liberty? **Click below to send your urgent support.**

clean_body: The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) recently visited schools in Michigan. Friend, The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) recently visited schools in Michigan. -- and do you know what we found? A majority of kids are eager for REAL education in schools. They are hungry for the truth. They want solutions for the problems that impact their peers. But they don't have anyone to give them direction. That 's why FEE is teaching students how to create the change they want to see and empowering them to take action. Through FEE's Revolution of One initiative, we teach students that entrepreneurship and limited government can radically improve their lives and communities. At Revolution of One workshops, students engage with entrepreneurs, artists, and influencers who bring a rich background of expertise to the classroom while demonstrating that voluntary economic opportunity and fewer barriers to entry are the keys to prosperity. I want to reach more students with this exciting program. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of the week to support FEE's Revolution of One. Tunji Adebayo at FEE was invited to talk about economic empowerment for six schools in Michigan. You'd be surprised how just one speaker can influence the next generation. Just look at how many students Tunji reached during his tour. Davis Jr. High School - 465 students Heritage Jr. High School - 429 students Jeannette Jr. High School - 533 students Eppler Jr. High School - 578 students Malow Jr. High School - 1,050 students Federal Reserve - 150 students Tunji connected deeply with 3,205 students about how free markets and individual liberty lift society out of poverty! That's a massive impact in just one state. And here's what one of the teachers at Eppler Jr. High School had to say, " Thank you so very much for being with us at Eppler yesterday! We are so very grateful to you for sharing your message with our students! It was very well received. As I talked to our students through the day, they all said it was "fun," "great," and "cool." But one young man summed it up by saying, "Mr. P., that man has me really thinking!" Isn't that what we truly want?! We'd love to have you visit again next year!" can change the lives of so many young Americans, as proven above. Will you join me as we empower the next generation to embrace the ideas of liberty? Click below to send your urgent support. Thank you, Lawrence Reed President Emeritus FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. Peter,
Today, we commemorate a monumental moment in history—the anniversary of D-Day, the Allied invasion of Normandy during World War II.

D-Day marked a turning point in the war against tyranny and oppression. Thousands of soldiers from the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and other Allied nations stormed the beaches of Normandy, facing treacherous obstacles and relentless enemy fire. Their indomitable spirit, determination, and unwavering commitment to freedom allowed them to secure a foothold in Europe and pave the way for the eventual liberation of the continent.

Today, we honor the memory of the brave soldiers who fought on that fateful day, recognizing their heroic actions that shaped the course of history. Their selflessness, unity, and sense of duty serve as shining examples for all of us, reminding us of the values we hold dear and the lengths we are willing to go to defend them.

Let us take a moment to express our gratitude to the veterans and their families who bore the weight of war, and let us honor the memory of those who made the ultimate sacrifice. Their bravery and resilience should serve as a guiding light as we continue to build a better future for our nation.

May we forever cherish the memory of those who fought for our freedom.

clean_body: | | | | \- - -| Peter, Today, we commemorate a monumental moment in history—the anniversary of D-Day, the Allied invasion of Normandy during World War II. D-Day marked a turning point in the war against tyranny and oppression. Thousands of soldiers from the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and other Allied nations stormed the beaches of Normandy, facing treacherous obstacles and relentless enemy fire. Their indomitable spirit, determination, and unwavering commitment to freedom allowed them to secure a foothold in Europe and pave the way for the eventual liberation of the continent. Today, we honor the memory of the brave soldiers who fought on that fateful day, recognizing their heroic actions that shaped the course of history. Their selflessness, unity, and sense of duty serve as shining examples for all of us, reminding us of the values we hold dear and the lengths we are willing to go to defend them. Let us take a moment to express our gratitude to the veterans and their families who bore the weight of war, and let us honor the memory of those who made the ultimate sacrifice. Their bravery and resilience should serve as a guiding light as we continue to build a better future for our nation. May we forever cherish the memory of those who fought for our freedom. Sincerely, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

Fellow American,

My mom was a schoolteacher growing up. Every single day she got up and went to educate the next generation of leaders... and she always told me, _**"Nothing will work unless you do".**_

And it is exactly what I’ve been doing since I was 17 when I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table.

Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also earned my high school diploma by taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it.

**Well, Fellow American, I took those same ideals I learned as a Waffle House waitress to Congress. I refuse to waiver to what anyone wants other than the constituents I was elected by,_even if it means pissing off some party members along the way._**

[** ****SEND A HARD-WORKING WOMAN TO CONGRESS » **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9fb38dbd5598455dbac3365f770f46cf&_e=dQYjnUNeUgotlt86-jDhncwS21yBuSLYqSVFmgC0JOVzt0Blz3ZNWAsWMKVTwAhyWw9dFwW45PkOmrIPXGgLqyzA-aLu9dDSMV1buL15y_w4FmO9ykEw2kO201YBJ-xkidkjfSzHQ_BZ1Rs4vpdo17NdfI9-NONTi2Phjl0931pRgW2XbHrsgpn2eI2wQozNM151DQHPnFCxayjxqG6qBL59BVVewG84Ft83kCmk0eiGUkM3JxV2m80_7g69Xb9jWdOEfPtNTST4I61euCx8jJ6J4PSNYbhmHIP_YaNaisXv4uOpGI-qeu7M-od3S39qYYs5ocQWBRhSSCYPVQK2iEP9K-Lebe5Xy6WSAvEEgF3BNGliDoXoaVAdIN54vOlf)

[**Congress needs more people like me**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9fb38dbd5598455dbac3365f770f46cf&_e=dQYjnUNeUgotlt86-jDhncwS21yBuSLYqSVFmgC0JOVzt0Blz3ZNWAsWMKVTwAhyWw9dFwW45PkOmrIPXGgLqyzA-aLu9dDSMV1buL15y_w4FmO9ykEw2kO201YBJ-xkidkjfSzHQ_BZ1Rs4vpdo17NdfI9-NONTi2Phjl0931pRgW2XbHrsgpn2eI2wQozNM151DQHPnFCxayjxqG6qBL59BVVewG84Ft83kCmk0eigIc3oxxN3Kc-oEWYVovMrMpH-lV4iiSkh4yMxm2iLEcgyDR0RUzJh3FWHeSe7Od_nxjBf9jH6_ulz4SFcN479fwqHx8x8a_X-gxoP_ojO8V7coyi9bTsl-adT5a9HrwDiOGuex8XxNQPhCZ6221Uw) - someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. _Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices._

Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

clean_body: Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also worked to earn my high school diploma by taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it. | | Fellow American, My mom was a schoolteacher growing up. Every single day she got up and went to educate the next generation of leaders... and she always told me, "Nothing will work unless you do". And it is exactly what I’ve been doing since I was 17 when I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also earned my high school diploma by taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it. Well, Fellow American, I took those same ideals I learned as a Waffle House waitress to Congress. I refuse to waiver to what anyone wants other than the constituents I was elected by,even if it means pissing off some party members along the way. - someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices. I desperately need the help of grassroots supporters just like you to keep this campaign running. In return, I promise to always vote for you, not the hoity-toity, Washington elite who try and buy my votes. For America, Nancy Mace | | About Nancy Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! [](https://go.dscc.org/go/14155?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&akid=11008%2E9716520%2E386e99)
**Should Donald Trump be pardoned?**
| | | [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/14155?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&akid=11008%2E9716520%2E386e99)
---
| [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/14155?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&akid=11008%2E9716520%2E386e99)
---

Team, this is disgraceful: Trump schemed, lied to the American people, got indicted on more than 30 felony counts -- and now Fox News wants to know if he should be PARDONED!

**Conservatives are rallying behind Trump as he runs for president _again,_ and now they’re rushing to get him off the hook for his misdeeds. Democrats everywhere need to speak out immediately.**

We've launched an URGENT Live Poll to find out where Democrats stand. But the poll closes at midnight, and _we’re missing your input._ **Please weigh in now:**

**Should Donald Trump be pardoned?**
| | [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/14155?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&akid=11008%2E9716520%2E386e99)
---
| [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/14155?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230606-BREAKING-TrumpPardon-Pros-sl1&akid=11008%2E9716520%2E386e99)
---

Thanks,

Team DSCC
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=11008_9716520_386e99&akid=11008%2E9716520%2E386e99)**.

name: Callie Barr
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
Running for Congress is no walk in the park, but it's all of your support that keeps me going. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436353/410050474/1201310784?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230531eomtrevor_tj_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ3ODMxNGItYTcwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rfkii0uwI0NSSu5UScJx0wJzPjzLGWJ2tlZBDIM8EfE=&emci=592c2e3b-9004-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7478314b-a704-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)
---
Hey Peter, we just wrapped up another end-of-month fundraising crunch and I just want to say **thank you.** If you chipped in to help us build the campaign we need to win, **thank you.** If you started following the campaign on [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436354/410050475/-1536539804?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ3ODMxNGItYTcwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rfkii0uwI0NSSu5UScJx0wJzPjzLGWJ2tlZBDIM8EfE=&emci=592c2e3b-9004-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7478314b-a704-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413), [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436355/410050476/-2087304172?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ3ODMxNGItYTcwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rfkii0uwI0NSSu5UScJx0wJzPjzLGWJ2tlZBDIM8EfE=&emci=592c2e3b-9004-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7478314b-a704-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413), or [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436356/410050477/536014625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ3ODMxNGItYTcwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rfkii0uwI0NSSu5UScJx0wJzPjzLGWJ2tlZBDIM8EfE=&emci=592c2e3b-9004-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7478314b-a704-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413) to help spread the word, **thank you.** If you told a friend or family member, "Hey, remember Callie Moore from Cheboygan High? Who ran track and married Matt Barr? She's running for Congress!", **thank you.** If you responded to any of our emails or text messages with a kind word, **thank you.** **Running for Congress is no walk in the park, but it's all of your support that keeps me going.** So thank you, Peter. It means so much to know I'm not in this alone. Callie Barr
Candidate for Michigan's 1st Congressional District

name: Katie Porter
subject: A longer message about my oversight work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
In Congress I’m a proud member of the Oversight Committee. But my oversight work began even before I was elected.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24297%2E3422442%2E2JSc97)
Derek, in Congress I’m a proud member of the Oversight Committee. But my oversight work began even before I was elected.
Early in my career, I was a consumer protection attorney. In 2012 I got a call from then Attorney General of California, Kamala Harris. She had secured an $18 billion settlement from Wall Street Banks whose predatory lending practices caused the 2008 mortgage crisis and left 700,000 California families in or near foreclosure. **It was my job as California’s Independent Monitor to make sure people actually got the money the banks owed them.** My team and I held the banks’ feet to the fire and made sure California families received the compensation they were entitled to.
Holding power to account to deliver for California families is still a big part of my job. Oversight is an important (but often overlooked) responsibility of Congress:
* I oversee how our tax dollars are spent. **It’s one thing to pass legislation that creates good programs. It’s another to make sure those programs are run effectively and efficiently.** If people don’t know about a program that could help them, or there are too many hoops to jump through—that program isn’t all that effective and becomes wasteful. When our tax dollars are spent subsidizing Big Oil or lining the defense industry’s pockets, I call it out.
* I also oversee corporations when they harm workers or consumers, and on the first of this year **my new law cracking down on Big Pharma’s price gouging went into effect.**
* I oversee our government officials. When Louis DeJoy was mishandling the Postal Service, we demanded change. When I learned my colleagues in Congress were trading stocks based on the information they learned in Washington, **I introduced legislation to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.**

I’m proud to stand up to CEOs, government officials, and special interest lobbyists who aren’t acting in the best interest of California families. The work of holding power to account is so important, and really does affect our everyday lives.
**[I’m running for Senate because Californians deserve a warrior in Washington to do this work. Consider making a contribution today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230606-1?refcode=EMAI06_1_BIO_20230606_V1_F&refcode2=24297_3422442_2JSc97&akid=24297%2E3422442%2E2JSc97)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230606-1?refcode=EMAI06_1_BIO_20230606_V1_F&refcode2=24297_3422442_2JSc97&akid=24297%2E3422442%2E2JSc97)**
—Katie Porter (proud driver of a minivan whose license plate says ‘OVRSITE’)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230606-1?refcode=EMAI06_1_BIO_20230606_V1_F&refcode2=24297_3422442_2JSc97&akid=24297%2E3422442%2E2JSc97)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI06_1_BIO_20230606_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=24297_3422442_2JSc97&akid=24297%2E3422442%2E2JSc97)**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

| Peter -

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.

So I am asking:

[_**Can you please use this link to split $5, $10, or whatever you can afford between Fight for Progress and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. clean_body: I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate. | Peter - Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me. I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor. So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate. I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch. I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter. The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right. So I am asking: = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, and adiós, Ruben * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Greg Landsman
subject: Why my faith motivated me to enter public service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
I’ve been reflecting a lot on my Jewish faith recently. Last month, I had the honor of joining a bipartisan delegation to travel to Israel for their 75th anniversary – and as a Jewish-American, the experience was profound and truly remarkable.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436729/410052161/1921099384?refcode=res_eng_2023.06.06_b1_gl_no&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTAxODFmOS1hODA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAg9nGl2eyPMuioonL3luCcE0BP31mkO34l91eceMTM=)
---
Friend – I’ve been reflecting a lot on my Jewish faith recently.

Last month, I had the honor of joining a bipartisan delegation to travel to Israel for their 75th anniversary – _and as a Jewish-American, the experience was profound and truly remarkable._

So as we honor the 75th anniversary of the state of Israel, I wanted to take a moment to share a little bit about my Jewish faith and how it has shaped my life.

**My Jewish faith was one of my motivating reasons to enter politics.** Judaism is a religion grounded in the belief of fighting for those who have been left behind – those who are not truly free. The story of Passover, specifically, embedded in me the importance of fighting for justice, fairness, and freedom from a young age. In fact, we named our son Elijah (a central figure in Judaism and the Passover Seder).

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436731/410052163/1921099384?refcode=res_eng_2023.06.06_b1_gl_no&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTAxODFmOS1hODA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAg9nGl2eyPMuioonL3luCcE0BP31mkO34l91eceMTM=)
That's why I entered a career in public service. To answer the call to create a more free, just, and fair nation. To join the fight to deliver for the children and families across our district who have long been left out and left behind. And to work to bend the arc of the moral universe in the direction of justice.

My Judaism has left an indelible mark on my life, and for that, I am eternally grateful.

Thanks for reading. It’s the honor of my life to fight for a more just nation and world in Congress.

Appreciate you,

Greg

_P.S. To keep fighting for freedom, equity, and fairness in Congress, I’m going to need the support of this grassroots team.[**If you are able, will you make a donation to our people-powered campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436734/410052165/1921099384?refcode=res_eng_2023.06.06_b1_gl_no&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTAxODFmOS1hODA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAg9nGl2eyPMuioonL3luCcE0BP31mkO34l91eceMTM=)_

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: standing with the LGBTQI+ Community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
North Carolina is stronger when everyone is free to be who they are and love who they choose.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436869/410052445/-342827316?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230606-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDFhOTUyMC1hOTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOXif1aQVDqsX0_tMDtJmYanDGLjGtOkJ-BSwUPA3po=)
---
| Peter,

I’d like to take a moment to welcome the start of Pride Month and celebrate our LGBTQI+ family, friends, and neighbors in our district and across the country.

This month marks a celebration of community, love, and recognition of the efforts of LGBTQI+ activists to secure equal rights. In what are undoubtedly challenging times, the LGBTQI+ community continues to be a vision of strength and resilience.

North Carolina is stronger when everyone is free to be who they are and love who they choose. In Congress, I will never stop advocating for equal rights for the LGBTQI+ community, including access to healthcare and education.

Amidst a hostile environment for the LGBTQI+ community here in North Carolina and across the country, it is more important than ever to recommit to the fight for LGBTQI+ rights. Today, I invite you to join me in demanding Congress pass the Equality Act to fight back against anti-LGBTQI+ legislation. [_**Will you add your name?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64436870/410052454/-1517712606?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDFhOTUyMC1hOTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOXif1aQVDqsX0_tMDtJmYanDGLjGtOkJ-BSwUPA3po=&emci=d490f319-a904-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=801a9520-a904-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=799895)

Valerie

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: We have to share this pic from PGH Pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
🏳️🌈 🏳️⚧️
#
Hi Derek, it’s John + Gisele, reporting back from Pittsburgh’s 50th Pride celebration this weekend.
Yinz, we *seriously* love Pride!** 🏳️🌈 🏳️⚧️**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-equality-act-email?refcode=em20230606&t=1&akid=8399%2E434096%2EN5kaLr)
_According to our staff, the hardest job in politics is keeping us two moving through a parade._ 🙈
**[We have more to say, but first — please join us in celebrating + supporting LGBTQIA+ Americans by signing our petition in support of the Equality Act. It will only take a second!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-equality-act-email?refcode=em20230606&t=2&akid=8399%2E434096%2EN5kaLr)** ❤️
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-equality-act-email?refcode=em20230602&t=3&akid=8399%2E434096%2EN5kaLr)**
We can’t take any progress for granted, Derek. Case in point: back in 2013, when John was still the Mayor of Braddock, Pennsylvania still banned same-sex marriage.
**We were not going to stand on the wrong side of history.** Which is why John was proud to be the first elected official in western PA to officiate a same-sex wedding.
After 11 years of commitment to each other, right there in our living room, surrounded by loved ones, John officiated the wedding of John Kandry + Bill Gray.
_It was one of the proudest moments of my career, and I promised I would keep marrying these couples until the law changed. —J_
_After all, John + I were able to get married 14 years ago *today* without having to wait even close to 11 years! —G_
**But there is so much more to be done in the fight for equality, Derek.**
Congress still has not found a way to pass the Equality Act into law, ensuring rights and protections for LGBTQIA+ folks across our country. _Until we pass the Equality Act, there will be Americans who can be fired from their job, refused care at a hospital or denied housing because of their sexual orientation or gender identity._ It's ludicrous.
**We must *never* stop pushing for equal protection under the law for every American — and that’s why we’re urging you to join us now in the fight for LGBTQIA+ rights and freedoms.**
**[If you agree that expanding rights and protections for LGBTQIA+ Americans is a no-brainer, then we’re respectfully asking you to show you’re part of our big, inclusive, and PROUD grassroots team by signing our petition right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-equality-act-email?refcode=em20230606&t=4&akid=8399%2E434096%2EN5kaLr)**
Thank you so much!!
Happy Pride! 🌈
John + Gisele Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230606-8399-footer&t=5&refcode2=8399_434096_N5kaLr&akid=8399%2E434096%2EN5kaLr)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=8399%2E434096%2EN5kaLr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=8399%2E434096%2EN5kaLr)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: 🏳️🌈 🏳️⚧️ Hi Derek, it’s John + Gisele, reporting back from Pittsburgh’s 50th Pride celebration this weekend. Yinz, we seriously love Pride! 🏳️🌈 🏳️⚧️ According to our staff, the hardest job in politics is keeping us two moving through a parade. 🙈 ❤️ We can’t take any progress for granted, Derek. Case in point: back in 2013, when John was still the Mayor of Braddock, Pennsylvania still banned same-sex marriage. We were not going to stand on the wrong side of history. Which is why John was proud to be the first elected official in western PA to officiate a same-sex wedding. After 11 years of commitment to each other, right there in our living room, surrounded by loved ones, John officiated the wedding of John Kandry + Bill Gray. It was one of the proudest moments of my career, and I promised I would keep marrying these couples until the law changed. —J After all, John + I were able to get married 14 years ago today without having to wait even close to 11 years! —G But there is so much more to be done in the fight for equality, Derek. Congress still has not found a way to pass the Equality Act into law, ensuring rights and protections for LGBTQIA+ folks across our country. Until we pass the Equality Act, there will be Americans who can be fired from their job, refused care at a hospital or denied housing because of their sexual orientation or gender identity. It's ludicrous. We must never stop pushing for equal protection under the law for every American — and that’s why we’re urging you to join us now in the fight for LGBTQIA+ rights and freedoms. Thank you so much!! Happy Pride! 🌈 John + Gisele Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment today to welcome the start of Pride Month and celebrate the LGBTQI+ community in our district and across the country.

These are challenging times for our LGBTQI+ friends. And amidst so much hateful rhetoric, we must remember to continue uplifting them by standing up to discriminatory legislation.

As a Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus, I am working every day to ensure the rights of the LGBTQI+ community are protected. LGBTQI+ people deserve to live freely as their authentic selves and deserve full legal equality in the U.S. and around the world.

This month, I invite you to recommit to the fight for LGBTQI+ rights and work to enshrine equal rights for the LGBTQI+ community into law. name: Free Thinker Daily
subject: James O'Keefe: "Their final attack on me . . ."
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.
| | | | [](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd2&amount=25)
[](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd2&amount=25)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd2&amount=25)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd2&amount=25)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd2&amount=25)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd2&amount=25)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd2&amount=25)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd2&amount=25)**.

---

[View this email in your browser](https://odb.nucleusemail.com/amplify/v/ExA6dTXssw?hids=alVFe4MB)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300 Alexandria, VA 22314

[**Unsubscribe**](https://odb.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=alVFe4MB)

name: Mifepristone Alert (via HER Time)
subject: Could not have gone worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64438066/410056856/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230606_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjA3NDI0ZTAtYWQwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9gMCKsj8unRaeRWac9U5GBl1HI3U2vUuutjkRiYEf7U=)
---
Here’s the latest in the mifepristone case, Peter: _The most recent hearing could not have gone worse._ The three-judge panel listening to the arguments spewed anti-abortion propaganda, including the lie that mifepristone makes folks more likely to need emergency care, and that the FDA only approved mifepristone under “expedited review” — neither of which claims are true. These three judges are all Republican appointees, and are all known to be hostile to abortion. That’s why we’re preparing for the worst, and an eventual appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court. [_**We don’t know when this decision is coming or what exactly it will say, but we need to be ready. clean_body: | = Here’s the latest in the mifepristone case, Peter: The most recent hearing could not have gone worse. The three-judge panel listening to the arguments spewed anti-abortion propaganda, including the lie that mifepristone makes folks more likely to need emergency care, and that the FDA only approved mifepristone under “expedited review” — neither of which claims are true. These three judges are all Republican appointees, and are all known to be hostile to abortion. That’s why we’re preparing for the worst, and an eventual appeal to the U.S. Supreme Court. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks so much for your support, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Ellison: See you in court.
body:
We sued Keith Ellison and the Board of Medical Practice | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/suing?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Today, we filed suit against Keith Ellison and members of the Board of Medical Practice. [Dr. Scott Jensen v. MN Board of Medical Practice, et al](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=a5e5b9de5d&e=9828080a05) was filed in the Minnesota Federal District Court and [Dr. Scott Jensen v Keith Ellison, et al was filed in Minnesota State District Court - Carver County](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=42c84114ce&e=9828080a05). Both complaints can be found [here](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9e6306d510&e=9828080a05) and [here](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2e42608642&e=9828080a05), along with a[ data request under MGDPA and responses from the Attorney General's Office](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=54b7d6726a&e=9828080a05).

Please also watch and share our full press conference by clicking the thumbnail below:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=b017efc20d&e=9828080a05)
---
| _Here is the rundown from our suits against Keith Ellison and the Board of Medical Practice members:_

"-For nearly three years, the MN Board of Medical Practice and its members launched a series of illegal investigations into Dr. Jensen's practice of medicine.

-These investigations violated Dr. Jensen's rights to First Amendment protected public speech, and did not involve specifically the practice of medicine.

-The Board went beyond its scope of jurisdiction

-The Board was weaponized by investigations intended to chill Dr. Jensen's speech related to COVID-19, as he expressed a viewpoint that was sharply critical of the prevailing and official narrative.

-The Board retaliated against Dr. Jensen for public comments regarding the COVID-19 pandemic.

-Attorney General Ellison withheld data based on the possibility that Dr. Jensen might publicly speak about the data, and some other person might then be upset with the Defendants for what the data shows."

For three years, while I was a sitting State Senator and while I was running for governor, the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice hovered over me as a weaponized agency. Attorney General Keith Ellison joined that harassment as a political actor. My rights were violated, as were the rights of so many to speak freely during the COVID-19 pandemic and afterwards. We are going to take this lawsuit as far as we need to in order to protect the rights of physicians and all other professionals who have dissenting views. The silencing and intimidation of political adversaries cannot become the norm in America.

We are going to stand up for the free speech rights of doctors and professionals. We'll take these suits as far as we need to in order to ensure the chilling of free speech that happened to me can never happen again.

Will you help us continue to fight and fund this lawsuit. [We opened a GiveSendGo and could use your help](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=dcd827f08b&e=9828080a05) with a donation. Thank you for your consideration.

We won't back down!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=5142ef0789&e=9828080a05)

name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm a cautionary tale
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend, My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad61520d8fc143068ceea82836a4ac88&_e=yCF3O-PXUnFX24Zt8E3FnJvzon_HQleP1gXPBpbb4izhlHmKRAh7mUqEMcAQs9V1cigPbcBtaVLZ4Hl6h5644J9zCmb-rt9RDmiSjtIBA85TPkypBPyjvcBVcvH3xT_j5_JqCQRpw9Q7J3G5lJzkLWel3UWWeINmFqo9UTKCFyPrlBvgi8Twr37sA7t_MSv7NNprgVqkKDu0Nt3hylykKXsQGt7D5q-JE7eb8fcf6GuHTN0zI0HoALNLhQgE8ZsJfKv38JudKPuD724LpIubDWFTLPKpsk-GwgEuXjlkiHkaABkbWrgSdgIdriYpFWkioPtzNJL8lG8AX2kZ6q1fvMajMd6XUNTpOUwB7tMl013oCHcJVHSWSu0MLFPyes6HDq4Ufs8-5eCplGvjNItWzw%3D%3D)
---
| | I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I'm 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a "boy."
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad61520d8fc143068ceea82836a4ac88&_e=yCF3O-PXUnFX24Zt8E3FnJvzon_HQleP1gXPBpbb4izhlHmKRAh7mUqEMcAQs9V1cigPbcBtaVLZ4Hl6h5644J9zCmb-rt9RDmiSjtIBA85TPkypBPyjvcBVcvH3xT_j5_JqCQRpw9Q7J3G5lJzkLWel3UWWeINmFqo9UTKCFyPrlBvgi8Twr37sA7t_MSv7NNprgVqkKDu0Nt3hylykKXsQGt7D5q-JE7eb8fcf6GuHTN0zI0HoALNLhQgE8ZsJ21STp3Lmg0JQQjLjxfyreNhT8wKEp07EJt6YAl_ZduiJxNek3RYo-EfKsxIyQHUu2AkfukaeFGvv0PCi7lFrfxk_i4Pc5I_7uTK8czddYD40ZLVltyBywCGaDt5PhrojlkWFEoOya_Zz2JEJ_ozGhQ%3D%3D)
---
**_Before transitioning_**

**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad61520d8fc143068ceea82836a4ac88&_e=yCF3O-PXUnFX24Zt8E3FnJvzon_HQleP1gXPBpbb4izhlHmKRAh7mUqEMcAQs9V1cigPbcBtaVLZ4Hl6h5644J9zCmb-rt9RDmiSjtIBA85TPkypBPyjvcBVcvH3xT_j5_JqCQRpw9Q7J3G5lJzkLWel3UWWeINmFqo9UTKCFyPrlBvgi8Twr37sA7t_MSv7NNprgVqkKDu0Nt3hylykKXsQGt7D5q-JE7eb8fcf6GuHTN0zI0HoALNLhQgE8ZsJe5XfIdpHpZR_Wck_lOlOu8EM4JweFjZ1UBt7gAr6PbP9qVLXysHDNaO7ylDsIiZWSAahagUtzMxi6FS0h-RlBMVukF2jLL6o4tEp2bfK8QRhpUwV-xxWXtN4OA8NuforrbUkN9ToqJlPm4l24RA4kw%3D%3D) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad61520d8fc143068ceea82836a4ac88&_e=yCF3O-PXUnFX24Zt8E3FnJvzon_HQleP1gXPBpbb4izhlHmKRAh7mUqEMcAQs9V1cigPbcBtaVLZ4Hl6h5644J9zCmb-rt9RDmiSjtIBA85TPkypBPyjvcBVcvH3xT_j5_JqCQRpw9Q7J3G5lJzkLWel3UWWeINmFqo9UTKCFyPrlBvgi8Twr37sA7t_MSv7NNprgVqkKDu0Nt3hylykKXsQGt7D5q-JE7eb8fcf6GuHTN0zI0HoALNLhQgE8ZsJD1rjWZeaxLNAuVmGR8vc5k-lmJwsLOIbJ8CXHr8s2YeU7_Yxwv_a-51COjovwHEvytisME2SAJOPjDFqMpvULQ5gviYevx1Z20SAZptPdHf-CX0jUmMzbLFTkR6epGxFjc1G1FHM7gzlanZj1sAVKg%3D%3D) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." [**And YOU can help me.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad61520d8fc143068ceea82836a4ac88&_e=yCF3O-PXUnFX24Zt8E3FnJvzon_HQleP1gXPBpbb4izhlHmKRAh7mUqEMcAQs9V1cigPbcBtaVLZ4Hl6h5644J9zCmb-rt9RDmiSjtIBA85TPkypBPyjvcBVcvH3xT_j5_JqCQRpw9Q7J3G5lJzkLWel3UWWeINmFqo9UTKCFyPrlBvgi8Twr37sA7t_MSv7NNprgVqkKDu0Nt3hylykKXsQGt7D5q-JE7eb8fcf6GuHTN0zI0HoALNLhQgE8ZsJJX1JAzZwKOveCWXQIQkbKReVuHH1BT199Cq3HILBGXs9-MMFKgCB5O1bCPMSpw5jcnUqHc5ArOzRfRKvTJOgEQgg74os4XDmWRI-nXo22h9kWzdXjwYdi9l0_vrfX-Cp4MRqFHvXs2uVcIgxVKfgYA%3D%3D) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. **There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. ** And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.
---
| | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered.

| | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O 'Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. | | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. | | | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: " You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist." Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you, Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It's been a long, painful road but I'm finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: It may be hard to believe…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

It may be hard to believe,
Peter, but we’re already halfway
through 2023.

That means that 2024 — a major presidential election year — is right
around the corner.

Unfortunately, our fundraising this year has been a fraction of what it
was in 2021.

For us to re-elect our Justice Democrats and send even more progressive
community leaders to Congress next year, we need to catch up now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134898?refcode=em20230606-29309&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29309%2E1203867%2EuER_Y2 ]Can we count on you to help us close our fundraising gap by making a
gift to Justice Democrats today?

Look, we knew when we started Justice Democrats that transforming the
Democratic Party wasn’t going to be an easy task. We’ve had some huge
successes — but we’ve also faced some pretty big challenges.

For instance, last year we faced an unprecedented flood of spending from
the political establishment. And our team is projecting that we’ll face
even more opposition next year.

The next six months are going to fly by, so let’s act now to turn things
around and finish 2023 strong.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134898?refcode=em20230606-29309&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=29309%2E1203867%2EuER_Y2 ]Every dollar we raise from grassroots supporters helps, from $3 to $30
to $300, so please chip in what you can today.

Thank you so much!

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134898?refcode=em20230606-29309&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29309%2E1203867%2EuER_Y2 ]Contribute $3

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you're struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29309%2E1203867%2EuER_Y2 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=29309%2E1203867%2EuER_Y2 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230606-29309-footer&t=1024&refcode2=29309_1203867_uER_Y2&akid=29309%2E1203867%2EuER_Y2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=29309%2E1203867%2EuER_Y2

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We stop this Republican power grab now, or we may never be able to, and believe me when I say they'll export this 60% threshold to other states if it works in Ohio.
body:
Conservative power grab in Ohio
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td56f0abc-709b-4c1a-be7d-4acb913bc16e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**We Must Stop Them From Endangering Millions Of Women.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb336f157-8dcd-4637-81f9-8dec6073ad89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The "them," is Ohio Republicans, who can't accept that a ballot measure in November on abortion rights will pass as they have in deep red states like Kentucky & Kansas. So they've trying to cheat, because these extremists are in the minority on every issue. It is the only way can win, and they know it._ **So GOP state legislators passed legislation creating a special August election--wasting millions in taxpayer dollars--try to fix the vote by changing necessary support for an amendment in Ohio from 50% to 60%**_._ **_We must get the word out to Ohioans now to turn out in August to vote against this ridiculous power grab that seeks to force the religious zealotry of a small minority of fanatics on all of us._** _Ohioans for Reproductive Choice is educating voters about the GOP's treachery. Per their recent email:_ ...Together we will defeat this extreme measure on August 8, then secure abortion rights on the November ballot. The next several months are make-or-break for the future of our great state. [**_So will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ohioans for Reproductive Justice, to stop right-wing extremists from benefiting from their cheating to ban abortion rights in Ohio?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e2939e0-ab8a-4ae5-bbd1-37c11e005847/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for decency and humanity wherever it's needed._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T287aa2f9-b53b-4c06-b3c1-a5a7ea9388d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Crystal and Jason
subject: Mountain Valley Pipeline Gets Fast-Tracked.
body:
Rally in DC this Thursday, 6/8 to #STOPMVP and stand with the frontlines! | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yj6cBoP2vcn6KEpSm74SwRHohHAX8g5ATnPCv71yIyljYKEL7y4fDqHaI8IztpoOKrdO9ubOgFe5BwtfSC4GGsWsWfZbH1pDvkP7m2o_2wrMCiXW3pGqoq0iNm3fEGV1xLxpWJo9w7aGbCuT-3D9vyC-glnj3BqGD44-RTc-lLFakbd1AfiHPtL11Ifd0yRgv-o2zilhzK8GK6TECmd1QzzR2ihBjf2wWYk65bTDwSTSrShsM_XkR6k1c-eMT8qTtDkfueBMC5kRALJ4KZ6bQRSgyitERUO5n7yU08quVhZmQ/3wt/SPAu49itR1a9Ydf5qqS5ig/h0/TgEng2VOnSCUP8ZglMyhoRPmyQPQXTzsu5GIgxB1ns0)
---
THE MOUNTAIN VALLEY PIPELINE IS NOW BEING FAST-TRACKED. Meku, **** This is Dr. Crystal Cavalier-Keck and Jason Crazy Bear Keck, co-founders of [7 Directions of Service](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yj6cBoP2vcn6KEpSm74SwRHd45vfO74TrzBg_sYP5U27madqPo_AaHYcKbfz_ysteMwQnniG57jOPOxGoPMuEf3QGMJXzGSPWDKkcMoai-xnbybsf9JI1s6lWnux59VDm1mz_4FmmJ_C73cHTIQOdaS8-ldFj4fpYIrLmngKldxaZ0B8dilpOABqJJw4Yx_FHFwRWhFg30naNNTgMV15S1CwSe0i-KiiyQLhSBmdz0q4dpYnLmawRcLYVIr3nd1OXLZj7zLjF7OJwvV2KNWfug6ddt42g4ddHBVH0DXhMvC5w/3wt/SPAu49itR1a9Ydf5qqS5ig/h1/EM-2g7fdmskesChnD3AY0jm0ff3c9qhwZ96DdTLxrRY) (7DS). We are Water Protectors who stand firmly against the Mountain Valley Pipeline (MVP), a 303-mile fracked gas pipeline which threatens to destroy human and natural communities across Appalachia. As most of you have heard by now, MVP is[ now being fast-tracked](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4YiDSqpFVFZz-mSr7BewEMut2riU3Vu7NOZ7xLfB-aHU8CihuJ85hwCR-_RCFWld2SGJFnDNDuSweFt3IX6Y-jFIRKC--5HmbbCdE5ifUkWtFO-nftkSnjh8HBuNjo4oS9S9v4lNAP-aiP1WDdSXM_uMMAz606WF3gB5DkCATYAt50GfRzr7xICQhfThLCX9TQeJ_2VGjvJUSWNOao7a6gPH-FbRuIGWkCx4eRRyvSnIHkC60zs8LRM9ToYXTzJeiosuX75oFDXF0kD37b0F4SHiCsl08-K02_kN4eXhqCjrVSrjcAEuLgB3RANEkzcoHbE6peRHdP8f68Lt6RVSHgeXN9VnbmPjuE8JT3PUwFUOSAmhk9BQ9YQjkuTWGMv1wi4/3wt/SPAu49itR1a9Ydf5qqS5ig/h2/zKe7jMCnmmqhAmmuAY9QdV8dlNFkWAkNT1KH4RgxTCk), a result of its wrongful inclusion in the nation’s must-pass debt ceiling legislation, which also codified disturbing rollbacks of critical environmental protections and social safety nets. **The MVP provisions include immediate congressional approval of all remaining federal permits within 21 days, and forbids judicial review of any permits.**
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8EnQnRKTtmV-eCSjB6ffBWlvurOIULZ7bq-K1Ng6fdHqQg3c8ReSiXP_qpKuHM2CoFE180buKWHS0loCn07HPzmeLTVKn03lnd6a3FZ-jIL-ytz9AFlkH_s-B1zqnEEfXQd2Ah2W6zxlzLzZ-VwjQKwYNf5qlh6RW3GTAxrabN4KxiVgtJirz9hjlD6wwLkLvupj-LSCIcHdk64935KKaaIGAM7jnUY0xLnJK_VJFbMMZzWufzZhkUkX1FRMbqKdztYLS338nfHk5WjtiU_oClCzz-3k4iQDS0fZSxKYKa5Mg/3wt/SPAu49itR1a9Ydf5qqS5ig/h3/0xYCV6KYJkVn-30rGk4Pgc5GzG27KfMAxc1rwIG9iHs)
