The undemocratic interference by Congress and our self-proclaimed “climate president” to force this dangerous and unnecessary pipeline through [vulnerable communities and ecosystems](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEb_hKCSElnHTDzxVtXg9LnLPVwcU-2jFY--iyfDkaSs-RB0YRem_Vwp--e8DQbYv1KN-Z9r8Phh4ot3U_Ycpgn3HYMLp8zwqKFt1EJ9tuxCEh3DPrOqCaljoXhDnMQGYRJOt9S17T7CoK67PJ6_S182ewk_mQwBxeglpdg4hoRNQX2CFXzkWHSG0ZSNLQBX_5A775V_JERtl3HMtz35KHrhzgawNCvXtX44fQ7rSs0bfGO-3p7ljUlKAKkp2ZlJzbPZVk5uImvTJSmwXBdGGZEEAGVKciv1NTFQSlui_gmWzDm7RraJtkVNCkEwhbBTCBVlU-UhLNyiUVdiEJXzFGe9XA4cpQueGTdGo1oWLRsUfGznSK_0lysm_PDDgzCgqEKtIN7ItXSBV2g40X-P6c4C429SZc48VAwnIJP2Pmv9DKW5yvuMxie0HD-j2PfZ1r4EourwkLvzVJifwbKF0Vp2auILMcGFc5khmivJHoAdyY3fX46jdpy81_AIM8jQWRUQ0qivBUO5QeiEz3I0gYs/3wt/SPAu49itR1a9Ydf5qqS5ig/h4/HWnHHYkzrhcboKmoGLlUWMu0GaE4lJUXGwwEYbntQMI) (including a national forest, and some of the most landslide-prone terrain in the country) is deplorable. Friends in the path of the pipeline have reported that construction equipment has already arrived. [Listen here](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWrze3Fbe-Fm2pceskPFEKIc-VXYlMVudntJPK4BCMPRRC0UGZTb7CB3SU7nziOd4wJbJjTMLr3MlXDqRei_qd8O6pP73T2BsZ3Vh26kKZ9BZ3vaQqIP-zk99tnirRL--OhARco7mH9REvZrZ6hEv6Dz63PJzOGNXqNA1bTfCTsy_iuCvNaOcj-Ie1EySDePGEc8OsG2ekvOcLYQrsDQWf40A8UqdVWLBBlW02YSPo_txpj_rxozFWl2M0t00DqJ6Mfhh7vj7i-9PeeLD5QWvj_dEPdN2Tt8cjXwkfZKZ4w-eNtctLV_bn6bKAzW3Lfh-DAXri6PFy-NOKpvFLGXJrhWTtR-HLHKWGstNtzL4JasMAyRVct1SaznkdHSL8ruf4mUB-ZXUEgmXntXK0iS71rjgMnMkBAD-gaoIURJIQP-s/3wt/SPAu49itR1a9Ydf5qqS5ig/h5/55S5QMBUuEdZZXauKofSWFIAxM4Qwf-MXEns-pgXsOU) to POWHR community organizer Crystal Mello respond to MVP being fast-tracked, and share her story of defending her community (starting at the 13 min mark)

clean_body: Rally in DC this Thursday, 6/8 to #STOPMVP and stand with the frontlines! | | THE MOUNTAIN VALLEY PIPELINE IS NOW BEING FAST-TRACKED. Meku, ** This is Dr. Crystal Cavalier-Keck and Jason Crazy Bear Keck, co-founders of (7DS). We are Water Protectors who stand firmly against the Mountain Valley Pipeline (MVP), a 303-mile fracked gas pipeline which threatens to destroy human and natural communities across Appalachia. As most of you have heard by now, MVP is, a result of its wrongful inclusion in the nation’s must-pass debt ceiling legislation, which also codified disturbing rollbacks of critical environmental protections and social safety nets. The MVP provisions include immediate congressional approval of all remaining federal permits within 21 days, and forbids judicial review of any permits. | The undemocratic interference by Congress and our self-proclaimed “climate president” to force this dangerous and unnecessary pipeline through (including a national forest, and some of the most landslide-prone terrain in the country) is deplorable. Friends in the path of the pipeline have reported that construction equipment has already arrived. to POWHR community organizer Crystal Mello respond to MVP being fast-tracked, and share her story of defending her community (starting at the 13 min mark) | STAND WITH THE FRONTLINES THIS THURSDAY AT THE #STOPMVP RALLY IN DC! | Will you join us at the White House this Thursday, June 8 to protest the Mountain Valley Pipeline and stand in solidarity with frontline communities facing this disastrous abuse of power? NEED A RIDE TO DC? There are a few spots left on the free, roundtrip bus leaving Durham, NC on the morning of the 8th, returning after the rally. KEY LINKS: STAY TUNED. Make sure you are following 7 Directions of Service, and on social media, as new strategies and calls to action emerge in the coming weeks. The fight is not over. For live updates– Instagram: Facebook: **** In solidarity, Crystal and Jason | | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from 7 Directions of Service, please .

body:
If we don't fix the mail-in problem, it won't matter who we nominate. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/db8c89072e00/we-dont-care-about-the-primary?e=6ec25014bb)
---
| |
---
| |
# We're not Worried about the Primary

Peter

It seems like every day another Republican is jumping into the presidential race. We're not worried about that though, because **we're not focused on the primary — we're looking ahead.

The truth is, it won't matter who we nominate as our candidate** if we don't fix the mistakes of the past and stop the Democrats from running up the score with mail-in ballots.** Otherwise, we will lose again in 2023 and 2024. **That's why we're fighting now to beat the Democrats at their own game. _**But we can't do it alone. **_

We're working every day against a flood of money from Soros-backed special interests. It's not easy, but we need to solve the mail-in problem and we need to solve it fast.

Friend,

As a broadcast journalist, my job was to get to the truth and report the facts.

One of the first stories I got to cover in Phoenix was the impeachment and indictment of the Governor at the time. It wasn't the hyperpartisan, opinion-driven "news" you see these days. Our community was depending on us to cut through the noise and inform them of crimes and corruption.

Truth be told, I loved my job, but I thought I was done with that phase of my life. Then, in 2016, the country I knew and loved changed. Donald Trump ushered in a new brand of extremism that’s caused more distrust and division than I imagined was possible.

**Running for Congress was never on my bingo card, but I cannot stand on the sidelines while our community is being taken advantage of by a Trump-puppet like David Schweikert.**

Schweikert isn’t the first politician I’ve held accountable, and he won’t be the last.

**[My very first FEC fundraising deadline hits at the end of this month, and we’re aiming to raise $25,000 in online donations to show grassroots strength. If you have the means, please donate $3, or whatever you can afford, to support our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64438423/410058471/1924984212?refcode=em-6.6.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjYwMjA5ZjctYjAwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pAHCPVKufd4nTEAmHFPdy01Vie0FlboKG1pveh9M3o=)**

I’m a journalist at my core – I can’t ignore the facts. And the fact is that our reproductive rights, our voting rights, the economy, and so much more are on the line in 2024. AZ-01 is a toss up seat that will determine who has House control. It won’t be easy to flip, but it’s winnable if we all work together.

We can’t afford another term of Schweikert attacking our freedoms. Let's replace him with someone who believes in the truth and has a record of serving our community. I’m that person.

Thank you in advance for your support,

Marlene Galán-Woods

_**Here’s my original message highlighting just a few ways Abigail’s changed things in VA-07 for the better:**_
* * *
Since she was first elected in 2018 – flipping VA-07 blue for the first time in 50 years – she’s been committed to delivering results for her constituents. _**Here are just a few ways our community has benefited from her advocacy in Congress:**_

💊 – Abigail helped cap the cost of life-saving insulin for seniors at $35 per month.

📡 – She made it possible to expand broadband internet access so that all Virginians have the high-speed connection they need.

🏥 – She’s working tirelessly to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law so reproductive rights are protected for all Americans.

📈 – She’s leading the charge to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks, and her bipartisan bill is gaining momentum every day.

This is just a sampling of the important work Abigail is leading on in Congress, [_**and she needs your support to continue it. Will you please consider an investment today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64438628/410059302/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230606-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUzYzkyN2UtYjEwNC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nz3CJ9IPnj_M89p5MR1s0Ga-gGH2agZHfb9BpeV5ANE=)

clean_body: Abigail has accomplished so much for this community throughout her career in Congress, and I’m eager to see that list grow. | = | Peter, It’s Adam, Abigail’s husband. I wanted to pass along a note I sent around a few weeks ago. Abigail has accomplished so much for this community throughout her career in Congress, = | = Here’s my original message highlighting just a few ways Abigail’s changed things in VA-07 for the better: Since she was first elected in 2018 – flipping VA-07 blue for the first time in 50 years – she’s been committed to delivering results for her constituents. Here are just a few ways our community has benefited from her advocacy in Congress: 💊 – Abigail helped cap the cost of life-saving insulin for seniors at $35 per month. 📡 – She made it possible to expand broadband internet access so that all Virginians have the high-speed connection they need. 🏥 – She’s working tirelessly to codify Roe v. Wade into law so reproductive rights are protected for all Americans. 📈 – She’s leading the charge to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks, and her bipartisan bill is gaining momentum every day. This is just a sampling of the important work Abigail is leading on in Congress, = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Adam Spanberger | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. | | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64438918/410060392/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk196-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzQyZjliYy1iMjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fEwvQYin2dzKk-qDnLCvKCSN9ukB1cuTSXZMOwsajms=)
Friend, anyone who knows me knows that I love baseball – and especially the Cleveland Guardians. I'm a die-hard fan, and I have been ever since my dad started taking my brothers and me to games at Municipal Stadium.

**There are three things you should know about Cleveland sports fans:** We always believe in our teams, we never give up hope, and we hang on to the joy of each win as if each one is its own miracle.
That’s how I approach serving in the Senate, too. I’m so proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish for working families in Ohio and across the country. But there's more work to be done, and we’ve got to keep stepping up to the plate and swinging for the fences.
**I’m running for reelection to go to bat for ALL Ohioans, but I can’t do it alone. Experts from _CNN_ to _FiveThirtyEight_ say that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and this race is officially a toss-up.**
[**I need you on my team, friend. Please, will you pitch in $5 or more now to help me hit it out of the park, defend my seat, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64438919/410060393/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk196-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzQyZjliYy1iMjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fEwvQYin2dzKk-qDnLCvKCSN9ukB1cuTSXZMOwsajms=)

**Friend --**

_Have you seen the news coming out of Texas?_

Far-left Democrat Rep. Colin Allred has _recently_ announced he's running against me in 2024.

And what kind of person is Colin Allred?

_... Rep. Allred wants biological men to compete in women's sports.

...Rep. Allred supports a weak-on-crime agenda, reducing the penalties for murder, car theft, robbery, and even sexual assault.

...Rep. Allred wants to make it impossible for law-abiding Texans to own rifles.

...Rep. Allred is an open-borders fanatic who 100% supports Biden's policies that worsen our ongoing border crisis.

...Rep. Allred voted to hire 87,000 new IRS agents to harass, heckle, and humiliate patriots who don't have the financial resources to fight back against corrupt elements of the IRS._

**Rep. Allred doesn 't represent Texas values - not even close.**

**Luckily, RSC Chairman Kevin Hern and the House Conservatives are holding the line against deranged leftists like Colin Allred, who seek to uproot everything that makes America GREAT. Chip in to support Chairman Hern and the House Conservatives!**

And what kind of person is Colin Allred? ... Rep. Allred wants biological men to compete in women's sports. ...Rep. Allred supports a weak-on-crime agenda, reducing the penalties for murder, car theft, robbery, and even sexual assault. ...Rep. Allred wants to make it impossible for law-abiding Texans to own rifles. ...Rep. Allred is an open-borders fanatic who 100% supports Biden's policies that worsen our ongoing border crisis. ...Rep. Allred voted to hire 87,000 new IRS agents to harass, heckle, and humiliate patriots who don't have the financial resources to fight back against corrupt elements of the IRS. Rep. Allred doesn 't represent Texas values - not even close. Luckily, RSC Chairman Kevin Hern and the House Conservatives are holding the line against deranged leftists like Colin Allred, who seek to uproot everything that makes America GREAT. Chip in to support Chairman Hern and the House Conservatives! | Colin Allred has faithfully fought for Biden's far-left agenda of excessive taxes, reckless spending, open borders, and soft-on-crime policies in Congress. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Plastics are destroying our oceans and killing sea turtles
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1809127?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **WORLD OCEANS DAY ALERT : Our precious oceans are being decimated by rampant plastic waste. ****[TAKE ACTION NOW: Sign the petition to END plastic pollution!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1809128?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Friend, World Oceans Day is on Thursday, and there’s no better time for environmentalists like you to step up in defense of our precious oceans. It’s no secret that oceans play an integral role in our planet’s ecosystem -- absorbing**massive amounts of carbon dioxide** from the atmosphere, providing us with **HALF of the world’s oxygen** , and storing **90% of additional heat** caused by global warming. And, of course, our oceans serve as an **epicenter of biodiversity,** home to beloved wildlife like coral reefs, sea turtles, whales, and dolphins. **But our oceans are in PERIL, Friend.** Every minute, **an entire garbage truck** of plastics is dumped into the ocean -- **_KILLING OVER A MILLION MARINE ANIMALS_** each year. Scientists predict that at this rate, we’ll have _more plastic than fish in the ocean by 2050_! [**Will you stand by and let plastic corporations profit off of the destruction of our oceans? Or will you speak up and demand an END to plastic pollution right now?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1809129?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1809130?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
While you’re reading this email, imagine a baby sea turtle reaching the water for the very first time. **_*SPLASH*_** The excited creature swims around and is happy to find something fresh to eat. _Oh no!_ The helpless animal tried to swallow plastic thinking that it was a jellyfish! Now, the helpless youngling could **_CHOKE TO DEATH._** With the **millions of tons** of plastic in the ocean, it’s no wonder that animals like baby sea turtles are _frequently mistaking plastic for food._
The dangers of plastics don’t stop with our oceans, Friend. Tiny microplastics are **_contaminating our food, water, and air supply_** at this very moment. Plastic production itself burns through **dirty fossil fuels** that worsen the climate crisis, and these industrial-size factories emit**harmful pollutants** that pose **serious health risks** to nearby residents who are most often low-wealth people of color.
Meanwhile, the federal government has **__FAILED__** to stand up to Big Plastic and Big Oil, allowing these powerful corporations to profit off their reckless environmental destruction. **If we don’t take steps at the federal level NOW, it will soon be too late to** **__STOP THE PLASTIC APOCALYPSE.__**
[**Friend, we aren’t exaggerating when we say that the future of our oceans and our entire planet is on the line. With World Oceans Day this week, we’ve set an ambitious goal of getting 8,000 grassroots signatures on our petition: Tell President Biden that we demand bold solutions to the plastic crisis now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1809131?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1809130?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting our oceans and the planet from plastic,
Friends of the Earth**
|

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhtutd-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhtutd-trhiujldw-t/) **Tim Scott Schools The View** Senator **[Tim Scott joined the hosts of The View and criticized them](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhtutd-trhiujldw-i/)** over comments they made about him not understanding racism in the U.S. _Do you think it was a good idea for him to go on the show?_ **Love Affair with China** Senator Tom Cotton is **[ridiculing the Biden administration](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhtutd-trhiujldw-d/)** for wooing China like a lovestruck teenager. **Ongoing Investigation into Biden** Rep. James Comer **[was allowed to view the FBI document implicating Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhtutd-trhiujldw-h/) **in a bribery scheme but was not allowed to take possession of it.

**So Sad** The**[victims of a private jet crash over the weekend that caused two F-16 fighter jets to scramble above Virginia](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhtutd-trhiujldw-k/) **are the daughter and granddaughter of a Trump donor who died along with their nanny. **Target is Worse Than we Thought** It turns out, **[Target has been funding a bunch of different groups](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhtutd-trhiujldw-u/)** that some might find problematic. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhtutd-trhiujldw-o/)!**

There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative:

If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play.

It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - **which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate.**

**If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat.** I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team.

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

| Peter,

Hi, it’s Kurt.

I’ll be honest: I’ve never run for Congress before, but I’m running now because I’m ready to create real, lasting change in our community.

My entire life has been dedicated to leadership and service. I’ve served as a CEO and senior executive at some of the country’s largest nonprofits, including the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross. Throughout my career, I’ve been proud to make a difference in the lives of others.

Now, I’ve decided to run for Congress because our district is facing a crisis. Arizonans have suffered under David Schweikert’s failed leadership for over 10 years, but it’s time for us to come together to build a better future for everyone in our community.

I’ll be honest: I’ve never run for Congress before, but I’m running now because I’m ready to create real, lasting change in our community. = | = My entire life has been dedicated to leadership and service. I’ve served as a CEO and senior executive at some of the country’s largest nonprofits, including the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross. Throughout my career, I’ve been proud to make a difference in the lives of others. Now, I’ve decided to run for Congress because our district is facing a crisis. As one UNITED front, our movement has the power to stop this plot dead in its tracks.

With YOUR support, we will WRAP UP the primary as quickly as possible so that we can shift 100% of our focus to the REAL mission: firing Crooked Joe Biden and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64439941/410063987/1983311359?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2677-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NGMwNDNjLWI2MDQtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UGM4QekABeIv8qji29B2fggXMkASazKEETjYS7qPGeE=) Friend, I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1970s and 80s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign and since then I've worked on campaigns around the entire country.

**I've been in politics for what we in the industry call a long-ass time. So I can tell you from experience: **
**Today's GOP is the greatest danger to our democracy, and I've never seen a political party like it. **
From election-undermining conspiracy theories, to abortion bans, to "Jim Crow 2.0" voter suppression laws, to gun violence inaction, to homophobic legislation, to banning books, to threatening to slash Medicare and Social Security...
**Friend, I don't say this lightly, but I'm 100% convinced that today's GOP simply doesn't care about the well-being of Americans.** And since they've already got a leg up for 2024, I'm truly nervous about what's going to happen next November.
**And you're probably wondering, how do we stop them? You deserve honesty. Friend: We need to fundraise the hell out of this year. **We need to raise as much money as possible so we can beat this ugly misinformation spin cycle the GOP has got us in.

clean_body: | | | = Friend, I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1970s and 80s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign and since then I've worked on campaigns around the entire country. I've been in politics for what we in the industry call a long-ass time. So I can tell you from experience: Today's GOP is the greatest danger to our democracy, and I've never seen a political party like it. From election-undermining conspiracy theories, to abortion bans, to "Jim Crow 2.0" voter suppression laws, to gun violence inaction, to homophobic legislation, to banning books, to threatening to slash Medicare and Social Security... Friend, I don't say this lightly, but I'm 100% convinced that today's GOP simply doesn't care about the well-being of Americans. And since they've already got a leg up for 2024, I'm truly nervous about what's going to happen next November. And you're probably wondering, how do we stop them? You deserve honesty. Friend: We need to fundraise the hell out of this year. We need to raise as much money as possible so we can beat this ugly misinformation spin cycle the GOP has got us in. I'm working with American Bridge to make sure we can do just that, but we're still $5,273 short of our $20,000 goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = – Carville | | | | | | | | | | | From taking down Trump in 2020 to expanding the Senate majority in 2022, American Bridge is working around the clock to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them by making sure Democrats around the country are elected up and down the ballot. don’t let the FOMO hit you next week, sign up today! | | | **Peter, ready to stop 🤡s from running this country as they wish?** Nobody wants policies that restrict our freedom to move, to learn, or to express ourselves as we are – not you, not me, and definitely not our communities! clean_body: don’t let the FOMO hit you next week, sign up today! | | | Peter, ready to stop 🤡s from running this country as they wish? Nobody wants policies that restrict our freedom to move, to learn, or to express ourselves as we are – not you, not me, and definitely not our communities! Recent state laws make one thing clear: Republican lawmakers want to use fear and hate to push us into the shadows. But, we are ready to fight back! Our fight is built on the vision of young people, like you and me, who are unafraid to fight for the future we want. We got tired of waiting for policies that help our communities live in dignity. So, next week we’re demanding those policies during our“Our States, Our Power Week of Action.” There is SO. MUCH. POWER. in our communities & YOU 🫵 can help our people reclaim it. Starting JUNE 12, undocumented & immigrant baddies from across the country are coming together to Can you help us uplift the voices of immigrants in Virginia? 📣✨Our States, Our Power Week of Action 📣✨ You don’t have to be an experienced organizer to know best about what your community needs and wants. I’m here to support you at every step of the way & help you prepare for your first (or next) event. 🧡 💌Once you sign up, I’ll send over our event host toolkit – full of samples, graphics & ideas you can use to plan a successful event. You’ll also receive an exclusive invite to our Comms/Social Media 101 Training & our office hours for all the guidance you need to promote your action. name: Team Pramila
subject: Outraise, out-organize, and out-maneuver
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Corporate and special interests should not be able to buy our elected leaders, write policy, or influence the outcome of elections.
#
Peter,
What does it mean to be a people-powered movement?
**It's simple:** Pramila knows that the real power lies with the people, not the corporations or special interest groups that try with all their might to influence our politics.
Instead of accepting predatory corporate PAC money, this movement is sourced and powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you, chipping in what they can to power our movement. **_And we wouldn't want it any other way._**
**Peter, our movement is up against an extreme, right-wing opposition with billionaires in their back pockets. That means we need to use our collective grassroots power to outraise, out-organize, and out-maneuver the GOP at every turn possible.**[**Can we count on you to make a donation of $3 or any amount to support Pramila and our movement for transformative change?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42345?refcode=em20230606-2573&t=1&akid=2573%2E420207%2ExdBxB2)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42345?refcode=em20230606-2573&t=20&akid=2573%2E420207%2ExdBxB2)**
**Corporate and special interests should not be able to buy our elected leaders, write policy, or influence the outcome of elections.**
**We've seen the GOP cling to corporations and special interests groups to propel their obstructionist agenda and stop our movement for progress. We can no longer allow our democracy to continue in this cycle of injustice and inequity.**
**As Pramila continues to show up for our communities, both on the ground and in Congress, it's on us to keep up our grassroots momentum.[If you stand with Pramila and our grassroots movement, please chip in now to ensure we have the resources to power our work. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42345?refcode=em20230606-2573&t=21&akid=2573%2E420207%2ExdBxB2)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230606-2573-footer&t=22&refcode2=2573_420207_xdBxB2&akid=2573%2E420207%2ExdBxB2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2573%2E420207%2ExdBxB2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2573%2E420207%2ExdBxB2)

name: Daniel Cameron
subject: Remember last year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniel Cameron for Governor
body:
I’m fighting an uphill battle| | | Friend,
---
| | **Just like the 2022 midterms, Kentucky is going to be an uphill battle for conservatives this year.** My name is Daniel Cameron, and I am a Trump-endorsed, America First Republican running for governor of Kentucky.
---

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440284/410065507/-2022127741?&amounts=6,25,50,100,500&amount=6&refcode=jtk1080-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjA3ZDQ1My1iODA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gQdkafnNof3HVDyYcRjjLuI1QBOZWyTU48YP3wGF04I=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**

As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. But, thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we head into the next half of 2023, I _must_ keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $6 for the first six days of the sixth month of the year to help me continue my fight for progress. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Will you help support migrants from Venezuela and Colombia?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hi There, it’s Alex.
I’m reaching out today not to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, but to Sacramento ACT (Area Congregations Together) — a community organization that’s working to support the migrants that recently arrived in Sacramento.
[**Can you make a contribution to Sacramento ACT today? 100% of your donation will go to their work supporting recently arrived migrants.**](https://secure.lglforms.com/form_engine/s/rdsMNpbrZKF1XbckjI3iGg?refcode=em230606-1-30)
**[DONATE](https://secure.lglforms.com/form_engine/s/rdsMNpbrZKF1XbckjI3iGg?refcode=em230606-1-30)**
Over the weekend and then again yesterday, a group of migrants from Venezuela and Colombia arrived in Sacramento via chartered plane. It’s unclear right now who organized the trips, but that does not change the fact that these people need our support, and deserve to feel safe and welcome.
Sacramento ACT is working with their congregations, partners, local and state government, and other agencies to determine what comes next and organize support, including legal support if needed.
_These are real people, and they deserve better than being used as political pawns to create chaos._ So as Sacramento and California welcome these migrants with open arms and treat them with respect and dignity, I hope you’ll join me in giving to this community organization that’s playing a key role in supporting these recently arrived migrants.
[**Please make a contribution to Sacramento ACT today and help ensure that these people have the support and resources they need.**](https://secure.lglforms.com/form_engine/s/rdsMNpbrZKF1XbckjI3iGg?refcode=em230606-1-30)
**[DONATE](https://secure.lglforms.com/form_engine/s/rdsMNpbrZKF1XbckjI3iGg?refcode=em230606-1-30)**
Thank you for giving if you can afford to do so. I’m proud that Californians are coming together to support these people in their time of need.
\- Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1329%2E159979%2EHfyfXL)

subject: Celebrating Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
For all who identify as part of the LGBTQ+ community: I see you, you are loved, and I am deeply honored to be your advocate in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440622/410066832/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230606-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTk2NGIyOS1iYjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-YemEwpDpNkrxMgZYTmligiMXp7T3gbKVc0lb5YJcg=)

| Team –

June is Pride Month – an opportunity to celebrate the history and achievements of the LGTBQ+ community. We honor the legacy of those who bravely stood against discrimination and harassment and recommit ourselves to the work yet to be done for a fairer, more inclusive nation for everyone.

We continue to make major strides towards equality here in West Michigan – last year, Muskegon hosted its first-ever pride festival, and this week Grand Haven will do the same! We are so excited to celebrate with our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors.

While we mark the hard-won progress toward equality for those in the LGBTQ+ community, we must also recognize there is significant work still to be done, including ensuring legal protections for all LGBTQ+ individuals and communities. [_**Will you add your name to our petition today to show that folks here in West Michigan and across the country support equal protection under the law for LGBTQ+ Americans?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440623/410066833/-619705009?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTk2NGIyOS1iYjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-YemEwpDpNkrxMgZYTmligiMXp7T3gbKVc0lb5YJcg=&emci=e4e1a222-bb04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=25964b29-bb04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=750857)

clean_body: For all who identify as part of the LGBTQ+ community: I see you, you are loved, and I am deeply honored to be your advocate in Congress. | = | Team – June is Pride Month – an opportunity to celebrate the history and achievements of the LGTBQ+ community. We honor the legacy of those who bravely stood against discrimination and harassment and recommit ourselves to the work yet to be done for a fairer, more inclusive nation for everyone. We continue to make major strides towards equality here in West Michigan – last year, Muskegon hosted its first-ever pride festival, and this week Grand Haven will do the same! We are so excited to celebrate with our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors. While we mark the hard-won progress toward equality for those in the LGBTQ+ community, we must also recognize there is significant work still to be done, including ensuring legal protections for all LGBTQ+ individuals and communities. | For all who identify as part of the LGBTQ+ community: I see you, you are loved, and I am deeply honored to be your advocate in Congress. From my family to yours, Happy Pride Month! Best, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . | | My friend, Yesterday, June 5th, marked the 19th anniversary of President Ronald Reagan's passing in 2004. Considered by many to be one of our greatest presidents, President Reagan united our country and brought prosperity and economic growth that has been enjoyed by millions of Americans. One of our favorite Reagan quotes perfectly exemplifies the type of man and leader he was: **"Live simply, love generously, care deeply, speak kindly, leave the rest to God."** Despite his unifying legacy, some Minnesota Democrats decided to use the day to mock President Reagan's legacy. Minneapolis DFL Chair Briana Rose Lee tweeted the following in reference to President Reagan's passing:
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=95acf616eab84ad19326c495d4e43ac3&_e=bBo_-szTxsbvO_iXlGSLffuj6AQoNTZK8eJZzmmRNTRpwrCKGXRCa6BGPGLo5vH-QLzbdDwKeRxBefYS4dWHwryWyaYa1oOgUODi2XNV0-8s4We9JG6PfUorFwwPTwqegyNcqv3fUlLu6WaV2QJamnOsU29Fqw0n5EmgD7ihRw_2vwKFt-tyw8z-lc1NDY5u4CW_afOHcLXlw2x7RBrEuZ7gSldJREHxrKRbEp9osX6SQdioCx9-rgjTHj54H_JH)
---
Minnesota State Senator Jen McEwen joined in defending Lee's comments and made her own disparaging remarks:
---
---
In addition to these statements Donavon Indovino Cawley, a Democrat Party official in Ilhan Omar and Dean Phillips' districts, tweeted a sexually explicit insult of former First Lady Nancy Reagan. This is the type of political rhetoric that Americans are tired of. There's a difference between disagreeing with somebody's politics and disrespecting the legacy of leaders who served our country. **Add your name to our petition and join us in condemning these Minnesota Democrats' statements:**
---
[Sign Our Petition >> _Click Here_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=95acf616eab84ad19326c495d4e43ac3&_e=bBo_-szTxsbvO_iXlGSLffuj6AQoNTZK8eJZzmmRNTRpwrCKGXRCa6BGPGLo5vH-QLzbdDwKeRxBefYS4dWHwryWyaYa1oOgUODi2XNV0-_u-olFwl2EbqSOpyE1Fjh556wK96qsCDTbDXvwisqx3H7xUDJF6WYxB1MkUsTAizdo9pF1hJX9aY8geJb0p5X5NxepUDjLM9AgEEkvB1ky8vrr6W2EJi7wzcXOQX0jtife4nVGGvmM_Nb1HiYbYw4Q)

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: This Pride Month, we must show solidarity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
I'm determined to push back against the wave of anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric and legislation.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440716/410067188/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230606EA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjQ1NzhkNS1iYjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEPr9hgA3hQ0dCnJSMYQ_Xbw8kZPM7Y_G6n5ShP_UnY=)
---
Friend,

Pride Month is a time to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community, promote their visibility and dignity, and recommit to fighting for their equal rights. We honor the countless LGBTQ+ activists and trailblazers who've led the way — from the first brick thrown at Stonewall to the legal recognition of same-sex marriage.

But as we celebrate greater inclusion and all the progress we've made, we must remember that the fight is far from over. And it's clear we're facing many new obstacles to equality.

I'm alarmed by the wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation being passed in Republican-led states (particularly bills targeting trans youth). I'm very concerned by the recent rise of harsh and often threatening rhetoric about LGBTQ+ people that's been platformed by GOP politicians and media outlets like Fox News. **So this Pride Month, we need to demonstrate solidarity and make it clear that hate cannot and will not win.**

One of the most effective ways to do that is by demonstrating the broad support that exists for policies that _expand_ LGBTQ+ rights. So I am renewing my call for Congress to pass the Equality Act, which would ensure that sexual orientation and gender identity are covered under federal civil rights laws.

**I was proud to co-sponsor this bill when I first got to Congress, and I will not rest until it becomes law — no matter how long that takes.** [**Will you add your name and help me get 15,000 citizen co-signers this month in support of the Equality Act? Together, we can send a powerful message that a strong majority in this country stands with the LGBTQ+ community and wants active measures taken to protect their rights and respect their dignity.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440717/410067189/1576266104?ms=EM_PET_230606EA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230606EA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjQ1NzhkNS1iYjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEPr9hgA3hQ0dCnJSMYQ_Xbw8kZPM7Y_G6n5ShP_UnY=&emci=c8d54816-a704-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a24578d5-bb04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440718/410067190/1576266104?ms=EM_PET_230606EA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230606EA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjQ1NzhkNS1iYjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEPr9hgA3hQ0dCnJSMYQ_Xbw8kZPM7Y_G6n5ShP_UnY=&emci=c8d54816-a704-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a24578d5-bb04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Right now, Americans in a majority of states can be fired from their jobs, denied credit, or evicted from their homes just because of who they are and who they love.

Passing the Equality Act will advance fairness and justice, and it will improve the lives of millions of Americans. I'm under no illusions about the obstacles we face, but we have a moral imperative to keep the pressure on. **The message we send now matters down the line — whether in two months or two years.**

[**I'm proud to fight for my family and friends in the LGBTQ+ community — this month and every month. Please join me and sign on to support the Equality Act →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440719/410067191/1576266104?ms=EM_PET_230606EA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230606EA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjQ1NzhkNS1iYjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEPr9hgA3hQ0dCnJSMYQ_Xbw8kZPM7Y_G6n5ShP_UnY=&emci=c8d54816-a704-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a24578d5-bb04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440720/410067192/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230606EA_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjQ1NzhkNS1iYjA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iEPr9hgA3hQ0dCnJSMYQ_Xbw8kZPM7Y_G6n5ShP_UnY=)****
---

name: Colin Allred
subject: Friend, this race is personal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Friend,

I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440779/410067508/851324995?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230606_FR_AllredSplit_0_3MO_ColinAllred_ColinAllred_NA_TXSenate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJhZjJkNS1iYzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGm9jxJyHGsZoNJ00bf7R9L90cLl9GiBFpVGScIHbJg=)
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440780/410067509/851324995?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230606_FR_AllredSplit_0_3MO_ColinAllred_ColinAllred_NA_TXSenate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJhZjJkNS1iYzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGm9jxJyHGsZoNJ00bf7R9L90cLl9GiBFpVGScIHbJg=)
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440781/410067510/851324995?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230606_FR_AllredSplit_0_3MO_ColinAllred_ColinAllred_NA_TXSenate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJhZjJkNS1iYzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGm9jxJyHGsZoNJ00bf7R9L90cLl9GiBFpVGScIHbJg=)
**It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Josh Gottheimer's today → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440782/410067511/851324995?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230606_FR_AllredSplit_0_3MO_ColinAllred_ColinAllred_NA_TXSenate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJhZjJkNS1iYzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGm9jxJyHGsZoNJ00bf7R9L90cLl9GiBFpVGScIHbJg=) ** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and Josh Gottheimer.

We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.

**Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me.**

[So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Josh Gottheimer to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64440789/410067518/851324995?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230606_FR_AllredSplit_0_3MO_ColinAllred_ColinAllred_NA_TXSenate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJhZjJkNS1iYzA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGm9jxJyHGsZoNJ00bf7R9L90cLl9GiBFpVGScIHbJg=)

Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.

Colin Allred

clean_body: | | Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. = Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. = After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. = It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.= | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and Josh Gottheimer. ** | = | = | = | = | = | = We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. name: Zak for Congress
subject: The 3 things you need to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
They all point to one conclusion.
#
There’s a lot we could say about Zak, this race, and our campaign to defeat George Santos and flip NY-03 blue — but this email would get pretty long.
Before we get to that though, we have some exciting news — we are less than $3,000 away from reaching a major fundraising milestone. **With this email, we believe we will hit it.** [**Can you help us meet this goal today? This will show that we have what it takes to win this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230606?refcode=em20230606&refcode2=95_8507_TvYUaL&akid=95%2E8507%2ETvYUaL)
With that said, here are the top 3 things you need to know about this race:
1. **The path for Democrats to take back the House runs right through NY-03.** There’s no doubt this will be the most high-profile, consequential congressional race in the country.
2. **This seat is flippable.** Santos is the first Republican to represent this district in the over 60 years that Zak’s family has lived here, and he just narrowly won his election. Between those odds, his lies, and the federal charges against him, we know this race is winnable.
3. **Zak is the only candidate with experience defeating extreme, MAGA candidates like Santos.** He’s spent the past four years defeating right-wing Republicans in some of the most competitive districts and states across the country with his organization, The Next 50. Now, he’s bringing those skills to this race.

All these things are true, and they all point to one conclusion: **together, this grassroots team can win this race and defeat George Santos if...**
[**... we have the resources to out-work and out-organize the national Republicans who will fight tooth and nail to hold onto this seat. So if you believe in Zak and our campaign, will you chip in $5 now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230606?refcode=em20230606&refcode2=95_8507_TvYUaL&akid=95%2E8507%2ETvYUaL)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230606?amount=5&refcode=em20230606&refcode2=95_8507_TvYUaL&akid=95%2E8507%2ETvYUaL)**
Thank you,
Everyone on Team Zak
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=95%2E8507%2ETvYUaL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=95%2E8507%2ETvYUaL)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

We need a solution that focuses on taking care of ALL Americans, not just the ones who can afford it. That's where Medicare for All comes in, and it's something that progressive folks are really getting behind.

**The problem is, support for Medicare for All is starting to dwindle, and Republicans are dead set on making sure it fails.**

So, Peter, we need your help to show that there are still plenty of people who support Medicare for All.

| | | | | | Friend,
The Biden Bribery investigation is heating up. I recently had a call with FBI Director Christopher Wray to demand he produce the FD-1023 form I have subpoenaed with the oversight authority Congress has over the FBI.
Before our phone call, **_Director Wray wouldn’t even confirm the document existed!_**
It wasn’t until I told him I’d seen the Biden FD-1023 form that he acknowledged the FBI had it. He then offered to have me view it in a secure facility instead of complying with my subpoena and providing it to me, **BUT he was going to redact it.**
**_We all know what that means!_**
Now the FBI is claiming that even though the Biden bribery allegation is on paper it doesn’t mean it’s true. But as we well know, the FBI has quite a history of downplaying negative information concerning anyone with the last name Biden. **[_Just recently a new FBI whistleblower told CBS News that the FBI was actively labeling evidence against Hunter Biden as disinformation, even if the evidence was verified!_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckTGPnDAQhX-N6UDcmDXrgiIJIkWS66JT0ljGHlhvsM0ORmj_fQTHpUjpN09vvnnWfp7c8GxY_ZkB3JxdGADjnxjA49fmab37b1_z17c6f4hXf9mH8IUBpOeM_5xnSIFeu2lX6zazjRZ6QJth8yKuopQgZJXdmvrKuZZDCQPWsi6vvZay4kb22EsrjMxcAyXwUpQCeFlVdcGlfNFGcjPYi-BXy6ryWFTol00TxegLE302NbeU5uUg6hh0C5qVsNhcILS7g0FnokfKh0i5iWEkXBYG3d0oG4OKXiEp53OzKVrUCXFhvKM9iVwYGW8TrchArMmrhOQZbzc63x6tW3flrOEQl7iSQcbbYCZ19nSOjPazdmNgvH2_N79rj8vBuBPp5GJQm_ZanXeqjfTTxJDQz0n1FP8g6RE_WMVH8O4I6X1p_vbof0otLPQMhAqTs4y3_4nHv_P28WM0v_V3yKix8-amyS2iZlU5HnWb6P8GAAD__8xmtXk)**
The level of confidence I have in Director Wray only declined during this phone call, and I’m sure you feel the same way. **I don’t have to tell you how devastating the Durham report was for the credibility of the FBI.**
I’m cleaning up the corruption in Washington, DC through exposing the truth, and the long-entrenched powers of permanent Washington are fighting back and aggressively smearing my good name to destroy my credibility. | | | | [DEFEND COMER](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckU-PmzAQxT-NuRGRMZhw4NCGplL_7KlS1V6siT0QpxiTwRTl21ewbA979JunN795Rj_2rn3WovwoAG7OTgJAyA8C4PFr8Tzf_dfP6cvPMn2oF1-sQzgLgPgc6b9zDzmQR9evatkktkaFLdmE6qM6qawCVeXJrcbqWhayUqeWjrbI1JWOUEmjVIuEWFDiashAZipTILM8Lw-yqo5oKmlaWyh5siLPtkUHPC7IHII_mOCTvr7FOE4b0UXAZSIzMx0WNzDZ1SHgYoInTtvAqQlDxzRNAi53o20YdPCaWDufmkXzpHeIQsgLr0nshk7IJvJMAtQcvY7EXshm4f3tybp5VfYaNnEKMxsSshlMr_ee9pFBP6LrBiGb13vTO3qaNsaVCKMLg17Qo97v1Avj04Qhkh-jvnL4Q4wdvbGqt-DVMcTXpemP_BP8Xc6nL2cBSg-9s0I278Tt32Xz-N6Z3_gNEq7tuLi-d5MqRZ51W90m-H8BAAD__x2YtRw)

I recently had a call with FBI Director Christopher Wray to demand he produce the FD-1023 form I have subpoenaed with the oversight authority Congress has over the FBI. Before our phone call, Director Wray wouldn’t even confirm the document existed! It wasn’t until I told him I’d seen the Biden FD-1023 form that he acknowledged the FBI had it. He then offered to have me view it in a secure facility instead of complying with my subpoena and providing it to me, BUT he was going to redact it. We all know what that means! Now the FBI is claiming that even though the Biden bribery allegation is on paper it doesn’t mean it’s true. But as we well know, the FBI has quite a history of downplaying negative information concerning anyone with the last name Biden. The level of confidence I have in Director Wray only declined during this phone call, and I’m sure you feel the same way. I don’t have to tell you how devastating the Durham report was for the credibility of the FBI. I’m cleaning up the corruption in Washington, DC through exposing the truth, and the long-entrenched powers of permanent Washington are fighting back and aggressively smearing my good name to destroy my credibility. | | | | Biden and his allies are so terrified of me, they have multiple dark money groups solely focused on attacking me every single day... And it’s not just nasty attack ads on TV, they flew an “Impeach Comer” banner over the 250,000 fans at the Kentucky Derby in my home state! With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee Paid for by James Comer for Congress

name: Patty Murray
subject: Take action this Pride Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter,

It's Pride Month, and I'm thrilled to celebrate the legacy of LGBTQ+ advocates and the contributions of our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors.

But as we celebrate this month, we also have to acknowledge that we have a lot of work to do. The GOP has been escalating their attacks on the LGBTQ+ community – especially against transgender people. **It's up to us to fight back. **
**[That's why I'm asking all of my supporters to stand firmly against the GOP's hateful anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. Will you sign my petition to speak out against attacks on the LGBTQ+ community?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441218/410069420/1830607697?code=jtk44-su-fl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2023-pride-survey&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjQ2ZDI5Yi1iZTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=adP5hWk1YYOc2EPzinxjLvSD93MMjzIiDOcpe7sEom8=&emci=729e8ade-a700-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9f46d29b-be04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**

2022 was one of the worst years on record for anti-LGBTQ+ legislation – and already this year, far-right Republicans have introduced nearly 500 extreme, hateful bills rolling back LGBTQ+ rights.

Red states across the country have recently signed bills into law to ban trans health care, prevent trans kids from playing sports, and force teachers to "out" trans students to their parents. We all have a responsibility to stand up and make clear: _**This isn’t right.**_
**I'm joining advocates across the country in speaking out against these GOP attacks – and working to pass federal legislation to protect LGBTQ+ rights.

This Pride Month, I need you to join this fight. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: the biggest fight of our generation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Friend, I am _proud_ to be pro-choice.**
In 2023, that shouldn't be a controversial statement. I was only 6 years old when Roe v. Wade was first decided. I grew up, entered adulthood, fell in love, married and had two beautiful boys in a world where women's reproductive rights were always protected — where I had the choice to live whatever kind of life I wanted.
But today, a minority of right-wing extremists have taken that right to choose — the right to determine our own future — away from millions of Americans. And this is only the tip of the iceberg. Banning interstate travel to receive reproductive health care, making abortions a felony, attacking the right to birth control — every day, some extremist Republican legislator is finding a new way to control our bodies and limit our reproductive rights.
**This is the biggest fight of our generation, friend.** We must fight tooth and nail until the right to choose is restored in all 50 states across our country. **[_That's why, today, I'm asking you to stand with me in this fight for the future of our country and speak up in support of reproductive rights: Please will you add your name today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441233/410069524/-1521109744?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4195-su-nd&refcode=jtk4195-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzQ2ZDI5Yi1iZTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obdkAaKUisqk5Ou283gk0xIxXAxEgk18ElIBQ2X08DA=&emci=8dc0e5c9-7a04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ac46d29b-be04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [Sign On: I Am Pro-Choice](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441234/410069525/-1521109744?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4195-su-nd&refcode=jtk4195-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzQ2ZDI5Yi1iZTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obdkAaKUisqk5Ou283gk0xIxXAxEgk18ElIBQ2X08DA=&emci=8dc0e5c9-7a04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ac46d29b-be04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
We can't doom the next generation to a country where Americans do not have the right to choose their own futures, where patients and doctors alike are prosecuted as felons, where women have to risk their own health because of cruel laws drafted by out-of-touch extremists.
Thankfully, we're not alone in this fight. A majority of Americans support both legal abortion and legislation to restore reproductive rights nationwide. We see it in poll after poll — and we witnessed it firsthand during the 2022 midterms. Abortion was on the ballot last year, and Americans across the country, from Kansas to Michigan, _rejected_ this extremist, dangerous agenda. And I believe that we will do it again in 2024, and again and again until every American once again has the right to choose.
But this starts with making sure that our voices are louder than the minority of extremists. **And to do that, we can't be quiet or shaky about our support for reproductive rights. We have to proclaim it proudly and fight for it.[_That's why I'm asking 20,000 members of my team to join me before my midnight deadline tonight. Please, will you sign on now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441235/410069526/-1521109744?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4195-su-nd&refcode=jtk4195-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzQ2ZDI5Yi1iZTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obdkAaKUisqk5Ou283gk0xIxXAxEgk18ElIBQ2X08DA=&emci=8dc0e5c9-7a04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ac46d29b-be04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [Sign On: I Am Pro-Choice](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441236/410069527/-1521109744?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&code=jtk4195-su-nd&refcode=jtk4195-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzQ2ZDI5Yi1iZTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obdkAaKUisqk5Ou283gk0xIxXAxEgk18ElIBQ2X08DA=&emci=8dc0e5c9-7a04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ac46d29b-be04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

Despite the difficult challenges and setbacks we've faced this past year, I remain resolute and hopeful that we will emerge from this fight victorious. Thanks for standing with me today.

With love and hope,

Kirsten
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441237/410069528/1575385346?code=jtk4195-su-nd&refcode=jtk4195-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzQ2ZDI5Yi1iZTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obdkAaKUisqk5Ou283gk0xIxXAxEgk18ElIBQ2X08DA=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441238/410069529/1575385346?code=jtk4195-su-nd&refcode=jtk4195-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzQ2ZDI5Yi1iZTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obdkAaKUisqk5Ou283gk0xIxXAxEgk18ElIBQ2X08DA=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441239/410069530/1575385346?code=jtk4195-su-nd&refcode=jtk4195-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzQ2ZDI5Yi1iZTA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obdkAaKUisqk5Ou283gk0xIxXAxEgk18ElIBQ2X08DA=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Future Forum PAC
subject: What just happened with student debt:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
This GOP attack on student debt relief is a slap in the face

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21650-20230606-StudentDebt-header-Education-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21650-20230606-StudentDebt-header-Education-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]Peter,
House Republicans just passed a bill to retroactively charge student loan borrowers interest on their paused payments, repeal President Biden’s plan to relieve up to $20,000 in student debt for borrowers, and claw back aid from public servants.
This latest GOP attack on student debt relief is a slap in the face to 43 MILLION Americans with student loan debt.
We should be helping Americans struggling with student debt, not making their problems worse.
The fight to address the student debt crisis is far from over – and we need to be prepared to hold Republicans accountable who voted to take away student debt relief in 2024. Team,
Governor Gretchen Whitmer is serious about keeping Michiganders safe. That’s why she signed crucial measures to address gun violence, including:

✅ Implementing background checks
✅ Promoting safe storage practices
✅ Enabling extreme risk protection orders

Other states are attacking fundamental freedoms. We don’t have time for that. Instead, we’re taking common sense action to reduce gun violence and make Michigan safer.

By working together, we can effectively protect our communities and save lives. But we can't do it alone — we need your support to continue making progress.

Join Governor Whitmer in the fight for common sense gun safety laws by contributing $5 today. Your donation will make a real difference in ensuring the safety and well-being of our fellow Michiganders. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/au-em-june2023?]

body:

[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=1707a620ad634bd8a3aa44eb9ed646fb&_t=fop5hPehYDInEZZETET530EUnSfV0_QiBMsg7ypUhsjCaOdgo1VyPJ9vP4WRCAnUqdLW-mfsjWmcYntOsDgymoCMgBaBWobHDgRyJrsO6KU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=1707a620ad634bd8a3aa44eb9ed646fb&_t=fop5hPehYDInEZZETET530EUnSfV0_QiBMsg7ypUhsjCaOdgo1VyPJ9vP4WRCAnUqdLW-mfsjWmcYntOsDgymoCMgBaBWobHDgRyJrsO6KU%3D)
