Fellow Patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican**.

I’m helping to change that narrative. **I’m not a “coconut”** - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Hispanic,” as others have labeled me. **My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Hispanic Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District.** Until I flipped this seat in 2022, a Republican had literally never held this seat in Congress.

The first time I ran for this seat back in 2020, **we fell short by a mere 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter – I never give up. I ran again in 2022 and defeated a progressive socialist, **flipping this seat for the first time in 120 years.** Now, the socialist is back for a rematch and this time around I'm charged with keeping this seat Republican. It would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in a couple dollars right now to help keep this Hispanic Republican from TEXAS in the the U.S. House!

[ ** Support a Hispanic Republican
Donate Today ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1707a620ad634bd8a3aa44eb9ed646fb&_e=oAFN5d9MwXGklbAwX4F7UNmEhCyRI0Jft3eSJKr0ZYa07pU-EpxfWuzIgdHgjbJ7dRLFaEp2TmYcAq0YBC3Y9vn6mrPD9HAy2xj9DrBUiJS2FlkY27iiK2aBCdA6QyyufQ65-7EfBOG_tjqMRpurdvtzq9gmZhfjwTdvpIXSZjwbbuDGVr_Ioh71e21liEYJqTsyPJjMAjfvczKr3t-KD44pph5e_TWbWx2kf8vqHqxHe1KbNNHZJ__dH1US0di40rtrcahItgcgWXLOrEN5-CIPrhlbgCwMcSexxjZtss1Tj2PfeMpBRpw-5dNLpfU4dgBl0BcbfUBDS0rRKzkgqQxL1Dn4cemk-s-OvJZWAKXWDkBocTzmPpYoYXYsTIgev5gtLChN6i0BpeGE8UKLruW1qW02TFYHeAE614tPZKUEia0Qg_IfaO5DxUdg2I1o)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, Speaker Kevin McCarthy, the National Republican Congressional Committee and Texas Right to Life, among others.

As you may have heard, R**epublicans only have a four-seat majority, and to put it plainly, without holding onto this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retake the majority.**

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more!

**We need more brown Republican women of color**.

**[Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1707a620ad634bd8a3aa44eb9ed646fb&_e=oAFN5d9MwXGklbAwX4F7UNmEhCyRI0Jft3eSJKr0ZYa07pU-EpxfWuzIgdHgjbJ7dRLFaEp2TmYcAq0YBC3Y9vn6mrPD9HAy2xj9DrBUiJS2FlkY27iiK2aBCdA6QyyufQ65-7EfBOG_tjqMRpurdvtzq9gmZhfjwTdvpIXSZjwbbuDGVr_Ioh71e21liEYJqTsyPJjMAjfvczKr3t-KD44pph5e_TWbWx2kf8vqHqxHe1KbNNHZJ__dH1US0di40rtrcahItgcgWXLOrEN5-CIPrhlbgCwMcSexxjZtss0kuv5A28eksLCUY1oYDeLn22k1YkC6rKZT7uxxzZxyBzk8HltaDzEL_aVrTOntYbPAaIKF9352T1BrksC_8bOYcu5_8KthA_w7oZ362s2e_Ob-mPK--7RLFdJSGlDRNabBhNo3TfIlSAWcqJ8QKD2U)**

**Culturally, Hispanics are conservative** : most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. **For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party**. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ours for the taking – _**if we can keep our eye on the prize and our message to voters clear and concise**_. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, **[invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1707a620ad634bd8a3aa44eb9ed646fb&_e=oAFN5d9MwXGklbAwX4F7UNmEhCyRI0Jft3eSJKr0ZYa07pU-EpxfWuzIgdHgjbJ7dRLFaEp2TmYcAq0YBC3Y9vn6mrPD9HAy2xj9DrBUiJS2FlkY27iiK2aBCdA6QyyufQ65-7EfBOG_tjqMRpurdvtzq9gmZhfjwTdvpIXSZjwbbuDGVr_Ioh71e21liEYJqTsyPJjMAjfvczKr3t-KD44pph5e_TWbWx2kf8vqHqxHe1KbNNHZJ__dH1US0di40rtrcahItgcgWXLOrEN5-CIPrhlbgCwMcSexxjZtss2xPc4XqhPWItm8WAXmc0wKaJOfYWl5xVay6FdDKWEsOjN-CLSw5dyORUXx6xgvVe6MF2MLuaECdRF25c5pJmikD0g_ySW2Wl4GrHov6T6MdDTldM1GnoqBYX7FOjo9g5gNwnBw0PF4SuuaX9DhLegi)**.

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “ _**If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now**_.”

Help me prove him right.

**Thank you for your time.**

Donate Today ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1707a620ad634bd8a3aa44eb9ed646fb&_e=oAFN5d9MwXGklbAwX4F7UNmEhCyRI0Jft3eSJKr0ZYa07pU-EpxfWuzIgdHgjbJ7dRLFaEp2TmYcAq0YBC3Y9vn6mrPD9HAy2xj9DrBUiJS2FlkY27iiK2aBCdA6QyyufQ65-7EfBOG_tjqMRpurdvtzq9gmZhfjwTdvpIXSZjwbbuDGVr_Ioh71e21liEYJqTsyPJjMAjfvczKr3t-KD44pph5e_TWbWx2kf8vqHqxHe1KbNNHZJ__dH1US0di40rtrcahItgcgWXLOrEN5-CIPrhlbgCwMcSexxjZtss0qaWYC50VVHk3JelqRKU3Ndy9PV1cSmGiccLuokfF4JVJaXzCHA9YJGL8jfaqGlvV9gXxK7WfwcwqBdfji4N3QRcu9eqqHbULDEqx2xhLQWKvFM98XZCpPrvhJYO-6bV4MDEXHZZ_LLdrVI1AUQW_k)

**GET TO KNOW MONICA:** | **Monica De La Cruz successfully flipped Texas'15th Congressional District RED in 2022, becoming the first Republican to represent the district in Congress!**

Monica grew up in the Rio Grande Valley in the border town of Brownsville, TX. Monica and her brother were raised by a single Mom, Norma Alicia. She had a simple life that was built around faith, hard work and family. Her mother raised her with a strong love of country as her grandfather served in the Navy in WWII and her brother served honorably twenty years in the Air Force.

Monica put herself through college while working and graduated from the University of Texas at San Antonio with a BBA in Marketing. After graduation, Monica wanted to further her Spanish language studies and attended La Universidad Nacional Autonoma de Mexico in Mexico City.

Monica owns three successful small businesses and are examples of the American Dream. She believes in giving back to her community and has strong ties through her work with various community service organizations. Monica resides in Edinburg, TX with her two children.

[ ** STAND WITH MONICA ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1707a620ad634bd8a3aa44eb9ed646fb&_e=oAFN5d9MwXGklbAwX4F7UNmEhCyRI0Jft3eSJKr0ZYa07pU-EpxfWuzIgdHgjbJ7dRLFaEp2TmYcAq0YBC3Y9vn6mrPD9HAy2xj9DrBUiJS2FlkY27iiK2aBCdA6QyyufQ65-7EfBOG_tjqMRpurdvtzq9gmZhfjwTdvpIXSZjwbbuDGVr_Ioh71e21liEYJqTsyPJjMAjfvczKr3t-KD44pph5e_TWbWx2kf8vqHqxHe1KbNNHZJ__dH1US0di40rtrcahItgcgWXLOrEN5-CIPrhlbgCwMcSexxjZtss1sXvDDVIstPXrLdJsN2aoCFbDisK5LDLPOh9FaUvPU_sLlXPXu6tb4rcWmvFCsdhzaltPV_Rhy6nG7w_-guev68GTF4vAvtG7R-LPpayw6l1JspTLn82K8aIBekHtmUB7EwhcezU4p5hB9lklIYMLu)

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: This Pride Month:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Now more than ever, it’s time to pass a real nondiscrimination bill in Pennsylvania.

Derek, I’ve always believed that every single Pennsylvanian should have equal protection under the law, regardless of what you look like, where you come from, who you love, or who you pray to.

And now more than ever, it’s time to pass a real nondiscrimination bill in Pennsylvania. It’s time to pass The Fairness Act and guarantee that no LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanian is denied housing, employment or public accommodations because of who they are or who they love.

**[We’re closer than ever to getting this done, and as we celebrate Pride Month this month, I’m calling on all of us to help build a grassroots coalition to make The Fairness Act the law of the land. Will you sign your name now to help us protect LGBTQ+ rights in Pennsylvania?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441636/410071128/815424581?source=email_060623_pride&refcode=email_060623_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjA0MTcwZi1jNDA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7dVVk92fRk6ykpM7BFYyKmXstrrjmzcXx-O0um1RBHE=&emci=ce1d65d6-8204-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9b04170f-c404-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64441637/410071129/815424581?source=email_060623_pride&refcode=email_060623_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjA0MTcwZi1jNDA0LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7dVVk92fRk6ykpM7BFYyKmXstrrjmzcXx-O0um1RBHE=&emci=ce1d65d6-8204-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9b04170f-c404-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)

Derek, this is not going to be an easy fight, and it won’t happen overnight.

But we can’t let 20 more years go by before we pass these nondiscrimination protections for our neighbors.

I will proudly sign this bill preventing LGBTQ+ discrimination into law. But it’s going to take all of us to make a reality. So Derek, please sign your name next to mine to help protect LGBTQ+ rights in Pennsylvania once and for all:

clean_body: Now more than ever, it’s time to pass a real nondiscrimination bill in Pennsylvania. Derek, I’ve always believed that every single Pennsylvanian should have equal protection under the law, regardless of what you look like, where you come from, who you love, or who you pray to. And now more than ever, it’s time to pass a real nondiscrimination bill in Pennsylvania. It’s time to pass The Fairness Act and guarantee that no LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanian is denied housing, employment or public accommodations because of who they are or who they love. | | Derek, this is not going to be an easy fight, and it won’t happen overnight. But we can’t let 20 more years go by before we pass these nondiscrimination protections for our neighbors. I will proudly sign this bill preventing LGBTQ+ discrimination into law. But it’s going to take all of us to make a reality. So Derek, please sign your name next to mine to help protect LGBTQ+ rights in Pennsylvania once and for all: | Thanks, Josh | | | = Text JOSH to 32210 By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Steve Bannon urges on vote to censure me in the House of Representatives potentially tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]Adam Schiff for Senate

This is breaking news,
Derek:

MAGA Republican Anna Paulina Luna just announced on former Trump advisor
Steve Bannon’s podcast that her resolution to censure and potentially fine
me $16 million could come to a vote tomorrow in the House of
Representatives — with the support of House Speaker Kevin McCarthy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]MAGA Rep. Anna Paulina Luna sitting beside Steve Bannon on his show

Luna: “Tomorrow we will be taking the vote to censure him and potentially fine
him.”

Bannon: “And that has the backing of leadership.”

Luna: “Yes, we’re working on the bill right now.”

Bannon: “Great work. Fantastic...The Shifty Schiff thing tomorrow is gonna be
historic.”

Luna: “Yeah, he’s gonna go down as a liar. As he should.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]Derek,
I need this team’s support to help us fight back immediately against this
false and defamatory effort to punish me for investigating Donald Trump’s
egregious abuses of power and impeaching him. Please chip in $10 or
whatever you can spare:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2023_abs_em.wTG104&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

If this vote proceeds and Republicans succeed in censuring me, it will be
one of the most blatantly authoritarian measures that they have taken yet,
meant to crack down on any dissent.

I took on Trump and impeached him, obtaining the first bipartisan vote to
remove a president in history. Now, MAGA Republicans are exacting
political revenge by trying to censure and fine me millions of dollars —
because they believe I have been too effective in exposing their
corruption.

The authors of the Big Lie seek to condemn me for telling the truth. And
the precedent this would set for the House of Representatives and
constitutional representation would be disastrous: That the majority party
can intimidate and silence any member that’s willing to stand up to a
corrupt president and defend our democracy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]Rush a donation of whatever you can spare to help my campaign fight
back and respond ahead of tomorrow’s likely vote.

Defending our democracy is a big part of the reason I’m running for the
U.S. Senate — and why they want to stop me. They hope Donald Trump is
again our president and they can run roughshod over anyone who gets in the
way. We are going to make sure that never happens.

Thanks for standing with me,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jun2023_abs_em.hzT4iC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2432%2E5257348%2EukKluu ]Privacy Policy
